name: Ziadah Upsell Cross sell
short_description: More than 15 ways to increase cart in one system: product suggestions, quantity offers, and coupons
description:
## All order volume boost solutions in one system

### What changes when you activate Ziadah app?

* Customers buy more than one product.
* Most orders contain a high number of items.
* Average Order Value (AOV) increases.
* Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC) decreases.
* You can market great, low-priced products at **0 SAR** cost.
* Inventory turnover becomes faster "Stock moves quickly."

> This isn't just theory; check the merchants' reviews at the bottom of the page.

---

### Our Numbers

**From 2024/1/1 to 2026/1/1**

* **+700** Subscriptions
* **+40 Million** Successful product impressions
* **+800,000** "Add to Cart" actions from suggestions
* **+200,000** Suggested products purchased
* **+10,000,000** SAR Total sales from suggested products
* **+1,500,000** SAR Highest sales for a single store

---

### Why Choose Ziadah?

* More than **15 ways** to increase order volume.
* A professional and seamless user experience for both you and your customers.
* A professional team dedicated to your success, with you every step of the way.
* Continuous development ensuring you have the best and most advanced solutions in the market.
* We care about your feedback; all features are built based on suggestions from merchants like you.
* Compatible with all themes; no matter how you change your theme, it remains compatible.

---

### Comprehensive Targeting

You can target your customer anytime and anywhere on the store, such as:

1. Adding a product to the cart.
2. Deleting a product from the cart.
3. Entering the product page.
4. Exiting the product page.
5. Completing the order.
6. Starting the checkout process.
7. Accessing the store's main home page.
8. Opening the cart page.
9. Accessing a specific category page.

---

### App Experience

You can experience the app as a customer from **[here](https://ky0vcg.zid.store/)**

---

### Activation Method

1. Choose the suitable package.
2. Click on the "Activate App" button.
3. Accept the permissions and install the app.
4. Add your password; a verification code will be sent to your email to log in.
5. Start activating suggestions immediately.

---

### For Support and Inquiries

Contact us via WhatsApp by clicking **[here](https://api.whatsapp.com/send/?phone=966510131856&text&type=phone_number&app_absent=0)**

---

name: Thunder
short_description: Slash Your Wasted Ad Spend by Up to 50 Precent
description:
If you’re spending any money on ads for your store, did you know you might be wasting up to 50% of your budget due to a hidden problem many overlook? The issue is called **the marketing data gap!**

**What is the marketing data gap?**
Most online stores rely on popular advertising platforms like Google, TikTok, Meta, and Snapchat to promote their products. The catch that many miss is that these platforms often provide incomplete or even inaccurate analytics about your campaign performance. This includes the number of sales and their sources on your store.

**Why does this happen?**
Because these platforms aren’t fully integrated with your online store. As a result:

* Misleading or Incorrect Sales Data:
If your sales numbers are inaccurate, you can’t determine which campaign is the most profitable and which one is losing you money. You’ll end up making decisions based on unrealistic data.

* Unknown Sources of Sales:
If you don’t know where your sales are actually coming from, the problem multiplies. For example, a customer might see your ad on TikTok, then later search your store on Google and make a purchase. Google might take credit for the sale, even though TikTok was the platform where the customer clicked your ad—or vice versa.

**The Outcome of This Problem: Increased Advertising Costs:**

By relying on inaccurate data due to the marketing data gap, you’ll end up spending more on underperforming campaigns. Even worse, you might stop successful campaigns without a clear reason.


**So, what’s the solution? In short, Thnder App**

**What is Thnder App?**
Thnder is designed to solve the marketing data gap that online stores face. It bridges the gap between your store and advertising platforms like Google, TikTok, Meta, and Snapchat by integrating your store’s sales data with ad platform data. This ensures you get accurate insights into your campaign performance, eliminating guesswork and uncovering hidden opportunities that no single platform can provide.

With Thnder, you can monitor your campaigns in real time, compare strategies, and identify what drives your sales. Most importantly, it helps you reduce wasted ad spend by up to 50%, maximizing the impact of every Riyal you invest. Over time, you’ll see higher conversion rates, lower acquisition costs, and smarter, data-driven decisions that fuel sustainable growth.

**Key Features of Thnder:**

**Outperforms Pixels. Outsmarts Ad Platforms:**
Thnder's tracking goes beyond pixel limits and platform inaccuracies — know the exact source of every sale: platform, campaign, and ad.

**Follow Every Click to Conversion:**
Know every step of your customer's journey from the first click. Pinpoint the exact source of your sales.

**Track Influencers Performance Like Paid Ads:**
Turn influencer marketing into a measurable channel. Go beyond likes and views. Track the full journey.

**Your top-selling creatives, revealed:**
See what sells—literally. Double down on what works, cut what doesn’t.

**Track any link. No limits:**
Track custom links across any channel—WhatsApp, SMS, email, and more. If you can share it, you can track it.

**Launch All Your Ads, From One Place:**
Launch Google, Meta, TikTok, and Snapchat ads in seconds—right inside Thnder. One dashboard, every platform.

**One Dashboard to Rule Them All:**
One dashboard. Every channel. Simplified



**How to Get Started with Thnder:**
1. Choose the plan that suits you best.
2. Receive your login details via email.
3. Confirm your email and set your password.
4. Connect your advertising accounts to Thnder.

**Now you’re ready to make every Riyal spent on ads count!**


**If you'd like a personal walkthrough of Thnder or have any questions, you can book a demo call with us here: https://calendly.com/thnder/meeting.**

**For support inquiries, message us on WhatsApp at +966 53 023 7626.**

name: Cartat Whatsapp
short_description: Cartat, your store marketing manager through WhatsApp
description:
Cartat app is the marketing manager for your store, enables you to create advertising campaigns, send alerts to abandoned cart customers, send updates about order statuses, and various other alerts, and all of this is done automatically and without your intervention.

**The most important services provided:**

**-** Link your WhatsApp account to your store instantly and directly without the need to wait for approvals.

**-** create a Whatsapp bot You can customize it as you like for automatic responses to your customers.

**-** The ability to customize message templates as you like, with the ability to include variables such as the customer's name, order number, shipment number, etc...

**-** Send abandoned carts alerts to your customers via WhatsApp, with the ability to customize the message.

**-** Sending automatic alerts regarding order statuses via WhatsApp, such as (when there is a change in the status of the order), issuing a bill of lading, etc...

**-** Create group promotional campaigns with the ability to import an unlimited number of clients.

**-** Automatic and manual synchronization of the abandoned cart list and the customer list.

**-** Reports measuring the percentage of customer returns after leaving the carts.

**-** Reports of reading messages sent to your customers via WhatsApp.

**-** Support variables in messages templates such as:
{customer name}, {cart total}, {tracking link}, {order number}, {purchase completion link}


**Integration steps**

**1.** Subscribe to the appropriate package for you.

**2.** Click on the activation button.

**3.** Agree to the permissions and install the application.

**4.** The integration will be done directly.

name: Shrinkit
short_description: Powerful Marketing Automation for E-commerce Success
description:
Shrinkit is a comprehensive full-stack tool designed for ecommerce marketing. It offers a range of features to enhance marketing strategies:

**Our Features**

**-** **Web Push Notifications**

Shrinkit offers web push notifications, enabling businesses to engage users with targeted campaigns directly on their web browsers. This feature enhances customer reach and keeps them informed about promotions and updates.

**-** **Whats App Messaging**
Boost your e-commerce with our WhatsApp Business Marketing solutions. Recover abandoned carts, increase customer engagement, and boost sales 

* Send Bulk Whats App Messages
* Personalised Cart Recovery
* Product Catalogs
* Broadcast Lists for Offers
 
**-** **Micro Pages Builder**
The micro pages builder feature empowers businesses to create tailored offer pages, promotions, product displays, and even Instagram profile pages. This enhances the presentation of content to customers and aids in showcasing products effectively.

**-** **Marketing Automation**
Automate marketing actions  over
* Whats App
* Push and
* Email
based on customer behavior to boost engagement and sales. Save time with targeted offers and personalized recommendations, driving more conversions effortlessly.

**-** **CRM Integration for Customer Loyalty & Retention**
Enhance customer loyalty with automated workflows that
* Personalize communication
* Reward repeat buyers
*  Re-engage inactive customers.
*  Offer exclusive VIP offers, loyalty programs,
*  and seamless post-purchase engagement


**Integration Steps**
**1.** Choose the right Plan for you
**2.** Activate the app from Zid App Market
**3.** Integration will be done directly

name: Masrad
short_description: Masrad is a cutting-edge AI-powered application that revolutionizes the way e-commerce product descriptions are created. Merchants can now generate engaging and high-quality product descriptions.
description:
"Masrad" is an application that relies on artificial intelligence to create accurate and distinctive descriptions of products on e-commerce websites. Merchants can easily generate attractive and high-quality descriptions for their products using different methods, including paragraph style, bullet points, and personalized style that may combine paragraphs, bullet points, and definitions.

Additionally, the application can recognize the necessary keywords and phrases to improve the product's classification on search engines, increasing the product's visibility and sales opportunities.

Our application provides a simple and user-friendly interface for sellers to enter product information such as description and specifications. Once these details are uploaded, the application generates the description in the style chosen by the user. The description can be sent directly to the store or saved as a draft for later use.

Merchants can save time and resources on creating product descriptions, enabling them to focus on other important aspects of their business. Creating an accurate and high-quality description that reflects the product's features correctly.


You can find the User's Manual here: https://masrad.io/guidelines


**Integration Steps**

**1.** Choose the right Plan for you

**2.** Activate the app from Zid App Market

**3.** Integration will be done directly

name: Glam
short_description: Abandoned cart management solutions service and customer reminders via email and text messages
description:
A Cart with full liked products by customer, but he has not completed the purchase yet. With Glam, you can motivate him to come back and complete the purchase by marketing through several channels of your choice.

**Our Features**

**-** **Reports**

Monthly and weekly reports help you to know the stage of the customer stopping the request. As well as a report on the return of the customer at each step.

**-** **Several communication channels**

You can encourage the customer to buy from his neglected basket through several channels (text messages and mail messages).

**-** **More and easier customization**

You can fully customize the content of the sent mail from the mail address, sender name and message content.

**-** **Reduce customer return cost**

A pen works automatically and automatically and turns the basket into a (neglected) state until the customer returns, which reduces the effort and cost of returning the customer to your store."****


**Integration Steps**

**1.** Choose the right Plan for you

**2.** Activate the app from Zid App Market

**3.** Integration will be done directly

With Convertedin, you can easily increase conversion, boost your sales, turn customer data into tangible insights, deliver personalized messages, and reduce acquisition costs in no time — whether you are a shop owner, an advertiser, or a marketer. 

**Our Services:**

* **Easily Automate Dynamic Ads**
 Boost sales and attract customers by creating tailored ads across multiple channels using our platform, which focuses specifically on e-commerce with its automation and AI-driven approach.

* **Flexible Automatic Segmentation**
 No need to manually filter and analyze customer segments anymore; with Convertedin's automatic segmentation engine, we'll professionally target your audience.

* **SMS & Email Message Management**
 Build and customize marketing campaigns via SMS and email effortlessly.

* **Product Recommendation Engine**
 Say goodbye to generic recommendations! With our engine, you'll be able to provide personalized, relevant recommendations to customers based on their purchase history.

* Automate ads across Meta channels, TikTok, Snapchat, LinkedIn — all in one place.
* Retarget, segment, and reach shoppers based on demographics and lookalikes.
* Offer products based on relevance, using our smart catalog intelligence feature.
* Track the full-funnel behavior of buyers to ensure the success of your campaigns.
* Promote your brand every season via Push notifications, SMS, or Email.

name: WhatsApp Notify Cart Ai
short_description: Try it for 3 days free Start now with the best WhatsApp service for merchants to increase your sales
description:
Lets Bot: AI-Powered Bot to Boost Your Sales and Delight Your Customers

Achieve greater success for your store with Lets Bot.

Lets Bot is the perfect solution for Saudi store owners to enhance customer experience and increase profits using smart WhatsApp notifications and an AI-powered bot (additional paid service). Our latest update features an AI bot that automatically responds to customer inquiries about order status and product details with precision and speed, saving you time and ensuring customer satisfaction.


Why Choose Lets Bot

* Smart WhatsApp Notifications: Send abandoned cart reminders with automatic discount coupons to encourage customers to complete their purchases.
* AI-Powered Bot (Additional Paid Service): Provides automated responses to customer inquiries about orders and products, enhancing efficiency.
* Instant Order Status Updates: Notify customers about their order status (e.g., shipping or delivery) automatically.
* Fast Digital Product Delivery: Send files and digital products via WhatsApp immediately upon request.
* Flexible Message Templates: Over 20 customizable message templates (e.g., welcome, payment confirmation, review request) with support for variables like {customer_name} and {order_number}.
* Accurate Analytics: Track campaign performance and identify top-selling days and regions to optimize your strategies.
* Easy WhatsApp Integration: Connect your store effortlessly without complications or waiting for approvals.

The Power of the AI-Powered Bot: Stand Out from Competitors

* Smart Automated Responses: Answers customer questions about order status (e.g., "Where is my order?") and product details (e.g., "What are this product’s specifications?") with high accuracy.
* Customized Interactive Experience: Offer tailored options and promotional campaigns based on customer needs.
* Save Time and Effort: Reduces the need for a large support team thanks to smart automation.
* Increase Customer Satisfaction: Ensures a seamless and fast experience, boosting customer loyalty and sales.

Additional Features for Superior Management and Marketing

* Send images and audio clips with notifications to capture customer attention.
* Easily import contacts and conversations from your store.
* Detailed reports to measure customer return rates after reminders.
* Schedule review request messages to improve customer experience.
* Targeted promotional campaigns (at an additional cost) based on city, gender, or product.

Why Lets Bot is the Best

* Unmatched Innovation: We are the only ones in the Saudi market offering an AI-powered bot, giving you a competitive edge.
* Saudi-Designed Professional Solution: Developed by a team of engineers to meet the needs of Saudi stores.
* Continuous Updates: We ensure the best performance with regular enhancements for an optimal user experience.

Try Lets Bot now and take your sales to the next level

name: Gameball
short_description: Gameball is a gamified loyalty solution that helps businesses engage and grow their customer base.
description:
Gameball is your ultimate tool to build customer loyalty, boost engagement, and drive repeat purchases. Fully customizable and powered by advanced gamification, it transforms your store into a dynamic rewards platform that keeps customers coming back for more.
**Why Choose Gameball?**
Seamless Integration: Easily integrate Gameball into your Zid store to create a loyalty program that aligns with your brand.
Tailored Rewards: Set up personalized reward rules based on customer behavior, such as points for purchases, referrals, and social engagement.
Gamified Experience: Engage customers with interactive features like spin-the-wheel, streaks, challenges, and more, turning shopping into an exciting game.
Maximize Retention: Automatically reward your most loyal customers and increase lifetime value by encouraging repeat purchases and engagement.
Data-Driven Insights: Track the performance of your loyalty program with in-depth analytics and optimize your rewards to drive better results.
Multi-Channel Engagement: Reward customers for engaging with your store on different platforms, including social media and email, ensuring broader reach.
With Gameball Loyalty, not only can you retain customers, but you can also turn their engagement into a game that benefits both you and your shoppers. Get started today and watch your customer loyalty soar!

**Installation Steps:**
1-Subscribe to a Gameball plan.
2-Grant necessary permissions and install the Gameball app.
3-Log in to your Gameball dashboard and customize your loyalty program.
4-Create custom rewards, challenges, and gamified experiences for your customers.
5-Start rewarding customers and increasing retention with Gameball's interactive features!

name: OptimizeApp
short_description: The easiest way to to launch digital campaigns and drive results.
description:
With OptimizeApp, you can run social media campaigns that show up to users who are most likely to purchase from your store.

 **Connect your Zid store & unlock advanced features**

**-**  **Launch Sales-focused campaigns**
Enable better tracking and revenue reporting for your sales campaigns with Snapchat pixel and CAPI (Conversion API).

**-** **AI audience targeting**.
Let AI do the heavy lifting by finding potential clients that are more likely to purchase from your store.

**-** **Control your online ads on mobile & desktop**
Run your ads directly from inside your Zid dashboard, or download our mobile app to take control on the go.

**Important:** to use OptimizeApp inside the Zid dashboard, you must have the "Snapchat Ads" app downloaded from the Zid App Market and have your pixel connected to your Zid store.


**Activation Process**

1. Activate OptimizeApp from the Zid App Market.

2. If you haven't already, download the "[Snapchat Ads](https://web.zid.sa/market/app/3883)" app and set up your pixel.

3. Share your Snapchat pixel & Public profile with OptimizeApp.

4. Launch your campaigns in minutes.

5. Track your results & optimize your campaigns.

6. [Download the mobile app](https://optimizeapp.com/download) and sign up using your Zid email (optional).

name: Crazyegg
short_description: A service that allows you to record the actions of your store's visitors and customers, to help you improve the customer experience
description:
This service records the entire visitor or customer session from the moment he enters your store until he leaves it, which helps you discover the shopping patterns of your customers


**Our services**

**-** **Snapshots**

The key to growing your ecommerce business is to understand the path to purchase.

**-** See attention hotspots on product pages with Heatmap

**-** Track ad campaign traffic on your site with Confetti

**-** Understand if shoppers are clicking where they should with Overlay

**-** Make sure your 'buy now' buttons are in the right place with Scrollmap

**-** **Website Recordings**

Identify navigation obstacles on the path to purchase. Find out why shoppers are abandoning their carts.

**-** **Records the Entire User Session**

From the moment a visitor comes to your site to the end of their session, you'll see every movement of their cursor and everything they click on.

**-** **Find the Website Recordings You Really Need**

Use our Recordings Filter to find specific recordings on your pricing page, specific features, signup flows, or any other section of your site.


**Integration Steps**

**-** To know how to connect your store to the service click [**here**](https://help.zid.sa/en/crazyegg)

name: TIDIO
short_description: A service that provides you with marketing solutions and communication solutions with visitors and customers of the online store
description:
Tidio provides a solution for live chat and chat bots, allowing business owners to communicate with their customers in real time. Tidio helps in increasing the number of leads and converting them into confirmed customers


**LIVE CHAT**

Thanks to the live chat software, business owners and customers can connect in real time. Tidio chat offers the fastest and easiest way to support your website visitors.

**-** Customize the live chat to match your brand

**-** Learn who browses your website and reach out

**-** Chat live and answer questions to increase sales

**-** Monitor results and automate chats with AI

**-** Check where your visitors are coming from


**CHATBOTS**

Explore new ways to capture leads and generate more sales. Discover some of our most popular sales chatbots templates:

**-** Discount for new/returning visitors

**-** Product recommendation

**-** Abandoned cart saver

**-** Order placement

name: Trengo
short_description: Connect with your customers from all channels in just one platform
description:
By using Tringo, you ensure that there is no delay in responding to any of the messages sent to you in all of your communication channels. You can also add multiple users and teams to handle all incoming messages and manage chat internally by tagging to share feedback and comments between team members.



**Live chat in your store**

Add live chat for customers on your store



**Live chat between employees**

This feature allows employees to communicate directly with each other via voice or video chat



**automatic guidance**

Customers are directed to the appropriate department to serve them based on their need.



**Ticket management**

A way helps you to handle issues and requests where you can track and manage them efficiently.




**Self-service portal**

It enables you to build a website to provide information and resources to help users find answers to their common problems through text guidance.



**Community Forum**

It enables you to build an online platform that enables members, consumers and fans to come together to ask questions and receive support from each other.


**Manage all social media channels**

You can communicate with customers from all social media channels and manage them through just one platform.



**Document Storage**


This feature enables you to store documents on the cloud.


**Integration Steps**

To know how to connect the chat service with your store
 [**Clik here**](https://help.zid.sa/ar-eg/%D8%A7%D9%84%D8%B1%D8%A8%D8%B7-%D9%85%D8%B9-%D8%AA%D8%B1%D9%8A%D9%86%D9%82%D9%88)

name: Apps Bunches
short_description: Be among professional stores and multiply your REVENUE by having a PROFESSIONAL app on iOS - Android
description:
Apps Bunches  | Your ###1 Technical Partner

Why has the app become a real growth engine?
Because the numbers prove the difference isn’t just UI… the app changes the game.

(Analytics results from stores using Apps Bunches app)

**• Revenue per user:** from about 2 SAR on web to about 49 SAR in the app (+23x).

**• Time spent:** from seconds to about 10 minutes in the app (+25x).

**• Pages per session:** from about 2 to +59 pages in the app (+23x).

**• Repeat purchase:** from less than 1% to about 19% in the app (+30x).

**• Conversion:** from 0.5% to 4.6% in the app (+8x).

The app doesn’t increase visits… the app creates customers.

Key Features (Apps Bunches app Dashboard)

**• Push Notifications:** Send + Schedule + To a Specific User + Images

**• Abandoned Carts:** View Member Carts + View Guest Carts (No Login)

**• Cart Recovery:** Automated Notifications (Basic/Advanced) + Custom Manual Notifications

**• Abandoned Cart Popup:** Smart Window to Boost Conversion

**• Promo Popup:** Offers/Coupons by Segment or Page

**• Favorites:** Enable Favorites Lists + Re-target Users

**• Promo Banner Bar:** Static/Moving Banners for Fast Promotion.

**• App Rights:** Control Identity & Rights by Plan

**• Change Splash:** Update the Splash Screen Easily

**• Categories Interface:** Control the Categories Page Design

**• Product Card:** Multiple Product Card Designs Across Different Screens

**• Analytics Integration:** Track User Behavior + Connect the App to Analytics Platforms

**• Order Status Notifications:** Automatic Alert on Every Order Status Update



Examples on the Advanced Plan

[- Sayyar App](https://apps.apple.com/app/id1542643577)


[- Reefi App](https://apps.apple.com/app/id1594619585)

Examples on the Basic Plan

[- Host App](https://apps.apple.com/app/id1632184823)

Examples of Advanced Plan Apps with Custom Design & Development

- Lna Lhm Skkah

Skkah store was integrated into Lna Lhm Skkah to become two apps in one app.

[**iOS**](https://apps.apple.com/sa/app/%D9%84%D9%86%D8%A7-%D9%84%D9%87%D9%85-%D8%B5%D9%83%D8%A9-lna-lhm-skkah/id532250011)

[**Android**](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.nashratbaloot.app)

- Avon Cake
A completely different new design with additional custom development.

[**iOS**](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/id6502334880)

[**Android**](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.appsbunches.avoncake)

⸻

[**Book your session to see the app and its features**] (https://calendly.com/apps-appsbunches/30min)

⸻

How it works
	1.	Subscribe to the plan that suits you.
	2.	Activate the app from the top of the page.
	3.	You will receive an email to reset your password.
	4.	After resetting your password, log in and fill in the contact details form.
	5.	Fill the app development form through “Create App Request” in the Anaqeed Apps dashboard.
	6.	You will receive a demo version before publishing to the store.
	7.	After approval, the app will be published on your developer accounts.

Important note:

- The merchant must create a Company developer account on Apple / Google and provide us with the account details so we can publish the app.

If no developer account is available, Anaqeed Apps will publish the app under one of Anaqeed Apps sub-accounts for Apple only, free of charge (if it complies with Apple policies).

- Apps Bunches is committed to transferring the app to the merchant’s developer account at any time, free of charge.

- The app supports home page customization efficiently with (Al-Asayel Theme), in addition to ZID-developed themes. If a theme was developed specifically or by another provider, integration and adjustments must be handled by the theme developer to ensure the customization reflects correctly in the app.

[![1](https://www.appsbunches.net/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/App-Bunches-Zid.png)](https://www.zid.appsbunches.com/)
public_description:
Apps Bunches  | Your ###1 Technical Partner

Why has the app become a real growth engine?
Because the numbers prove the difference isn’t just UI… the app changes the game.

(Analytics results from stores using Apps Bunches app)

**• Revenue per user:** from about 2 SAR on web to about 49 SAR in the app (+23x).

**• Time spent:** from seconds to about 10 minutes in the app (+25x).

**• Pages per session:** from about 2 to +59 pages in the app (+23x).

**• Repeat purchase:** from less than 1% to about 19% in the app (+30x).

**• Conversion:** from 0.5% to 4.6% in the app (+8x).

The app doesn’t increase visits… the app creates customers.

Key Features (Apps Bunches app Dashboard)

**• Push Notifications:** Send + Schedule + To a Specific User + Images

**• Abandoned Carts:** View Member Carts + View Guest Carts (No Login)

**• Cart Recovery:** Automated Notifications (Basic/Advanced) + Custom Manual Notifications

**• Abandoned Cart Popup:** Smart Window to Boost Conversion

**• Promo Popup:** Offers/Coupons by Segment or Page

**• Favorites:** Enable Favorites Lists + Re-target Users

**• Promo Banner Bar:** Static/Moving Banners for Fast Promotion.

**• App Rights:** Control Identity & Rights by Plan

**• Change Splash:** Update the Splash Screen Easily

**• Categories Interface:** Control the Categories Page Design

**• Product Card:** Multiple Product Card Designs Across Different Screens

**• Analytics Integration:** Track User Behavior + Connect the App to Analytics Platforms

**• Order Status Notifications:** Automatic Alert on Every Order Status Update



Examples on the Advanced Plan

[- Sayyar App](https://apps.apple.com/app/id1542643577)


[- Reefi App](https://apps.apple.com/app/id1594619585)

Examples on the Basic Plan

[- Host App](https://apps.apple.com/app/id1632184823)

Examples of Advanced Plan Apps with Custom Design & Development

- Lna Lhm Skkah

Skkah store was integrated into Lna Lhm Skkah to become two apps in one app.

[**iOS**](https://apps.apple.com/sa/app/%D9%84%D9%86%D8%A7-%D9%84%D9%87%D9%85-%D8%B5%D9%83%D8%A9-lna-lhm-skkah/id532250011)

[**Android**](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.nashratbaloot.app)

- Avon Cake
A completely different new design with additional custom development.

[**iOS**](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/id6502334880)

[**Android**](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.appsbunches.avoncake)

⸻

[**Book your session to see the app and its features**] (https://calendly.com/apps-appsbunches/30min)

⸻

How it works
	1.	Subscribe to the plan that suits you.
	2.	Activate the app from the top of the page.
	3.	You will receive an email to reset your password.
	4.	After resetting your password, log in and fill in the contact details form.
	5.	Fill the app development form through “Create App Request” in the Anaqeed Apps dashboard.
	6.	You will receive a demo version before publishing to the store.
	7.	After approval, the app will be published on your developer accounts.

Important note:

- The merchant must create a Company developer account on Apple / Google and provide us with the account details so we can publish the app.

If no developer account is available, Anaqeed Apps will publish the app under one of Anaqeed Apps sub-accounts for Apple only, free of charge (if it complies with Apple policies).

- Apps Bunches is committed to transferring the app to the merchant’s developer account at any time, free of charge.

- The app supports home page customization efficiently with (Al-Asayel Theme), in addition to ZID-developed themes. If a theme was developed specifically or by another provider, integration and adjustments must be handled by the theme developer to ensure the customization reflects correctly in the app.

[![1](https://www.appsbunches.net/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/App-Bunches-Zid.png)](https://www.zid.appsbunches.com/)

name: Rewaa
short_description: Rewaa is a platform to manage sales, inventory, customers, suppliers, and issue E-invoices.
description:
A sales and inventory management system for shop owners, and enables the merchant to receive, manage and certify e-store orders from the branch. The system is automatically updated with sales and inventory in all sales outlets (whether the branch or the online store)


**Our Services**


**1.** **Product Management**

 Rewaa platform manages all the products of the stores created by Zid by enabling the publication of products in the online store and controlling their details.

**2.** **E-Order Management**

 Rawaa platform efficiently manages orders, by receiving orders from online stores and ensuring that the order can be made and the availability of the required quantities. After that, the status of the application is updated and sent to Zid through the Rawaa platform.

**3.** **Manage all sales channels from one place**

Rawaa platform helps store owners on Zid manage all their sales channels by synchronizing inventory, invoices, orders and customers between the online store and the branches.

**4.** **Inventory management and follow-up**

Avoid selling out of stock by standardizing inventory among all sales channels and automating quantity update between them.

**5.** **E-Billing**

Comply with the instructions of the Zakat, Tax and Customs Authority, issue your invoices electronically, and link with the accounting system to synchronize sales and purchase invoices.

**6.** **Supplier Management**

Start adding suppliers, make all purchase orders, and keep track of indebtedness due dates from one place.

**7.** **Unified Customer Experience**

Connect the sales channels and give the customer the option to choose the appropriate channel for him with the unification of his purchases and visits data among all channels.


**8.** **Stock Inventory**

You do not need to take inventory manually on a regular basis, Rawaa will complete all the counting operations automatically and smoothly.



 
**Integration Steps**


**1.**  Register your information on the Rawaa website


**2.** You will be contacted by the Rawaa team and an appointment will be set with you to connect your stock in Zed with Rawaa


**3.**  Disclaimer: The application will be activated through the Rawaa website [**to activate the application**](https://offer.rewaatech.com/rewaa-zid)



**The most common questions**


* **Who is Rawaa?**

Rawaa offers an integrated point of sale and inventory management program for your branches and is linked to your store in Zed and several other channels

	


* **What distinguishes Rawaa from other point of sale programs?**


The Rawaa program contains the basic features such as selling and issuing invoices to customers and accurate follow-up of inventory quantities. In addition to many advanced features such as deferred payment and collection for customers and suppliers, returning products and suspending the sales invoice and the ability to make discounts and offers on your products



* **Do you manage orders through the online store or through Rawaa?**


Your store requests in Zed appear in the Rawaa program and can be accepted and their status updated either through the Rawaa program or through your store in Zed


* **Is it possible to link the store to the branch without a clue?**


You can link your store in Zed to the branch without a clue


* **Can I offer the same product in my branches and in my store in Zed but at a different price?**


Yes, you can control the price in your store in Zed and in your branches, and you can make the prices different between the branch and your store in Zed

name: Tabby
short_description: enables your customers to shop now and divide the price of their purchases into 4 monthly payments without interest and without fees.
description:
<script>
	window.location.replace("https://web.zid.sa/market/integrations/tabby")
</script>

Tabby enables your customers to shop now and divide the value of their purchases into 4 monthly payments without interest. Tabby pays you directly for the purchases paid through Tabby, stimulate sales in your store, purchase completion rates and grow your store customer base

**Payment services:**

Divide it by 4: Enable your customers to shop today and divide the value of their purchases into 4 monthly payments without fees or interests.
 
 
**Our Clients:**

More than 3000 emerging brands and stores partner with Tabby to grow their business and gain a loyal customer base by giving them Tabby's easy and flexible online and in-store options. Such as Adidas, Ikea, Shein, Golden Scent.

Tabby currently provides its services in Saudi Arabia, United Arab Emirates, Kuwait and Bahrain.


**Support:**

Get integrated support from Tabby in all of the development, linkage, marketing and more to achieve your store growth goals. For More: Visit Tabby Support Center


**Integration Steps**

**1.** Sign up with [**Tabby for business**](https://merchant.tabby.ai/registration?source=zid&lang=ar)

**2.** The electronic contract will be sent via e-mail.

**3.** Complete the linking process using the API codes sent to your email from Tabby with ease on your Zed store.

**4.** Use the[**Tabby Marketing**](https://www.notion.so/tabby/b280cbefa6024a068fa974111d26c589) to inform your customers about payment options with Tabby to support your store sales.

**5.** Get the advantage of paying for your store in advance from Tabby. We take care of the other details

name: متصل بوت للواتس اب
short_description: Always stay connected with your clients with 3x faster response time with WhatsApp Business API
description:
Mottasl uses WhatsApp to simplify customer communication with brands. Client feedback can now be collected by businesses' support agents, teams, or AI-powered bots. Businesses can integrate their CRM systems, gather customer interest, and send marketing broadcasts to with a unified  WhatsApp number.

**Our Services**

**1-** **Targeting Abandoned Cart via WhatsApp**

Increase your sales by targeting abandoned Carts automatically via Zid. Target unlimited number of customers who haven’t completed their purchase, without worrying about your number getting blocked. 

Find out why it's important to integrate your zid store with WhatsApp:[**here**](https://bit.ly/3tL5AKY)

![](https://s3.me-south-1.amazonaws.com/mottasl.cdn/twerlo/1.png)

**2-** **Track orders via WhatsApp**

Provide your customers with automated service to track their orders directly via WhatsApp.  A fully automated system is available 24x7.
You can retain your existing customers by sending updates on WhatsApp [**here**](https://bit.ly/3tL5AKY)

![](https://s3.me-south-1.amazonaws.com/mottasl.cdn/twerlo/3.png)

**3-** **Send automated notifications in various media from your store WhatsApp number to your customers**


Learn the best ways to serve your customers on WhatsApp: [**here**](https://bit.ly/3Eu4fgs)

![](https://s3.me-south-1.amazonaws.com/mottasl.cdn/twerlo/2.png)

**4-** **Broadcast Message for WhatsApp**

Create custom offers and send broadcast campaigns to your customers on WhatsApp! 
Monitor and optimize campaign performance through Broadcast Analytics Metrics such as ‘Delivery rate, Read Rate, Response rate, Click through rate, and Conversion rate.

These campaigns are enabled via pre-approved template messages: [**here**](https://bit.ly/3ENt7Bo)

**5-** **An automated answering Chatbot for your store’s WhatsApp number**

Mottasl app includes a chatbot that comes integrated on your store’s WhatsApp number. The ability to add interactive buttons to facilitate a quick response to customers makes it the first of its kind in the Middle East. 

Offering interactive menu messages via WhatsApp : [**here**](https://bit.ly/3Oohzrg)

**6-** **Mobile Application**

A central hub for all your WhatsApp communication. 
Sales, Marketing and Customer Support from a single WhatsApp number. That's the magic of Mottasl
Mottasl is now available on Apple Store and Playstore.

Download a Mottasl app from here: [**Android**](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.mottasl.app.prod&pli=1), [**iOS**](https://apps.apple.com/ae/app/mottasl-%D9%85%D8%AA%D8%B5%D9%84/id1636843975)


**7-** **Unified WhatsApp Number**

Engage your visitors, get their attention and move them along. This is possible through a single Unified WhatsApp number, where multiple agents can log in and communicate with your visitors through one single Whatsapp Number! 

Raise the quality of your customer's experience: [**here**](https://bit.ly/3EQhJog)


**Integration Steps**

**1.** Choose the right Plan for you

**2.** Activate the app from Zid App Market

**3.** Integration will be done directly


**Important note:** 

The WhatsApp Business API will need to be activated from the Zid store with the help of a service provider, such the as Mottasl platform.
Our platform offers great discounts to Zid merchants and is available to assist you in activating the integrating application from the Zid store.

WhatsApp us now To find out about the latest offers : [**here**](https://bit.ly/3zyKoIN)

name: Morasalaty Whatsapp
short_description: WhatsApp services as tracking, order status, abandoned carts, vouchers, product evaluation, more ...
description:
**Our Mission**
We believe in the importance of interactive communication with customers. From the simplest to the most profound. Building your own chatbot will enable you to reach your customers, generate more revenue, save time and staff through **Maraslaty** platform, interact directly with them, and expand your business.  

**Platform Services**

**- **Smart Chatbot Tree**  
: Introducing the customer to the business or products through easy interactive menus (unlimited menus)  

**- **Chatbot Advisor**  
: Analyzing your customers’ data and their interest in products and services through their conversations with the bot  

**- **Customer Service Platform**  
: Live chats with customers through the team and the possibility of automated surveys to evaluate the service  

**- **Interactive Services**  
: Receiving orders and services from customers via WhatsApp and transferring them to the client’s system  

**- **Interactive and Marketing Messages**  
: Notifying customers with interactive messages containing their data, ads, and marketing campaigns  

**E-Commerce Services**

**- **Order Tracking** :  
Tracking customer orders from the chatbot, viewing shipping details, and tracking link with the shipping company  

**- **Abandoned Carts** :  
Interactive messages to notify the customer of the abandoned cart, increasing the chance of recovery up to 30%  

**- **Order Confirmation and Cancellation (Cash on Delivery)** :  
Message to the customer to confirm or cancel the order before preparation begins  

**- **Returns and Exchanges** :  
Automating the process of returns and exchanges via WhatsApp easily, with documentation of all steps  

**- **Update Orders information**  
: Customer requests edits directly from the chatbot, such as updating phone number or shipping address or location

**- **Auto Order Cancellation** :  
Customer cancels orders directly via chatbot easily  

**- **Order Status Alerts** :  
Notify order status (New, Processing, Ready, Out for Delivery, etc.)  

**- **Product Reviews from Customers**  
: Message after order or shipment delivery for product review on the store or WhatsApp  

**- **Customer Coupons** :  
Scheduling promotional and marketing messages with coupons for both old and new customers  
**- **Product Reminders** :  
Automatically reminding customers about products when available on the store via WhatsApp message  

**- **Gift Message** :  
Notify gifted customers with a WhatsApp message containing an image or video with the gift message  

**- **Sending Invoices** :  
Send invoices to customers via WhatsApp, no need to print or send as SMS link  

**- **Complaints and Suggestions** :  
Automating complaints and suggestions from customers, with documentation of all process stages  

**Pricing Method**  

**- Setup fee (**one-time payment**)  
**- Setup and business verification fee (**included**)  
**- API integration fee (**included**)  
**- You can recharge additional CRM and promo packages  

**How to Subscribe**  

**1.** Choose the suitable plan from app page  
**2.** Install Morasalaty app on your store  
**3.** Integration will be immediate on our dashboard  
**4.** Register your phone number for contact on **Morasalaty** website  
**5.** Morasalaty team will contact you within 1-2 business days  

**Other social media channels have separate packages**

Message to the customer to confirm or cancel the order before preparation begins  

**- **Returns and Exchanges** :  
Automating the process of returns and exchanges via WhatsApp easily, with documentation of all steps  

**- **Update Orders information**  
: Customer requests edits directly from the chatbot, such as updating phone number or shipping address or location

**- **Auto Order Cancellation** :  
Customer cancels orders directly via chatbot easily  

**- **Order Status Alerts** :  
Notify order status (New, Processing, Ready, Out for Delivery, etc.)  

**- **Product Reviews from Customers**  
: Message after order or shipment delivery for product review on the store or WhatsApp  

**- **Customer Coupons** :  
Scheduling promotional and marketing messages with coupons for both old and new customers  
**- **Product Reminders** :  
Automatically reminding customers about products when available on the store via WhatsApp message  

**- **Gift Message** :  
Notify gifted customers with a WhatsApp message containing an image or video with the gift message  

**- **Sending Invoices** :  
Send invoices to customers via WhatsApp, no need to print or send as SMS link  

**- **Complaints and Suggestions** :  
Automating complaints and suggestions from customers, with documentation of all process stages  

**Pricing Method**  

**- Setup fee (**one-time payment**)  
**- Setup and business verification fee (**included**)  
**- API integration fee (**included**)  
**- You can recharge additional CRM and promo packages  

**How to Subscribe**  

**1.** Choose the suitable plan from app page  
**2.** Install Morasalaty app on your store  
**3.** Integration will be immediate on our dashboard  
**4.** Register your phone number for contact on **Morasalaty** website  
**5.** Morasalaty team will contact you within 1-2 business days  

**Other social media channels have separate packages**

name: Karzoun
developer_name: Karzoun Media Marketing And Digital Services LLC
short_description: Send automatic new orders and abandoned cart notifications + review requests and increase your sales
description:
**Karzoun Application: Revolutionizing WhatsApp Business Tools**

Karzoun, one of the most renowned applications specialized in WhatsApp tools, is known for its extensive popularity. The Karzoun application offers a comprehensive package of essential features related to organization, cost-efficiency, automation, and enhancing the quality of e-commerce operations on the Zad platform through the use of WhatsApp.

**Key Features of Karzoun Application:**

**-** Target abandoned shopping carts with messages or multiple messages based on specific time intervals.

**-** Send notifications to store employees when a new order is created.

**-** Send notifications to customers when a new order is created.

**-** Notify customers when the order status is updated.

**-** Send order confirmation messages upon payment upon delivery.

**-** Welcome messages for new customers registering in the store.

**-** Request customer reviews after a specific timeframe post-order execution, delivery, or shipment.

**-** Deliver digital products (Karzoun is a digital store's best friend, offering exclusive benefits).

**-** Customize automated messages based on the products within the order.

**-** Launch marketing campaigns.

**-** Enable auto-reply to handle recurring customer inquiries.

**-** API for custom integrations and various programming needs.

**Business Package:**

Includes all the essential features of the application, plus an advanced package tailored for medium and large stores with higher requirements, aimed at enhancing the customer experience in customer service.

**-** A dedicated interface for managing customer conversations with an integrated system for customer service team management and employee management.

**-** Building an intelligent and advanced automated response robot tailored to business requirements. The auto-reply can provide customers with order details and send tracking links, among other functions.

**-** 5 independent employee accounts to monitor employee work, collect performance reports, coordinate, and transfer conversations among them.

**-** Ability to integrate the customer service interface with WhatsApp (personal/business/business API), Facebook, Instagram, emails, Telegram, and live chat on the store's website.

- Automatic confirmation of payment upon receipt in the store, activated within 5 working days.

- Mobile application (iPhone & Android) for viewing customer messages and responding in text.

**Integration Process:**

**1.** Subscribe to the suitable package for your needs.

**2.** Click on the "Activate Application" button.

**3.** Grant the necessary permissions and install the application.

**4.** You will receive a WhatsApp message and an email with account information and activation instructions.

**5.** To integrate using personal/business WhatsApp: Open your WhatsApp on your phone, click on "Linked Devices," then click on "Link a Device," and scan the QR code found on the Karzoun platform's New WhatsApp Number Linking page after installing the application.

**6.** To integrate using WhatsApp Business API: Contact customer support to provide you with the necessary API integration details, or send access permission from your Business Manager's account to the email support@karzoun.com.

Karzoun does not charge fees for the number of outgoing or incoming messages, regardless of the type of WhatsApp used. However, if you use verified WhatsApp, you may be required to pay monthly conversation fees to WhatsApp if you exceed the free conversation limit, which is 1000 conversations per month.
plan_offer: Subscribe for 6 months and get 3 months for free

name: VOHO
short_description: A cloud-based customer care and call center platform that provides customer contact management services
description:
There will be no need to create an expensive call center from scratch, as the facility can get through the VOHO platform to get the customer care service with its full features.


**Our Services**

 **-Direct Connection with your Zid Store**

**-** Retrieve customer (caller) information directly.

**-** Retrieve the order information of the customer directly connected.


 **-Customers service**

**-** Cloud-based automated call distribution.

**-** Run your own call center anywhere and anytime.

**-** Real-time dashboard.

**-** Standard Case Management Module.

**-** Reporting portal.


**-Contact Center**

**-** Manage call center operations via the cloud with flexible packages.

**-** Unified number "9200".

**-** Real-time dashboard.

**-** Convert and change the voice message.

**-** Queue for calls.

**-**  Call Recording.
 
**-Telephone marketing**

**-** Interactive outgoing voice notification services for cloud calls.

**-** IVR streaming.

**-** Upload contacts.

**-** Upload audio files.

**-** Real-time dashboard.

**-** Determine the range.

**common questions:**

**-** **Can I add extra minutes when I finish my class?**

Yes, you can add minutes at any time based on the number of calls you receive

**-** **Can I see my customer information when I call my 9200?**

Yes, all your customer details will be visible on the platform once the customer calls 9200 and the agent answers the call.

**-** **Can I retrieve my caller data at any time?**

Yes, you can export all existing data for further analysis.


**Integration Steps**

**1.** Choose the right Plan for you

**2.** Activate the app from Zid App Market

**3.** Integration will be done directly

name: Kashaf Lableb
short_description: Expand your e-commerce business and increase your sales through Kashaf AI-powered search service
description:
**About Kashaf Lableb**
Expand your e-commerce business and increase your sales through the Kashaf AI-powered search service on your store. Kashaf is an intelligent search system that enables your users to efficiently, accurately, and quickly access the products they are looking for through the search box. This ensures that your customers reach all your products regardless of the keywords they use in their search and the mistakes they may make.


**Our Features**

**Effective search:**

Display your products that your users are searching for and make them interact with your platform according to your own criteria.

**Search suggestions:** 

Guide users to what they are looking for before they finish typing.


**Spelling correction:**

The smart search understands users even with typographical or spelling errors.

**Filters search:**

Allow users to filter search results based on characteristics such as date, price, type, brand, content type, etc.

**Analytics and statistics:**

You can know what products users are searching for and build your marketing strategy based on Kashaf's provided analytics.

**Integration Steps**

**1.** Choose the package on Zid App Market

**2.** Activate the App

**3.** Activation is done

**4.** You can access Kashaf's dashboard to view the analytics.

**2.** **Express**

Enjoy in creating international shipments across the world using Nitros, now you can sell anywhere in the world and ship in the lowest shipping rate in partnership with shipment carriers.

You can schedule the pickup of your shipment from your home or office at any date and time convenient to you in one click. short_description: Improve and measure the effectiveness of advertising campaigns for your store visitors on facebook and instagram
description:
**The application is available for Growth, Professional and Enterprise Plan only**


This App allows you to improve the accuracy of the readings of your ads by understanding the actions people take on your store such as adding an item to a shopping cart or making a purchase


**Requirements**

To activate the Meta Pixel app [**here**](https://web.zid.sa/market/app/29)


**Integration Steps**


**1.** Go to Event Manager.

**2.** Click on the Datasheet view icon on the right top of the page.


**3.** Select The pixel ID you chose to associate with the Transformations API.

**4.** Click on SMTP. 


**5** Find API integration and click Complete Setup.



**Note**:

If you can't find the option of API integration,  it may be because the Transformations API integration is set up through the developer documentation and not the setup with instructions from the event manager.To set up Transformations API integration with Guided Setup, first create your own personalized instructions using the steps in Part One.


**6.** In the Transformations API, read the resources at learn More If you want to get additional information about the Transformations API before getting started.

**7.**  Click on verification codes. Copy your code.


**8.**  In the "Facebook Conversion API" application, paste the code in the "Your Account ID" field and press the activate button

name: Prexle
short_description: A cloud cashier system designed specifically to meet the needs of the retail sector in sales operations and warehouse management
description:
A cloud cashier system designed specifically to meet the needs of the retail sector in sales operations and warehouse management in order to achieve business goals smoothly and safely wherever you are.


**Our Services**

**-** Branch Management

**-** Staff commissions

**-** Supplier Management

**-** Customer Loyalty

**-** Reports

**-** Export invoices

**Our Features**


**-** **Prexle system is divided into two interfaces:**


**1.** **Main Control Panel:**

 Via the control panel: You can adjust settings, customize the system, add branches, inventory and products, and view reports.
 
**2.** **Tablet App:**

 Through the tablet application: Through it, you can see the user interface that is in the store, and create sales operations. The system works on all available systems, whether they are iOS or Android tablets.
We developed Prexle to help you increase sales through systems that speed up the customer’s journey inside the store and control inventory, Prexle provides access to approximately 15 detailed reports, and you can view and export all tax reports for the store owner according to the requirements of the General Authority of Zakat and Income and government agencies.

We guarantee customers training on the system and technical support, and the Prexle system guarantees the continuity of your store operations even when the Internet connection is interrupted.



**Notes**

**-** Ensure that the information entered in the system is correct because it will be reflected on the bills

**-** The control panel is used by owners or administrators to adjust system settings and monitor performance directly

**-** After setting the tax from the price list, it must be activated by adding it to the branch.

**Integration Steps**

**1.** Choose the right Plan for you

**2.** Activate the app from Zid App Market

**3.** Integration will be done directly

name: Drdsh
short_description: Drdsh brings you closer to your customers and help you in customer support
description:
Having more than one way to communicate with customers is stressful for both customers and support staff. So we decided to make the communication process more organized by issuing Live Chat, an application for your site that allows customers to communicate with customer service immediately without having to wait for an email response, and also reduces the costs of calling by phone.

Live chat is designed to meet the needs of all companies, regardless of their size or field of work, in an easy way. Our goal is to strengthen the customer relationship with you and double the size of your business



**Our Features**

**-** Ready-to-use templates for your Zed store

**-**  The ability to track the status of orders directly from your store in Zed and send the status back to the customer without manual intervention

**-**  Conversational Tools

**-**  Customer Engagement

**-**  Provide statistics and reports

**-**  Personalization


**Integration Steps**

**1.** Choose the right Plan for you

**2.** Activate the app from the Zid App Store

**3.** Integration will be done directly

name: Contact Us All in one
short_description: Make it easier than ever for customers to get in touch with you.
description:
Most of your potential customers use WhatsApp, Facebook Messenger, iMessage or Telegram chatting platforms. It's time to give them the option to communicate with you in a way that feels familiar, trustworthy, and fun. Get back in touch with your customers faster

 When customers have a question about your products, they are more likely to leave your site altogether instead of looking for an email to the support team. With so many options, people are too busy to spend time searching for answers. But when you give them the option to easily contact you via a more convenient system right in your store.

 No more responses getting lost in your inbox with hundreds of emails! Customize the user experience and choose whether you want to have only one contact person or multiple team members - all team members can be added. Additionally, you can select different types of designs for the call button itself, including animation, on-screen location, its overall style, and more.
 
 
 **Integration Steps**

**1.** Choose the right Plan for you

**2.** Activate the app from Zid App Market

**3.** Integration will be done directly
 
 **Note**
 
 Icon may appeared 10-15 min

Let's make it easier for your customers to contact you with Telegram Contact Us. Most of your prospective customers are already using Telegram. It's time to give them the option to contact you in a way that feels familiar, trustworthy, and fun.


**Get back to your customers faster in a way they enjoy**

When someone has a question about your  business, chances are they’re just going to leave your site altogether rather than searching for a support email. With so many options out there, people are too busy to spend time looking for answers. But when you give them the option to easily contact you via Telegram right from your website, this feels like a quicker, more familiar way to get in touch. You can get back to them just a few hours later and they will get your reply directly to their mobile device. No more replies getting lost in an inbox with (probably) hundreds of emails.


Customers must have Telegram account in order to contact you



**Integration Steps**

**1.** Choose the right Plan for you

**2.** Activate the app from Zid App Market

**3.** Integration will be done directly

name: NeraChat WhatsApp Bot
short_description: Increase your sales by communicating with your customers professionally using the WhatsApp bot.
description:
NeraChat supports you in increasing your sales and profits by communicating with your customers in a professional manner using a bot that automatically sends notifications of orders and baskets left through the WhatsApp communication program.

The program allows you to automatically communicate with your customers, which contributes to saving your customers and reminding them of your actual presence to support them or remind them of the store and their abandoned baskets, which supports providing greater sales opportunities and more profits for you and increasing the satisfaction of your customers.

Sending a WhatsApp message to your customers means that you care about their satisfaction and increases the chances of them coming back for repeat purchases from your store.


**What are the most important features of NeraChat?**

**-** **Sending automatic notification messages to customers for abandoned carts according to a period of time specified by you**

**-** **Send automatic messages to each customer who rates your store**

**-** **Link any WhatsApp account to send automatic messages**

**-** **Easy installation method and clear settings**

**-** **There is no need for your phone to be connected to the Internet for the program to work**

**-** **Send a welcome message to the newly registered customer in your store**

**-** **Sending messages to the customer with new requests and their details**

**-** **Send messages to the customer when the status of the order is updated**

**-** **The ability to activate or disable notifications in an easy way for each type**

**-** **Fully free to change the wording or template of the message for each type of notice**

**-** **Payment confirmation notification on receipt**

**-** **The ability to send a service evaluation request message to the customer**

**-** **Supporting variables within messages, for example: {customer name}, {order number}, {order status}, {order value}, {currency}, {order information link}**

**-** **Support for sending WhatsApp group messages (through the NeraChat platform)**

**-** **The ability to activate the automated response to WhatsApp messages (through the NeraChat platform)**

**-** **Continuous technical support throughout the day**


Always remember that you are our first concern and we always strive for your satisfaction, and if you have any comments, inquiries or suggestions, do not hesitate to contact us.



**Integration Steps**

**1.** Choose the right Plan for you

**2.** Activate the app from Zid App Market

**3.** Integration will be done directly!

name: Daftra from fai
short_description: Link your store with the most accounting system through FaiSync and enjoy automating all your data!
description:
**Link your store with Daftra:**
Activate linking your online store with Daftra using the Fai Sync tool. 
With us you can automate data collection and automatically sync sales and inventory. By using Fai Sync, which specializes in connectivity, you will be able to facilitate and automate processes, eliminate manual errors, and save time and effort in processing and relaying processes so that you can focus on increasing your sales.

If you are subject to Phase 2 of electronic invoicing, feel free to contact us anytime for assistance in smoothly transitioning to this phase and fully leveraging the capabilities of the "Fi" system to support and ensure your compliance with regulations and requirements.


**What are the advantages link Your online store?**
* Migration: Requests are automatically migrated, with the ability to specify the periods to be migrated.
* Request Status: Ability to specify the status of the request to be migrated.
* Inventory: Quantities are migrated from your store to your accounting system.
* Integration: FaiSync allows you to link multiple stores to a single accounting system.
* Ease of Use: Easy-to-use interface for accountants to follow up on operations and reconcile accounts.
* 24/7 Support: Technical support available 24/7.

**What do you need to get started?**
* An active account on the Zid platform
*  An active account on the Fai system
* An active account in the Daftra system
The activation process is easy and will not take you more than a few minutes, and if you need help with this step, we are fully prepared to provide full support.

**Linkage mechanism: **
* Choose the package that suits you and install the application
* Copy the API key from the General Settings page of your account in Daftra.
* Activate Fai Sync application from your Zid store and log in to the application.
* Paste the key into the designated place in Fai Sync control panel.
* You will then be able to select customization of automation and connectivity.
* It will be linked directly!

name: Odoo Connector.
short_description: Connect the Odoo system with the Zid store in an integrated manner
description:
Odoo is an open-source Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) system that provides integrated solutions for business management, including modules such as sales, purchases, inventory, accounting, electronic management, and more.

It is easy to link Odoo with your online store on Zid platform, where Odoo can receive orders submitted from the e-commerce store and handle them automatically.

When Odoo is linked with your online store, orders are automatically transferred to the sales, finance, and inventory systems in Odoo, where they are stored and their execution stages are accurately monitored. This enables companies to efficiently manage their inventory and monitor profits and losses.

Overall, Odoo allows companies to improve business management, unify data and information, and save time and effort in dealing with daily operations, making it easier for companies to grow and achieve success in their business.



**Integration steps**

**1.** Choose the appropriate package.

**2.** Click on the activation button.

**3.** Agree to the permissions and install the application.

**4.** Plustech team will contact you to activate the integration on your Odoo account.

**5.** The integration will be established directly.

**Note:**

The package includes only the integration and does not include the subscription fees for Odoo software.

name: sahelbooks
short_description: Simplified accounting software designed for Small and micro-owners and self-employed
description:
**Simplified Accounting Software Designed for You ###### **


**Our Services**

**-** **Manage transactions**

You don't need to be an expert to manage your transactions, SahelBooks designed for small and micro businesses by an advanced UI designed for you.



**-** **Instant Reporting**

Check your financial position by customized and filtered reports with income statement and balance sheet report.


**-** **Track your inventory**

Track your inventory and update your quantity after e-sales



**-** **Create An Invoice In Less Than A Minute**

Use one of our professional invoice templates to help your invoice stand out. Make your own touch. Want more freedom with your invoices? Create your own unique style and brand of invoice from scratch. Your business reflects your brand Add your own custom logo to your invoice templates and boost your brand recognition in the process.


**Our Features**

**-** **Special solution to manage your invoices**

Reduce the time instead of using excel sheets or manual invoices as in the past, an easy tool enables you to customize your invoice with whatever information you want anytime.



**-** **Professionality**

name: Selluseller
short_description: The Anchanto OM- Zid connector.
description:
The Anchanto OM- Zid connector enables merchants to connect only Zid with Anchanto OM system and use the integration for managing orders, inventory, products, catalogues, and product prices.
Zid integration with Anchanto OM supports below features:

**Flow from Zid to Anchanto OM:**

• Historic & new Product Fetch
• Historic & new Order Fetch
• Fetching shipping label, tracking number

**Flow from Anchanto OM to Zid:**

• List and update products from Anchanto OM to Zid
• Manage and update inventory from Anchanto OMS to Zid

**Steps to Integrate:**
1. Request for signup from the [link](https://app.selluseller.com/sign-up) 
2. Enter details and our sales team will connect with you and share the integration details.
3. For API credentials, you can get the details from Settings> API Integrations from Zid store.

short_description: “Buy Now, Pay Later” by Emkan – A Payment Solution to Boost Your Sales
description:
<script>
window.location.replace("https://web.zid.sa/market/integrations/emkan-pay")
</script>Emkan, a subsidiary of Al Rajhi Bank, offers the Sharia-compliant "Pay Later" service, which provides a higher number of installments, increasing your sales by up to 25% compared to other service providers. This is achieved by allowing your customers to split their purchases into 5 equal installments at cash price, enhancing their purchasing power and increasing their cart value effortlessly!
Boost your sales and encourage your customers by allowing them to split their bills into 5 installments with the "Pay Later" service from Emkan—a secure payment option for your store.

* Enhance customers' purchasing power through a flexible and easy payment option.
* ِEmkan absorbs the risk associated with customer payments.
* Collaborative marketing support through social media and advertising campaigns.

name: Taager
short_description:
Transform your e-commerce journey into a breeze with Taager
Just subscribe to one of Zid's paid packages to enjoy all the features.
description:
✨ Get to know the Taager App

Do you want to start your e-commerce business and make profits? Taager App gives you the opportunity to start your business from home without the need to buy products, store them, handle shipping, or manage customer service. The app provides all these services for you.

**✨ What does the app offer you?**

**-** The app allows you to connect your store to your Taager account to facilitate the process of importing products and automatically recording orders quickly.

**-** It is compatible for operating in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.

**-** It enables you to import categories.

**-** Import products by name or code.

**-** Import all product details such as descriptions, images, specifications, and 

**-** suggested prices.

**-** Instant synchronization of your orders from your website to your Taager account for confirmation and shipment to the customer.

**-** Learn the secrets of e-commerce and marketing.

**-** Easily collect your profits through your bank account.

**-** Assistance in determining appropriate market prices.

**Activation steps**

**1.** Choose the suited plan for you

**2.** Click on App activation button

**3.** Approve permission and install App 

**4.** If you are an existing Taager customer, simply log in with your account, and the linking process will be activated.

**5.** If this is your first time, create an account with your details, and it will be registered and linked to the Taager website.

UPP is a cost-effective web-based rewards solution with pre-built features that can be fully customized to the needs of your brand and launched in no time; brought to you by Related; the award-winning loyalty experts who strive to empower small businesses in the region.

name: KeyTimeZid
short_description: The system sends WhatsApp messages for abandoned carts and completed orders to boost sales.
description:
This system provides a comprehensive and efficient solution for communicating with customers via WhatsApp messages, helping you monitor completed orders and abandoned carts in an organized and consistent manner. Through this service, you can encourage customers to complete their purchases and strengthen your communication with them in an easy and fast way.

Upon first installing the application, the login credentials to the system are displayed immediately, allowing you to get started quickly. You can easily modify the login details later from within the control panel to ensure secure and flexible access. Once logged in, a clear and detailed list of completed orders and abandoned carts is displayed, with search and filtering options to facilitate management.

The system allows you to select any order from the list to send a personalized WhatsApp message directly to the customer, whether to remind them of an abandoned cart or to notify them about the status of a completed order. This enhances the chances of recovering lost sales and increases customer satisfaction. All these operations are performed smoothly through a simple user interface, making customer communication management effective and fast without extra effort.

**Integration Steps:**
Choose the plan that best suits your needs

Activate the app with a single click

Integration completed – you can now start using the app with ease

name: ReturnPlus
short_description: Helps manage returns from customer request to receipt, increasing awareness of customer behavior.
description:
A versatile tool designed to simplify the returns management process

🖥️ User-Friendly Interface: The plugin offers a user-friendly interface that simplifies the return process for customers. It provides a clear and intuitive return request form, guiding customers through the necessary steps to initiate a return.

.
✅ Automated Return Authorization: Upon receiving a return request, the plugin automatically verifies the eligibility of the return based on predefined rules set by the merchant. It validates factors such as return timeframe, product condition, and reason for return, ensuring that only eligible returns are authorized.


.
📝 Customizable Return Policies: The Return Plugin allows merchants to create and enforce their own return policies. Merchants can define specific conditions, such as return timeframes, restocking fees, and refund options, providing flexibility to adapt the return process according to their business needs.

.
📊 Trackable Return Status: Both merchants and customers can easily track the status of returns through the plugin. Merchants have access to a comprehensive dashboard that provides real-time updates on the return progress, enabling them to efficiently manage returns and provide timely customer support.

.
💌 Automated Communication: The plugin automates communication between the merchant and the customer throughout the return process. It sends email notifications to customers at each stage, including return authorization, shipping instructions, and refund updates, ensuring transparency and keeping customers informed.

name: TikTok conversion API
short_description: Improve and measure the effectiveness of advertising campaigns for your store visitors
description:
**The application is available for Growth, Professional and Enterprise Plan only**

This App allows you to improve the accuracy of the readings of your ads by understanding the actions people take on your store such as adding an item to a shopping cart or making a purchase


**Requirements:**

  Activate the Snapchat Pixel app from [**here**](https://web.zid.sa/market/app/35)

**Integration Steps:**

**1.** In the TikTok Ads Manager, go to Assets > Events, and click Manage in the Web Events section.

**2.** On the Settings tab, click Generate Access Token. The token will be generated instantly. You can then copy the access token and start making API requests.


**3.** Through the "TikTok conversion API" application, paste the code in the "Your account ID" field and press the activation button
