name: PopAutomate
short_description: Popautomate empowers merchants to schedule offers, adjust product prices, and manage products.
description:
PopAutomate: Automate and Schedule Product Changes for Your Zid Store
Manage an unlimited number of products effortlessly—schedule discounts, toggle visibility, and update categories automatically.

Automate everything: Discounts that start and end on their own, scheduled price changes, products that publish or unpublish themselves, and items that move in or out of "Sale" sections—all from one dashboard and applied to any number of products at once.

Why is PopAutomate your ultimate solution on Zid?
✨ The solution that saves you time and boosts sales with zero margin for error:

Never miss a beat:
Ensure your prices change exactly when an influencer campaign or paid ad goes live.
Eliminate complaints:
No more customers complaining about "expired" discounts that are still visible.
Scale your effort:
Don't waste hours manually editing hundreds or thousands of products before peak seasons.
How does PopAutomate save your time?
Manual edits, human error, and post-sale complaints drain your energy. PopAutomate lets you set everything up in advance and leaves the execution to the app. Save your time for what really matters: Marketing and Sales.



What PopAutomate Offers You:
🗓️ Schedule Offers & Discounts Whether it’s an influencer campaign, paid ads, or major seasons (National Day, White Friday, etc.), PopAutomate lets you:

Pre-set start and end dates for any offer.
Ensure discounts activate and deactivate automatically.
Reduce errors and "offer still visible" complaints.
💰 Scheduled Price Updates Instead of manually editing prices for thousands of items, set your price changes on a schedule (before, during, or after a campaign). Perfect for tiered pricing strategies or flash sales.

👀 Scheduled Product Visibility Control seasonal products or limited-time launches:

"Show Product"
exactly at launch time.
"Hide Product"
automatically once a campaign ends or stock runs out.
🏷️ Scheduled Category Management Organizing your "Sale" section is now easier. Automatically add or remove products from specific categories or sections at specific times—no more manual sorting.

📊 Bulk Updates via Excel or Product Picker Have a massive inventory? Prepare your offers in an Excel sheet and upload them to apply discounts across your entire store in seconds. Perfect for major seasonal clearances.



Real Success Stories from PopAutomate Users:
Funky Monkey:
Automates recurring "Tuesday Offers" every week.
Performance Experts:
Applied a 20% store-wide discount with precise start and end times.
Aziz Store:
Set fixed-price offers by brand (e.g., all Adidas items for 270 SAR, all Puma for 220 SAR).
Majeedka Store:
Managed store-wide National Day discounts and price updates seamlessly.
Honey Nectar:
Used Excel sheets to apply bulk discounts to specific product lines.
Yafco Tires:
Updated weights for over 250 products instantly using a single Excel sheet.
Don’t let "forgetting" cost you sales. If you are spending money on ads and campaigns, don't let a manual error ruin your ROI. Activate PopAutomate today and let your offers run themselves—precisely and on time.

Change product prices
Stay ahead of the competition by making real-time adjustments to your pricing strategy.

name: Tajadad
short_description: Tajadad enables you to create a mobile app for your store in 10m without tech experience using AI
description:
"Tajadad" allows you to create a mobile app for your online store in 10 minutes without any technical experience, offering full customization and interactive elements for product display. It provides various themes and enables easy updates via the control panel. Connect with your customers through instant notifications to boost sales and enhance engagement.

.
--------
.

**Our features:**

**-** Ability to design the application with full customization by moving elements.

**-** Option to choose a ready-made theme or create your own theme.

**-** A mobile application dedicated to your store with your own identity.

**-** **Continuous support with updates for the application**.

Regular updates to your application for free to ensure compatibility with device updates.

**-** Update your application anytime directly from the control panel without the need for any technical expertise or additional steps.

**-** **Instant notification system within the application**.

 Ability to directly link notifications to products or sections, notifications for abandoned carts, occasions, offers, discounts, and new products.

**-** Interactive elements to display your products in different formats, such as interactive stories, custom pages, horizontal and vertical product displays, pop-up windows, animated section bar, and countdown timer for offers.

**-** Integration with marketing and analytics tools to track the performance of your customers and advertising campaigns on the application.

.
--------
.


**Activation process**:

**1.**  Subscribe to the appropriate package for your needs.

**2.** Click the activation button for the application.

**3.** Grant the necessary permissions and install the application.

**4.** You will be directed to your control panel on Tajdeed.

**5.** Set up and preview your application.

**6.** Request publication.

**7.** The request will be reviewed, and the application will be published.

name: switchpro
short_description: Process your store's data and move it smoothly and securely to Zid
description:
Move your store to Zid with a single click! With our Switch Pro service, we can efficiently process Excel files and transfer store data between e-commerce platforms, enabling us to set up your new store quickly and smoothly.

**Our Features:**

**-** **Transfer store data from other platforms (products and customers):** 
Move your customer and product data from your stores on Salla, Shopify, and Makani to Zid using our advanced API and Excel Sheet files.

**-** **Ensure the security of your information and store data:** 
Your data will be transferred professionally and with complete confidentiality.

**-** **Fast technical support and free consultation sessions:** 
You can reach us anytime via WhatsApp, official email, or through our website. We provide free consultations with our experts to address any inquiries you may have.

**Note: If the customer requests a redesign of the store interface, it will be at a separate cost in addition to the store transfer to Zid cost.**

**How long does it take to transfer the store?**
At most, transferring the store from your current platform to Zid takes 7 business days after we receive the data.

**Do you have more than 3500 monthly orders?**
Contact us through the link to provide you with special privileges from Zid.

**Activation steps**

**1.** Choose the right plan for you

**2.** Activate the app

**3.** Fill out the form and attach the required documents

**4.** Service provider's team will contact you to finilize the needed steps.

name: Linker
short_description: Seamless Pricing, order and stock management while integrating ERP systems.
description:
Boost your Zid e-commerce platform with Linker, designed for streamlined pricing, order and inventory management, ensuring a seamless and efficient operation.
**Key Features & Benefits:**
* **Order Processing:** Centralize your order management with Linker. Oversee every stage from order receipt to dispatch with accuracy, providing your customers with a dependable and consistent shopping experience that fosters loyalty.
* **Product Stock Management**: Optimize your stock levels with Linker in real- time. Our system refines stock adjustments for products, preventing overselling and stockouts for efficient inventory control.
* **Dynamic Pricing and Promotions:** This feature combines real-time price optimization, discount management, and inventory-linked pricing adjustments. It enables businesses to dynamically adjust prices based on market demand, and stock levels for effective pricing strategies.
* **ERP Integration:** Connect with your existing ERP system. Linker’s integration feature allows for real-time data exchange, ensuring accuracy in inventory, pricing, and financial reporting. 
**How to Activate**
* Select the package that best suits your needs.
* Initiate the application activation.
* Accept the required permissions and proceed with the installation.
* Your activation will occur immediately.

name: Bevatel Business Chat
short_description: Elevate your Zid store with Bevatel, the ultimate tool for automated WhatsApp communication.
description:
### **Bevatel Business Chat Integration for Zid: Automated WhatsApp Messaging for Enhanced Customer Relations**  

Elevate your **Zid** store with **Bevatel Business Chat**, the ultimate tool for automating **WhatsApp** communication.  
This integration streamlines your interactions with customers, ensuring they receive timely updates and notifications via **WhatsApp** effortlessly.  

### **What You Can Achieve with Bevatel Business Chat:**  

✅ **Personalized Order Status Notifications:**  
Automate WhatsApp messages for specific order statuses, keeping your customers informed every step of the way.  

✅ **Automated Order Payment Status Updates:**  
Send a WhatsApp message automatically when an invoice is generated, providing customers with immediate billing details.  

✅ **Efficient Order Cancellation Alerts:**  
Notify customers about order cancellations automatically via **WhatsApp**, handling potential setbacks proactively.  

✅ **Recovery of Abandoned Carts:**  
Automatically remind customers about their abandoned carts through a WhatsApp message, encouraging them to complete their purchases.  

✅ **Welcoming Messages for New Customers:**  
Send an automated WhatsApp welcome message when a new customer registers, making a great first impression.  

✅ **Confirmation of New Orders:**  
Automatically thank customers for their new orders with a personalized WhatsApp message, enhancing their shopping experience.  

✅ **Order Details Inquiry:**  
Customers can easily inquire about their order details by simply providing their **order ID** to the chatbot during the conversation.  

### **Activation method**  

1. Select a suitable plan and complete the payment.
2. Click the **Activate Application** button.
3. You will be redirected to the Bevatel platform.
4. Sign in (if you're not already logged in) and go to **Settings**.
6. Navigate to the **Integrations** tab, scroll to find **Zid App**, and click **Configure**.
7. Enter your **Store ID** and click **Submit**.
8. Once the connection status shows **"Established"**, click the **Connect with ZID** button.
9. You will be redirected to Zid to grant Bevatel the required permissions—click **Activate Application**.
10. You will then be redirected back to Bevatel, and the connection status will show as **"Connected"**.

### **Why Choose Bevatel Business Chat for Your Zid Store?**  
**Bevatel Business Chat** offers an innovative solution that enhances customer service and strengthens the relationship between your store and customers through **fast and automated communication**.  
The setup is simple and quick, enabling you to provide a **seamless customer experience with minimal effort**.  

💡 **Transform your customer communication with Bevatel Business Chat today!** 🚀

name: Countdown Popup
short_description: Enhance sales conversion using Countdown Popup
description:
Countdown popups create urgency, captivating customers and driving higher engagement and timely actions.  

Using countdown popups on your website provides a compelling edge. By instilling a sense of urgency, countdown popups enhance visitor engagement and amplify conversion rates. Whether used for time-limited offers, product debuts, etc. These popups seize attention, spurring immediate action. Create captivating email campaigns, ensuring precise targeting and timely delivery.

name: eshtarek app
short_description: Sell recurring subscriptions and design subscription boxes to ensure a sustainable customer base.
description:
Overview:

Eshtarek is a complete subscription management platform built to integrate seamlessly with Zid stores. It enables merchants to sell subscriptions, automate recurring payments, and track performance through a simple, dedicated dashboard.

With Eshtarek, you can:
- Sell subscriptions easily: Create flexible plans for your products such as monthly boxes, digital content, memberships, or services.
- Manage recurring payments: Fully supports MADA, Visa, and MasterCard with automatic renewal options.
- Manage subscribers: Monitor subscription status and customer activity from one place.
- Reduce churn: Built-in tools for renewal reminders and improving subscriber experience.

Key Features:
- Direct integration with Zid – no extra development needed
- Clean, Arabic-friendly interface
- Fast setup with responsive support
- Flexibility to link multiple products to subscription plans
- The app currently works with shippable products, digital products, and donations - soon with products with multiple options

How to register and get started:
1. Choose your plan and install the Eshtarek app from the Zid App Market.
2. Go to your dashboard via: https://dashboard.eshtarek.app
3. Log in using your email and the password sent to you.
4. Create your desired subscription plans.
5. Inside the dashboard, go to the “E-commerce” tab, select “Zid”, and connect your products to the plans you created.

Need help?
Contact us:
Email: info@eshtarek.app
Website: https://eshtarek.app
WhatsApp: https://wa.me/966537023703

name: MyAlice
short_description: Multichannel, multi-agent customer support tool with bulk WhatsApp messages & chatbots.
description:
MyAlice is a omni-channel customer engagement platform for Zid store owners. You can manage customer support, WhatsApp marketing, chatbots connected to your Zid Store in one place.

**Our Services**

**With MyAlice, you can:**

* Send bulk WhatsApp messages to all your Zid customers.
* Use WhatsApp chatbots with interactive buttons to guide Zid customers into a specialized sales process..
* Get multi-channel, multi-agent inbox for customer support.
* Automatically send order confirmation & shipping notifications directly to your Zid customers' WhatsApp.
* MyAlice supports Arabic Language & RTL design layout.
* Automatically recover abandoned carts of Zid customers with WhatsApp Chatbots.

**Our Features**

**- Multi-channel, Multi-Agent Inbox:**

Myalice multi channel inbox consolidates messages from all social channels like Facebook,WhatsApp,Instagram,Email and Live chat. With this feature, your customer support team can manage customer questions as well as create new orders for your Zid Customers from one single inbox
 
**- Social Chatbot:**

Using chatbots for your Zid store can enhance customer experience and guide customer engagement into sales. For example, if you have a Zid store that sells running shoes, our chatbots can help your customers find specific colored running shoes in their size and within their preferred price range. This is how MyAlice chatbots can simplify the sales process.
 
**- Agent metrics and CSAT:**

Agent metrics help you understand how well your customer support team is performing in terms of responding to Zid customers, making product or service sales and resolving Zid customer issues. You can see which customer support team member is assigned which Zid customer and how their performance has been in guiding customer messages into sales like duration from initial message to making a sale. Customer Satisfaction or CSAT helps you understand how satisfied your Zid customers are with your products, services and customer support experience. 
  
**- Customer Tags:**

Use Tags to mark Zid customers who are likely to purchase a specific product or customers with a special category in order to keep your customer support team informed. You can even use tags as reminders against customer tickets and then you can separate tickets based on which tags those tickets were assigned. 
 
**- Complaint Management:**

With Datalab, you can get all Zid customer complaints into one section and have your customer support team go through and resolve them easily. Customer complaints can come from social channels like Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp, Email and all those complaints are registered here with information regarding the type of product and service issue. Team members can be assigned Zid customer complaints here with a timeline to when each complaint needs to be resolved by. This will help you improve products and services, track how well complaints are handled and predict future issues.

**- Send Bulk WhatsApp Message and Use WhatsApp Chatbots for automating sales:**

Upload your Zid customers’ phone number, create a WhatsApp template about your product and services with interactive buttons and blast it straight to your customers’ WhatsApp. Your WhatsApp Broadcast with custom buttons will allow Zid customers to browse your product listing, place new orders and get in contact with your customer support team instantly - making it the best tool for marketing your Zid products. WhatsApp chatbots can guide your customers into a sales process uniquely made by you and for your online business.
Automate Sending Order Status & Shipping Notifications to Zid Customers on WhatsApp.

**Integration Steps**

**1.** Install MyAlice app from your ZId app store.

**2.** Activate MyAlice app by creating an account in MyAlice and connecting it to your ZId store.

**3.** Set up automation and chatbots.

name: Popup Snap smart
short_description: Create pop-ups and notifications to drive sales, offers, and collect emails.
description:
Here is a more concise version (approx. 2,200 characters), ensuring it fits well within the limit while keeping all the marketing power and emojis.

PopUp Snap: Pop-ups & Notifications Unified

Why PopUp Snap outperforms competitors? ✨ The only solution combining two powers in one app: 🎨 Professional Pop-Ups + 🔔 Smart Notifications = 💰 An Unbeatable Marketing System!

Why is PopUp Snap the ###1 Choice? It's a complete psychological marketing system that turns visitors into buyers! Combine professional pop-ups and smart notifications in one tool to capture every opportunity.

🔥 Section 1: 50+ Smart Notifications (New!) The first app on Salla to offer a complete marketing notification ecosystem!

✅ Trust & Social Proof 🎯 Recent Sales ("Someone purchased X moments ago") 📊 Live Visitor Counter (Show active visitors) 🔢 Conversion Counter (Proof of product popularity) ⭐ Customer Reviews (Display real testimonials)

🎁 Promotion & Urgency 🎟️ Animated Discount Coupons ⏰ Advanced Countdown Timer (Creates strong urgency to buy)

🌍 Smart Targeting 📍 Geolocation (Target by city/country) ℹ️ Custom Info Messages (Ads/Updates) — Fully customizable

📧 Lead Generation 📩 Smart Email & Request Collectors ⏳ Countdown Collector (Urgency + Data)

🎨 Creative Widgets 🎥 Video Widget (YouTube) 🎵 Audio Widget (Background music/voice)

💬 Engagement 😊 Emoji Feedback ("How is your experience? 😍😐") ⭐ Star Ratings & Social Sharing

🎨 Section 2: Professional Pop-Ups ✨ +500 Professional Templates Ready to Use ✅ Designed for store offers ✅ Canva-editable & No-code ✅ 100% Responsive (Mobile/Desktop) ✅ Supports Data Collection (Email & Mobile)

Pop-Up Types: 📩 Email & WhatsApp Capture (Build lists) 🛡️ Terms & Conditions 🎟️ Coupons & Discounts 🛒 Add-to-Cart Pop-ups (Smart Cross-sell + Up-sell)

🎛️ Section 3: Powerful Dashboard 🚀 Professional power with drag & drop ease!

✅ Easy Customization Edit text, colors, timing, and rules with one click.

🎨 Full Brand Match ✔️ Match brand colors & fonts ✔️ Add logos, images, icons ✔️ Transparency & shadows 🚫 No watermarks!

name: Qaema
short_description: Qaema streamlines your business operations for ease and efficiency.
description:
# What is Qaema?
Qaema streamlines your business operations for ease and efficiency. Join over a thousand businesses using Qaema daily to manage their operations.
## Services:
### •	E-commerce Store Integration
Manage orders from different branches and your online store under one platform. Automatic synchronization of product quantities between your online store and branches, along with a notification system alerting you of low-stock or expired products.

### •	POS Management
We provide easy-to-use applications that assist cashiers in efficiently billing customers. Integration with various POS peripherals like barcode scanners and thermal receipt printers is supported.

### •	Comprehensive Reporting
With just one click, get insights into your profits, sales, expenses, and more. Compare branch performance, and identify stagnant or best-selling products.

### •	Mobile Access
Design important reports and access them directly via your mobile device anytime, anywhere.

### •	Customer Management
Reports that make it easier to track your customers. Support for loyalty points, discount systems, and communication via SMS.

### •	Electronic Invoicing and VAT Compliance
Support for electronic invoicing and VAT compliance, along with various tax reports.

## Features:
•	Invoices
•	Products
•	Reports
•	Customers and Suppliers
•	Employees
•	Branches and Warehouses

## Integration Steps:
**1.	Choose Your Plan**
Select the plan that suits your needs.

**2.	Activate the App from Zid App Store**
Activate the application from the Zid App Store.

****3.	Seamless Integration****
The connection will be established immediately.

name: Order Confirmation
short_description: An essential addition to your store to reduce returns
description:
The “Recorded Calls to Confirm Orders” application is the ideal solution to save a lot of wasted time and effort and confirm your customers’ orders in the easiest way for you as well as for them. It's a win-win investment for both of you!

Why waste your employees' time or have to pay extra costs to call center agents to organize your customers' requests! Get one application that organizes all these requests for you and saves you a lot.

**How is it done?**

Once your customer places an order on your online store, our customer service management system routes a recorded call to that customer. The customer receives the recorded call and reacts to it with one click to either confirm or cancel. His response is recorded in the customer service management system again.

Your customer receives several attempts to contact him if there is no response the first time, and you can specify the length of time between attempts and many other details.


**Activation method**

**1.** Subscribe to the package that suits you

**2.** Click on the application activation button

**3.** Agree to the permissions and install the application

**4.** Integration will be done directly

name: Medad
short_description: Integrate your store with the Madad which is compatible with the requirements for linking with ZATCA
description:
**Integrate your online store with Medad accounting system**


**App Services**

Activate integarting your online store with Medad. This enables you to automate data entry and synchronize sales, inventory and customers. It will eliminate manual entry errors and save time so you can focus on what's most important - taking care of your customers and increasing your sales.

The process of integrating with Medad accounting system enables you to issue the VAT return with a click of a button.
It also allows compliance with the requirements of the Zakat and Tax Authority, including the requirements of the second phase and linking with ZATCA

**App Features:**

Save time: automate data entry and processing

Sales and inventory synchronization: Update sales and inventory in real time and without any manual intervention

It Provides a system compatible with the requirements of the Zakat and Income Tax Authority, including the requirements for linking with the Zatca

**What do you need to start the integration?**

An active account with Zid

An active account with Madad

Install Medad App in your Zid store

**Integration Steps**
**1.** Login to Zid and install Medad App

**2.** Copy the store ID from Zid

**3.** Login to Medad, Settings, Zid Settings, Paste the Store ID

**4.** Activate the required integration events

**5.** Contact Medad support to help with the steps as needed

name: TuskUp
short_description: Make your customers shopping experience unique and exceptional!
description:
💡 تخيّل أنك تزيد مبيعاتك بدون جهد إضافي!
تاسك أب هو الحل الذكي لرفع قيمة السلة في متجرك الإلكتروني. بمجرد أن يفتح العميل صفحة السلة، تظهر له نافذة منبثقة (Pop-up) تقترح عليه منتجات أو تصنيفات مكمّلة بناءً على اختياراتك. 
هذا التحفيز الذكي يدفع العميل لإضافة المزيد من المنتجات قبل إتمام الطلب، مما يعني زيادة في قيمة السلة، وبالتالي ارتفاع مباشر في مبيعاتك.

🎯 مميزات تضعك في المقدمة:
* اقتراحات مخصصة: اختر منتجات وتصنيفات محددة لعرضها في النافذة.
* تحليلات دقيقة: تابع عدد المرات التي أُضيفت فيها المنتجات من خلال البوب-أب، مع القيمة الإجمالية لها.
* تكامل سلس: يدعم تطبيق عناقيد التطبيقات ويعمل بكفاءة مع ثيم الأصايل.
* واجهة استخدام بسيطة: تفعيل سريع، وبدء استخدام فوري.

📈 النتائج؟


✔️ معدل طلبات أعلى

✔️ قرارات شراء مضاعفة

✔️ تجربة عميل محسّنة


سواء كنت تبيع جوالات أو منتجات تجميل أو أدوات منزلية أو غيرها تاسك اب يحوّل نية الشراء الواحدة إلى سلّة مليانة.


- [مثال على عرض المنتجات](https://vfbdya.zid.store/cart/view)


- [مثال على عرض التصنيفات](https://rwtqkp.zid.store/cart/view)


فيديو لشرح لآلية الاشتراك وخصائص التطبيق


آلية العمل:

اشترك بالباقة المناسبة لك.

قم بتفعيل التطبيق من أعلى الصفحة.

سوف تصلكم عبر البريد الالكتروني رسالة لانشاء كلمة المرور.

بعد استعادة كلمة المرور يمكن تسجيل الدخول واستخدام التطبيق.

**ملاحظة**

التطبيق يعمل بكفاءة مع ثيم الأصايل من تطوير عناقيد التطبيقات.

تاسك اب = زيادة في المبيعات

description:
Boost App increases your store sales by adding customized marketing product lists to various sections of your store's pages to boost sales. Create unlimited marketing campaigns to link specific products with recommended products for purchase, appearing in multiple places like within the product page or in the quick cart, or targeting shoppers through significant events such as a pop-up window after adding a product to the cart.

The app's control panel offers multiple customization options for marketing product elements. You can control texts, their sizes, colors, design, product options display, and their placement in the store. All parts of the app's windows can be customized via CSS in the store.

**Our Features:**

- Display marketing product window when adding a product to the cart.
- Show marketing products within the product page and also in the quick cart.
- Enable brief display of marketing products in the quick cart.
- Create unlimited marketing campaigns with the ability to add an unlimited number of marketing products to each campaign.
- Link the marketing campaign to more than one display location or targeting event.
- Prevent product conflicts by hiding products already added to the cart from the marketing list.
- Enable or hide the display of product options in the marketing product for each display location separately.
- Add the marketing product to the cart directly with one click.
- Show product options in the quick view window from the marketing product.
- Customize a main and sub-title for each marketing campaign.
- Marketing products appear in the store with the same design format as the store theme.
- Customize colors, text sizes, and design for each event from the app's control panel or via CSS.
- Change the display location of marketing products to any place in the store by specifying a custom CSS element.
- Marketing products are responsive and compatible with different screen sizes.
- Support multiple languages allowing marketing products and texts to appear in the store's selected language.
- Automatic synchronization of all product data, options, and categories with direct updates in the app.
- The app does not affect the store's page loading speed.

**Activation Steps:**

1. Ensure that the Alpha or Gamma theme is activated in your store through Zid Themes Marketplace.
2. Choose the appropriate app package and click "Subscribe Now"
3. Click "Activate App"
4. Agree to the permissions and install the app.
5. You will be automatically logged into the app's control panel, and login details will be sent to the primary store email.
6. The app is ready to use, and you can start adding marketing campaigns and selecting products for immediate display in the store.

**Note:**

**The app is only compatible with the Alpha and Gamma themes.**

name: Qoyod From Fai
short_description: Link your store with the most accounting system through FaiSync and enjoy automating all your data
description:
**Connect your store with Qoyod:**

Activate linking your online store with Qoyod using the Fai Sync tool. 
You can automate data collection and sync sales and inventory with us. By using Fai Sync, which specializes in connectivity, you will be able to facilitate and automate processes, eliminate manual errors, and save time and effort in processing and relaying processes so that you can focus on increasing your sales.

If you are subject to Phase 2 of electronic invoicing, feel free to contact us anytime for assistance in smoothly transitioning to this phase and fully leveraging the capabilities of the "Fi" system to support and ensure your compliance with regulations and requirements.


**What are the advantages of linking Your online store?**
* Save time: Automate data collection and save time spent processing processes and requesting reports.
* Sales and inventory synchronization: Sales and inventory will be updated continuously without the need for manual intervention.
* Improving work efficiency: Focus on what is most important: taking care of your customers and increasing your sales.
* Ease of use: An easy-to-use interface so that your accountant can follow up on operations and reconcile accounts.
* Round-the-clock support: Technical support is available around the clock.

**What do you need to get started?**
* An active account on the Zid platform.
* An active account on the Fai system.
* An active account with the Qoyod accounting system.
The activation process is easy and will not take more than a few minutes, and if you need help with this step, we are fully prepared to provide full support.

**Linkage mechanism:**
* Choose the package that suits you and install the application
* Copy the API key from the General Settings page of your account in Qoyod.
* Activate Fai Sync application from your Zid store and log in to the application.
* Paste the key into the designated place in Fai Sync control panel.
* You will then be able to select customization of automation and connectivity.
* It will be linked directly!

name: Canary
short_description: Canary - The Smart Companion for Entrepreneurs in the Zid
description:
Canary - The Smart Companion for Entrepreneurs in the Zid



E-commerce relies on e-relationships, communication, interaction, and e-targeting of customers. Canary is the entrepreneurial partner tweeting a unique tune for each customer, intelligently targeting them, making them feel special and importance, and leverage relationship.


Our vision at Canary is to maintain leadership in the field of automated marketing, challenge ourselves, and surpass the boundaries of what our customers need.

Our mission is to leverage our expertise to assist entrepreneurs in harnessing the potential of artificial intelligence to professionally target their customers, achieve growth, and maximize return on investment.

**Canary Features**

Our strength at Canary lies in our ability to assist numerous entrepreneurs in targeting their customers with a personalized approach for each client. Our features include the following:

**WhatsApp and SMS:** Stores can easily communicate with their customers through WhatsApp and SMS, enabling them to provide immediate support and respond to customer inquiries.

**Customer Targeting:** Stores can use customer data and statistics to target potential customers, encouraging them to engage and make purchases.


**Custom Events:** Stores can create promotional campaigns and custom events to boost sales and enhance customer engagement.

**Performance Analysis:** Canary provides powerful analytical tools that enable stores to monitor and evaluate the performance of their campaigns and better understand customer behavior.

**Benefits for Stores**


For stores using Canary Zid, it serves as a valuable strategic partner. Relying on Canary comes with numerous benefits:

**Growth in Sales:** By targeting potential customers and encouraging them to make purchases, stores can effectively increase their revenues.

**Enhance Relationships:** Providing a delightful shopping experience for customers enhances interaction and strengthens relationships.

**Time and Effort Savings:** Canary makes it easy for stores to manage communication with customers efficiently and effortlessly, saving time and effort.

**Increase Brand Awareness:** Canary helps in spreading brand awareness and enhancing the store's visibility in the market.

**Sustainability of Success**

The key to success lies in sustainability, and this is precisely what Canary offers. By continually developing and enhancing features and services, we strive to ensure meeting the needs of stores and achieving their goals. We believe in our partnership with entrepreneurs, allowing them to contribute ideas and suggestions that we implement and share with the Canary community

**Integration Steps**

**1.** Choose the package on Zid App Market

**2.** Activate the App

**3.** Activation is done

name: Taqrer
short_description: increase your reach with donors in one click
description:
Taqrer is a smart and integrated tool that enables nonprofit organizations to manage their relationships with donors effectively. The app focuses on enhancing the donor experience and ensuring sustainable support through:

Donor behavior analysis provides detailed analytical tools to highlight donation patterns, preferred time periods, and the most effective donation channels.

Transparent reporting allows nonprofits to create professional reports that showcase the impact of donations on projects and initiatives, building donor trust and loyalty.

Personalized communication includes interactive tools that enable the sending of thank-you messages, continuous project updates, and donation reminders, strengthening donors' emotional connection with the organization.

Efficient data management facilitates the management of donor and project data in one place, with a user-friendly interface and support for various tech integrations.

Key features include a flexible dashboard displaying real-time data summaries and key indicators, custom notifications to alert donors about new campaigns or urgent needs, system integration supporting connections with payment gateways and other systems, and growth strategies support to help nonprofits plan effective fundraising campaigns and expand their donor base.

Taqrer is not just a data management tool; it is a strategic partner that enhances nonprofit efficiency and creates a lasting impact in the charitable sector.

1️⃣ Sign Up – Create an account and register your nonprofit on the Taqrer platform.
2️⃣ Set Up – Customize your settings to match your needs.
3️⃣ Activate – Activate the app, and integration happens instantly!

name: Auto Gold Price
short_description: The application offers a sophisticated service tailored to Zid stores.
description:
Gold and silver store owners on the Zid platform face a major challenge in constantly updating their product prices to keep up with the momentary fluctuations in the prices of precious metals such as gold and silver. This requires a manual process that may lead to errors or delays in updating prices, exposing them to significant financial losses.

Therefore, we are pleased to present to you the Gold Price Updater, an instant tool that completely eliminates this problem and allows gold and silver store owners on the Zid platform to have an easy and effective selling experience without hassle or problems.

Gold Price Updater, a reliable tool relied upon by major gold traders in Saudi Arabia, such as Ali Al-Saqabi Jewelry, Jawharat Khayal for Gold and Jewelry, and Colin for Gold and Jewelry.

What is the Gold Price Updater application?
Gold Price Updater is a smart application that automatically integrates the prices of gold and silver products on the Zid platform with global prices, saving gold store owners on the Zid platform time and effort and ensuring

Accurate updates of gold and silver prices in real time.

Peace of mind with automatic price updates.

Avoid any delays in updating prices and protect gold store owners from losses.
Helping gold shoppers on the Zid platform make smart decisions to invest in buying gold through instant price updates.

What distinguishes the gold price updater
Enables traders to prepare appropriate equations for the gold or silver pricing process without any programming intervention in the code.
Get accurate and reliable prices through a secure connection with the global gold and silver price service provider.
A specialized team to assist you at any time to ensure a smooth experience.
Pull all customer products from the site on the Zid platform and display them in the tool with the possibility of modifying them and resending them to the Zid platform to update the product data automatically.
· Prices are updated moment by moment
The ability to manually control the global gold price update in emergency situations

name: Karam AI Assistant
short_description: Boost your sales effortlessly and offer 247 automated support to enhance customer satisfaction.
description:
Increase your e-commerce sales and enhance customer support with Karam, designed for exceptional efficiency and effectiveness.

**Our Services**

**- Boost Sales with Proactive Engagement:** 

Karam not only responds to inquiries but also proactively engages with customers, anticipating their needs and offering solutions before the customer even asks. This proactive approach not only enhances the customer experience but also significantly increases conversion rates by keeping customers engaged and interested.

**- Reduce Operating Costs by up to 90%:**

Dramatically reduce customer service expenses by 50-80% with Karam's efficient automation. Minimize the need for extensive support teams, significantly cutting labor costs while maintaining excellent service quality.

**- 24/7 Natural Language Interaction:**

Enjoy seamless support around the clock. Karam understands and interacts in a natural, conversational language, ensuring your customers receive continuous, high-quality support that feels personal and human-like.

**Our Features**

**- Effortless WhatsApp Integration:**

Integrate seamlessly with WhatsApp to provide your customers with a convenient and familiar communication channel. This integration facilitates smoother interactions and enhances the overall customer experience, contributing to higher engagement and satisfaction.

**- Intelligent Notification System:**

Stay on top of every customer interaction with Karam's intelligent notification system. It alerts you immediately when an unfamiliar query arises, ensuring no customer question goes unanswered and enhancing overall service reliability.

**- Real-Time Monitoring Dashboard:**

Track customer interactions easily using Karam's intuitive dashboard. This tool allows you to monitor communications effectively, ensuring your support operations run smoothly.

**- Customizable Knowledge Base:**

Easily tailor Karam's knowledge base to meet your specific business needs. Add information to update responses with just a click, ensuring the AI is always aligned with your latest news.


**Integration Steps**

**1.** Choose the package on Zid App Market

**2.** Activate the App

**3.** Create your Karam account from the link shown to you after installation

**4.** The chat icon will appear on your store, and the AI will start serving your customers immediately


Choose Karam not only to streamline your operations and reduce costs but also to enhance customer engagement and sales through advanced, proactive support. Embrace the future of e-commerce with Karam, where customer satisfaction meets cost efficiency.

name: Logix App
short_description: Logix is a cloud-based ERP system built on high standards and approved by the Zakat, Tax
description:
**Logix ERP: Over 60 Integrated Systems in One Place**

Logix is a cloud-based ERP system that adheres to high standards and is approved by the Zakat, Tax and Customs Authority. It offers a comprehensive set of accounting services and advanced smart solutions that efficiently meet the needs of customers.
**Our Services:**
- **Comprehensive Accounting Program**
  - **Financial Accounts Management**: Accurately track all financial transactions and smoothly monitor balances.
  - **Budget Preparation**: Set budgets and monitor expenses and revenues to improve financial performance.
  - **Detailed Financial Reports**: Generate detailed financial reports that help analyze store performance and plan future finances.
  - **Financial Reconciliations**: Facilitate financial reconciliation processes and ensure data accuracy.
- **Inventory Management**
  - **Accurate Inventory Tracking**: Effectively manage inventory to ensure product availability without shortages or surpluses.
  - **Real-time Updates**: The system provides instant updates with every sale or purchase, maintaining data accuracy.
- **Detailed Analytics and Reports**
  - **Comprehensive Reports**: Logix offers over 600 different reports ranging from sales reports to the most advanced accounting reports.
  - **Customizable Reports**: You can customize all your reports according to your needs.
  - **Comprehensive View**: These reports provide a comprehensive view of your store’s performance, helping you make the best decisions for rapid growth and loss prevention.
- **Customer Relationship Management (CRM)**
  - **Integrated CRM Tools**: Efficiently manage customer relationships with interactive and easy-to-use tools.
  - **Enhanced Customer Interaction**: Facilitate customer interactions through instant messages via email or SMS.
**Our Advantages:**
- Logix ERP provides a comprehensive and real-time view of financial conditions, aiding in informed financial decision-making.
- Monitor orders from multiple branches and the online store through a unified platform, with automatic synchronization of product quantities between branches and the online store.
- The system includes instant alerts to notify you of low stock or approaching product expiration.
- Full support for electronic invoicing and value-added tax (VAT).
- Integration with the Zakat, Tax and Customs Authority.
**Activation Method:**
1. Activate the application.
2. Enter the membership number.
3. Enter the login details and select the company you want to link from your companies.
4. Choose the default warehouse.
5. Add the default account number for customers in the chart of accounts.
6. The linkage will be established immediately.
Logix is specifically designed for the Gulf market to be the optimal solution for your needs and for stores of all sizes, enhancing efficiency and helping businesses grow sustainably.

name: Klaviyo integration
short_description: Send emails and SMS based on store events.
description:
klaviyo is an easy-to-use e-marketing platform that enables you to send emails and SMS messages that increase the conversion rate of your online store visitors into loyal customers using custom events that the customer performs within your store.

**Data Synced with the Zid Integration:**

**1. Abandoned Cart**
	This event is tracked when a customer leaves items in their cart and just logs out of their account.

**2. Active on Site**
	This event is tracked when a customer (previously cookied by Klaviyo) is active on your site.

**3. Added to Cart**
	This metric is tracked whenever a customer who has been cookied by Klaviyo adds an item to their cart.

**4. Cancelled Order**
	This event is tracked when the order status in the Zid admin dashboard is updated to “Cancelled”. 

**5. Customer Data**
	For each customer in your Zid account, a profile is created in your Klaviyo account. Customer information including first name, last name, email, mobile number, and location is added to this profile.

**6. Fulfilled Order**
	This event tracks when you update an order status to “Completed” in your Zid admin dashboard. This includes all product information about the items purchased. 

**7. Ordered Product**
	This event tracks when a customer places an order. This creates events based on the number of unique products in the order. For example the order contains a coffee item and a lotion – one event will be created for the coffee and one event for the lotion. This event includes detailed information about each product someone purchases.

**8. Placed Order**
	This event tracks when a customer completes the checkout process and places the order in Zid. This includes information about the order and the products within it.

**9. Reversed Order**
	This event tracks when you update an order status to  “Reversed” in your Zid admin dashboard. This includes all product information about the items purchased. 

**10. Started Checkout**
	This event is tracked when a customer starts the checkout process by clicking the “Complete the Purchase” button in the cart page.

**11. Viewed Product**
	This event is tracked when a customer (previously cookied by Klaviyo) views a product. This event includes detailed information about each product viewed.


**Activate App**

**1.** Subscribe with App Plan "**note that:** the plan dosen't include Klaviyo subscription fee, this is only for store integration"


**2.** Click on Activate App

**3.** Approve permission

**4.** The fields to enter API keys will appear  

**5.** Log in to your account on Klavioy platform 

**6.** get API keys from klaviyo account 

**7.** enter API keys in zid dashboard

**8.**  Integration done

name: InvoiceQ
short_description: InvoiceQ simplifies ZATCA registration for corporations, ensuring compliance with Phases One and Two
description:
**1. Application Overview**
InvoiceQ is a fully integrated e-invoicing application within the Zid Marketplace, compliant with ZATCA’s Phase I (Generation Phase) and Phase II (Integration Phase). It allows Zid merchants to generate, manage, and send electronic invoices that meet all regulatory requirements, including proper formatting, QR codes, and more.
By installing InvoiceQ directly from the Zid Marketplace, merchants can handle their entire invoicing process without leaving the Zid platform. The app is seamlessly embedded, providing users with the convenience of a unified experience while benefiting from InvoiceQ’s advanced e-invoicing features.

**2. Merchant-Focused Features and Services **
InvoiceQ simplifies E-invoicing for Zid merchants by offering Key features that include:
1. Up To Date: 
Automatic updates aligned with ZATCA’s latest requirements, eliminating the need for any manual action from the client’s side.
2. Compliance with ZATCA: 
InvoiceQ provides E-invoicing solutions fully compliant with ZATCA’s requirements for various invoice types, meeting all technical and business standards for Phase I and Phase II. 
3. Unlimited Number of Invoices: 
No restriction on the number of invoices providing flexibility that enables users to do more while saving less.
4. Faster Go-To-Market: 
Unlimited invoices, quick onboarding, seamless integration, and automated invoice processing; all designed to simplify operations and accelerate your go-to-market.
5. Real-Time Reporting & Analytics: 
Gain insights from real-time dashboards and reports that help monitor invoicing activity, compliance status, and trends for better decision-making.
6. Role-Based Access Control:
 Define user roles and permissions to ensure secure access and operational efficiency across departments.
7. Bilingual Interface (AR/EN): 
User-friendly interface available in both Arabic and English.
8. Technical Support: 
Expert support team available to assist with onboarding, troubleshooting, and ongoing operations available in both Arabic and English. 

**3. How To Integrate Zid with InvoiceQ?**

To integrate InvoiceQ with Zid, follow these steps:
1. 	Log in with your Zid account credentials.
2. 	Choose InvoiceQ app from Zid marketplace.
3. 	Activate the app & choose the pricing plan.
4. 	You'll receive one email with a password reset link and another with your login credentials.
5. 	Submit your new account information to be redirected to the Login page.
6. 	For login, you can either log in from InvoiceQ direct link or through Zid platform from “My Apps” without leaving the platform.
7. 	Create your orders on Zid and check the invoices generated automatically from the InvoiceQ dashboard. 
8. 	Click on the order invoice to view the full details. 

**4. Connect with Our Team Faster**

Connect with our sales experts to explore custom options for your business.
📲+966 59 818 8069
📩 zid-support@invoiceq.com
🌐www.invoiceq.com

name: Azeer for WhatsApp API
short_description: Seamless customer experience with Azeer: faster service and smarter sales via WhatsApp!
description:
### Azeer App for Zid Stores

Azeer is not just a messaging tool — it’s a complete platform to manage your store’s customer communication through WhatsApp Business (API).
We organize every touchpoint, from order creation to post-delivery, in an automated, scalable flow.

### With Azeer:
- Every customer interaction is documented and reviewable.
- The customer journey is managed from one place.
Activate the app and connect it to your store.

### Azeer Solutions for Your Zid Store
Features that give you control over your data, real-time follow-up, and higher conversion rates — to stay ahead of competitors.

### Instant Campaigns for Abandoned Carts
Target abandoned carts with full visibility.
See each cart in detail and launch instantly based on real data, not guesswork.

- Set a time window for abandoned carts, or target all.
- View each customer’s notification history before targeting.
- Know product count and how long items stayed in the cart.
- Flexible templates with up to 3 variables per template.
- See expected revenue and cost before launch.
- Review past results and failure reasons, if any.

Every campaign you launch — you know exactly what you’re doing and why.

### Abandoned Cart Notifications
Recover up to 45% of abandoned carts with smart scheduling that controls timing and follow-up pace without annoying customers.

- Send up to 5 reminders per cart.
- Set the exact delay before each reminder.
- Add discount codes to drive completion.
- Block inappropriate hours (e.g., midnight) with automatic rescheduling.
- Track scheduled reminders, failures, and reasons.

### Order Status Notifications (WhatsApp)
Send instant WhatsApp updates step by step, with no manual follow-up:

- Cash on delivery payment confirmed.
- Customer created.
- Order canceled.
- Order completed.
- Order created.
- Out for delivery.
- Being prepared.
- Order ready.

View the full history of every status inside the platform.

### Customer Sync
Customer data syncs automatically — saving time and increasing control.

- Import customer data in one click.
- Update and edit data easily.
- View sync logs from the notifications section.

### WhatsApp Catalog
Connect your store to WhatsApp Catalog so shopping becomes part of the conversation.

- Add selected products to the catalog.
- Receive orders start-to-finish on WhatsApp.
- New customers add their details on WhatsApp.
- Existing customers confirm/edit details before checkout.
- Define payment options and accepted currencies.
- Set communication and ordering languages.
- Track orders and statuses from the Azeer dashboard.

### Social Media Campaign Integration
Turn interest into a direct chat.
Link ads to a “Contact via WhatsApp” button so customers start instantly — no extra pages.

This integration:
- Shortens the journey.
- Raises conversion.
- Lowers acquisition cost.

### 24/7 AI Chatbot
Reduce team workload pressure by up to 30% by answering questions about products, orders, and store policies.
It understands context and uses your store data to deliver accurate answers without manual intervention.

### Analytics for Store and Conversation Performance
Track what’s happening inside your store:
- Sent notifications.
- Abandoned carts.
- Failures and reasons.

Data that helps you improve performance and make more accurate operational decisions.


### Two-Way Interactive Automation
An interactive system that lets customers choose the notifications they want and how often they receive them.
This creates a more personalized experience and reduces annoyance and unsubscribes.

name: Digital Pro
short_description: Integrate with Digital Pro App and print accounting and inventory reports easily and flexibility.
description:
**Overview:**

Digital Pro System is an integrated accounting system approved by the Zakat, Tax and Customs Authority (ZATCA). It offers innovative solutions for managing the accounting, financial and tax operations of e-commerce stores. It also helps you track your inventory through detailed reports, which contributes to saving time and effort and facilitating store management through automatic data synchronization with accuracy and ease.

**Why Digital Pro?**

Digital Pro is an integrated and customizable accounting system that suits the nature of your company or business activity, which helps you manage your financial affairs correctly and activate the electronic invoice approved by ZATCA.

* Automate your internal tasks: Digital Pro's integration tools enable you to connect inventory, sales, purchasing, and other internal systems, which helps you automate your tasks with ease.

* Approved electronic invoice: Convert paper invoices to electronic invoices that comply with tax and financial aspects and electronic exchange between the seller and the buyer with an easy-to-use program.

* High-precision inventory management.

* Detailed reports for all operations.

* Excellent technical support.

**Key Features of Integration:**

* The integration between "Zid" and "Digital Pro" enables you to track the total sales achieved through the reports within the Digital Pro system, which displays all sales invoices and returns that were created in Zoho.

* Choose the order status from which you want to start the transfer to Digital Pro (completed, for example)

* Put tags on orders that have been transferred to the Digital Pro system

* Comprehensive Reporting Service from Digital Pro System

* The Digital Pro System aims to provide detailed reports to store owners to enable them to manage their businesses efficiently and confidently, saving time and effort in preparing reports and analyzing performance.

* Simple and detailed reports sent to your email at the time you want to improve your store's performance and view the financial data of your sales.

* Ability to issue reports for previous periods: Do you want to issue performance reports for periods prior to subscribing to the service? It's simple, all you have to do is import the operations of those periods and issue your reports with the click of a button.

**Integration Mechanism:**

**1.** Activate the application.

**2.** After activating the application, the activation page will appear on which your ID number is displayed. Copy it.

**3.** Open the advanced Digital Pro program on your device, then go to Tools, then click on the link with the Zoho platform, then paste the number in the ID box, then click on Start linking, then click save.

**4.** The integration has been established directly.

name: zid-Odoo Connector
short_description: Simplify and automate operations between Odoo and Zid with IVS integration for seamless syncing.
description:
Odoo is a leading ERP system offering comprehensive tools to streamline business operations and support growth.

With this zid-Odoo connector from I Value Solutions, we will simplify and automate operations between your Odoo database and zid store. Enjoy seamless synchronization of customer data, order statuses, and products, saving time and effort with easy-to-follow steps.

**Features:**
* Product Integration: Syncs products between Odoo and Zid, ensuring full visibility and control.
* Customer Integration: Automates customers' synchronization from zid to Odoo.
* Confirmed Order Integration: Real-time synced orders, to automate orders processing.
* Available for Odoo **Enterprise and Community** Editions, **All Versions**.

**Integration Steps**
1. Package Subscription: After subscribing to an integration package, you'll be redirected to our activation guide.
2. Fill Out the Form: Complete the activation form with your details.
3. Support Contact: Our support team will reach out to you shortly to begin the integration process.
4. Install IVS Module: Install the IVS module in your Odoo environment through your Odoo team, or alternatively, you may grant us access and we will handle the installation on your behalf.
5. Integration: We'll integrate your zid store with your Odoo database.
6. Confirmation: Once the integration is complete, we'll confirm everything is set up and ready to use, and that the integration is started seamlessly.

2. Fill Out the Form: Complete the activation form with your details.
3. Support Contact: Our support team will reach out to you shortly to begin the integration process.
4. Install IVS Module: Install the IVS module in your Odoo environment through your Odoo team, or alternatively, you may grant us access and we will handle the installation on your behalf.

name: Quartz
short_description: Quartz is an AI-powered platform revolutionizing e-commerce collection and analysis of feedback.
description:
Quartz is an AI-powered platform that revolutionizes how e-commerce businesses collect and analyze customer feedback. We understand that traditional review systems are often cumbersome for customers and provide limited insights for businesses. Our solution streamlines the entire feedback process while delivering powerful analytics.

**Key Features**:

• Simplified Review Collection: Streamlined process that makes it effortless for customers to share their experiences

• AI-Powered Analytics: Advanced analysis of customer behavior and feedback patterns

• Unified Dashboard: Centralized platform for managing reviews across multiple channels

• Smart Integrations: Seamless connection with popular e-commerce platforms and communication channels

• Data-Driven Insights: Transform customer feedback into actionable business intelligence

Whether you're running a small online store or managing a large e-commerce operation, Quartz helps you understand your customers better and make informed decisions based on real data.

**How to integrate the APP?**
1. Create an account in [Quartz Platform ](https://psm.quart2.net)
2. Login and go to settings from top navigation bar.
3. Click on Add Channel, and Select Zid.

name: Live Gold Price Update
short_description: A tool to link the global price of gold and silver with product prices and update them in real time
description:
This service depends on linking the prices of gold and silver products for stores with international prices, by providing a radical solution where the prices are updated in real-time, which makes it easier for them to update the prices of their products at the required time.

**Our Features**

**-** Enable the merchant to set the appropriate equation for the gold or silver pricing process without any programming intervention in the code.


**-** Secure connection with the global gold price service provider.

**-** Withdrawing all the customer’s products from his website on the Zid platform and displaying them inside the tool with the ability to modify them and re-sending them to the Zed platform so that the product data is automatically updated.

**-** Update prices every minute.

**-** Alerts of high or low prices through email.

**-** The possibility of manually setting global gold prices in emergency cases.


**Integration Steps**

**1.** Choose the right Plan for you

**2.** Activate the app from Zid App Market

**3.** Integration will be done directly

name: magas
short_description: Easily add accurate and custom size charts to your products. With a simple user interface and professional designs.
description:
Do you find it difficult to provide accurate and attractive size charts for your electronic products? The "Size Guide" application is the perfect solution to this common problem. Creating a detailed and clear size guide is crucial to ensure customer satisfaction and reduce return processes.

### Why "Size Guide" is the best choice for your online store?

* **Ease of Use**: You can easily add size charts and customize them to fit specific categories or products with a simple and attractive user interface.

* **Professional Designs**: The application offers ready-made templates and professional visual designs to display sizes clearly and smoothly.

* **Flexibility and Customization**: You can customize size charts to meet the needs of your different products, ensuring the accuracy and detail of the information provided to customers.

* **Integrated Text Editor**: The application includes a text editor that supports images and videos, allowing you to provide comprehensive and visual information to your customers.

* **Convenient Control Panel**: The easy-to-use control panel allows you to quickly and accurately add and edit sizes, saving you time and effort.

* **Reduced Customer Inquiries**: With the "Size Guide" application, you can directly add size charts to the product page, eliminating the need to deal with repetitive customer inquiries or redirect them to external pages. The customer will find all the information they need easily and in one place.

* **Continuous Technical Support**: You will receive continuous technical support to assist you at any time, whether you are a free or paid subscriber.

**How to Activate the Application**

**1.** Subscribe to the appropriate package.

**2.** Click on the application activation button.

**3.** Enter your WhatsApp number.

**4.** Click save.

**5.** Click publish, and the button will appear directly in the store.

Popcorn: Your AI-Powered Sales Assistant for WhatsApp

**Benefits:**
Popcorn turns WhatsApp into a full store, boosting sales, engaging customers, and simplifying the buying process.

**Features:**
* AI-powered chats for personalized product suggestions.
* In-chat catalog browsing, cart, and checkout.
* Automated marketing to re-engage customers.
* Insights to track sales and abandoned carts.
* Seamless Sync with Zid: Syncs your product catalog between Popcorn and Zid, ensuring any updates are automatically reflected on both platforms for easy product management.

* Real-time order management directly within WhatsApp.
* Customer engagement automation (sales, support, marketing).

2. Import your product catalog.

Popcorn helps you sell smarter, faster, and more personally—all in one chat!

name: Moalen
short_description: Moalen platform, an advertiser marketing company that brings together the largest influencers in KSA
description:
**Moalen Platform**  
The best advanced platform for influencer marketing.  
Influencer marketing results are excellent, providing you with strong visibility and contributing to sales.  
You can use promotional videos through influencers to advertise your products via sponsored ads.  

We’ve simplified the process of selecting influencers for your product advertising by gathering the best influencers at great prices.  

The platform offers you the best micro and macro influencers at reasonable prices.  
Platform link: [https://zid.moalen.sa](https://zid.moalen.sa)  

**How to use the Moalen app:**  
1. Click the "Activate App" button.  
2. Accept permissions, install the app, and open it after activation. You’ll see the influencers.  
3. Select the appropriate number of influencers by clicking on the "Choose Ad Platform" icon, which appears after entering the influencer's page.  
4. Choose the type of ad, platform, and date, then proceed with the order.  
5. Once you’ve added the influencers, go to the "View Price" icon at the top of the page.  
6. When you access the price view, the price will be displayed, and you’ll need to enter the campaign name and click "Send."  
7. The price package will be sent to you on the main page of the Moalen app within less than 24 hours.  
8. You can pay for the advertisement via the sent package, and we will contact you to arrange and coordinate with the influencers for the ad launch.  

For any inquiries or assistance, you can contact us via WhatsApp at the following numbers:  
920031888  
[**0559407521**](https://wa.me/+966559407521)

name: Fai System
short_description: With Fai...increase your sales, reduce your costs, and maintain your tax committed!
description:
**Fai System:** is a cloud-based electronic invoicing and tax return system approved by the Zakat, Tax, and Customs Authority for both phases of e-invoicing. The system offers innovative solutions to manage the financial and tax operations of e-commerce businesses, along with a unified platform for integrating sales platforms and accounting systems. This helps store owners save time and effort through precise and seamless automatic data synchronization.

If you are subject to Phase Two of electronic invoicing, you can reach out to us anytime. We are ready to assist you in transitioning smoothly to this phase and leveraging the full capabilities of the Fi System to ensure compliance with regulations and requirements.

**Our services:** 
* Approved electronic invoicing: Converting paper invoices into an electronic process, taking into account the tax and financial aspects and electronic exchange between the seller and the buyer, electronic invoice approved by the Zakat, Tax and Customs Authority.
* Tax returns: Through an easy-to-use platform designed for non-financial professionals, you will receive reminders of return preparation dates, help you prepare and review the return, and archive all attachments and supporting documents for you. Because it relies on technology, all of this will happen within a few moments and automatically.
* Simplified Bookkeeping: Managing suppliers and customers’ accounts, managing sales and purchases, and integrated archiving of invoices and their accessories.
* Tax and financial consulting: Seamless communication with financial and tax advisors.Fai system works to bridge the gap between you and knowledgeable advisors to ensure you get the support you need to make sound financial decisions.
* financial reports:  Includes detailed insights into client sales, a list of top purchasing clients, as well as the most utilized shipping companies and payment methods.
* Linking sales platforms and accounting systems: Connect your store in Zid with the largest accounting systems through Fai, to learn about connection packages, search in the application store for (Fai).

**Connect your store with Fai:**
Activate linking your online store with the direct system. 
Through us, you can automate data collection, automatically synchronize sales, and issue your tax return without any errors and at the lowest cost! 

**What do you need to get started?**
* An active account on the Zid platform 
* An active account with the Fai system 
The activation process is easy and will not take you more than a few minutes, and if you need help with this step, we are fully prepared to provide full support.

**Linkage mechanism: **
* Activate Fai application and choose the package that suits you
* Accept the permissions and install the application
* Choose a system from the available options
* It will be linked directly!

Leave moving between multiple systems to manage your financial operations, with the first system designed for non-financial professionals to achieve tax compliance in Saudi Arabia with the click of a button!

Learn more about our connectivity services by visiting our website: 
[https://fai.sa/fai-sync/](https://)

name: Flexa
short_description: Flexa app helps you to increase conversion rate and sales by adding many interactive plugins.
description:
Flexa app helps you to increase conversion rate and sales by adding many interactive plugins to the product page or store pages, As a Visitors live count, Countdown offer, Images, Custom tabs, Promotion label on Product image, Store features and Popup windows.

The app's dashboard offers multiple possibilities to customize interactive elements, as you can control text, size, colors, design, and where they appear. All parts of the app's interactive elements can also be customized through CSS in the store.

**Our advantages:**
* ability to add interactive elements and components to store pages such as promotional view counter, descending timer, images, feature list, custom tabs, promotional words on product images and promotional pop-ups.
* possibility of adding unlimited components to specific product or all products at once.
* possibility of excluding view components from a specific product.
* Full possibilities to customize the design of components and their elements from the application dashboard.
* ability to determine where the components appear on the product page.
* ability to add popup windows in specific pages only in the store.
* ability to customize colors, text sizes and design components through CSS in the store.
* all  components is compatible with different screen sizes.
* Support multi languages and view specific texts by store language.
* app compatible is not affect loading speed of store pages.

**Activation Steps:**
1. Ensure that the Alpha or Gamma theme is activated in your store through Zid Themes Marketplace.
2. Choose the appropriate app package and click "Subscribe Now"
3. Click "Activate App"
4. Agree to the permissions and install the app.
5. You will be automatically logged into the app's control panel, and login details will be sent to the primary store email.
6. The app is ready to use, and you can start adding marketing campaigns and selecting products for immediate display in the store.

**Note:**
The app is only compatible with the Alpha and Gamma themes.

name: Supy
short_description: Supy.io optimizes F&B operations by streamlining inventory management and menu planning.
description:
Supy.io is a cutting-edge platform designed to streamline every aspect of restaurant management, from inventory to procurement, ensuring that businesses operate with unparalleled efficiency. Below is a detailed breakdown of the key features that make Supy.io an essential tool for modern restaurants.

Inventory Management
Supy.io revolutionizes inventory management, enabling restaurant owners to maintain accuracy and efficiency at every step. With the Parallel Count feature, users can count their stock three times faster and twice as accurately, minimizing discrepancies and ensuring that inventory levels are always correct. This system allows for detailed monitoring of food costs across separate inventories within a single location, providing precise insights into where your budget is going. Supy.io's advanced inventory analytics deliver in-depth variance analysis, enabling users to identify and address issues swiftly.

Procurement
The procurement process is often cumbersome, but Supy.io simplifies it with a mobile app that accelerates buying procedures. Users can avoid shortages with automated ordering recommendations, ensuring that their stock is always at optimal levels. Additionally, the platform’s clear reporting capabilities allow users to identify cost-reducing buying opportunities, making procurement not just faster but also more cost-effective.

Invoices & Settlements
Managing invoices and settlements is critical to maintaining financial health, and Supy.io ensures this process is both fast and accurate. The platform speeds up invoice recording, enhances receiving accuracy, and ensures inventory levels are correct, reducing errors and discrepancies. With easy management of statements of account, users can maintain complete control over their supplier payments, even at scale, ensuring that cash flow is managed efficiently.

Menu & Recipes
Supy.io makes recipe management simple and precise. Users can enter specific items and quantities to replicate recipes accurately, ensuring consistency in every dish. The platform links real-time ingredient prices to recipes, so businesses can adjust pricing dynamically to avoid selling at a loss. Supy.io’s cost simulator is a powerful tool for finding the right price that balances profitability with customer satisfaction, allowing for more strategic menu planning.

Reports & Analytics
Acting as the control center of the business, Supy.io’s reporting and analytics tools provide deep insights that are essential for effective management. Users can view detailed reports on food costs, variance, and the most sold or most profitable items. This level of insight allows for smarter, data-driven decisions that can be implemented immediately, rather than waiting until the end of the quarter.

Central Kitchen Management Software
Supy.io also offers robust Central Kitchen Management Software, allowing any branch within a business to function as a central kitchen. This feature enables seamless internal ordering between branches, with the ability to accept, reject, or modify orders. The software also showcases stock quantities to other branches, ensuring transparency and coordination across the business. Inventory levels can be depleted and replenished accurately, maintaining consistency and reducing waste.

Supy.io is more than just a management tool—it's an all-encompassing platform that empowers restaurants to operate with precision, efficiency, and profitability. By integrating advanced technology with intuitive design, Supy.io ensures that every aspect of restaurant management is optimized for success.

name: RaselBot WhatsApp Cloud
short_description: Raselbot boosts sales and enhances customer experience with WhatsApp marketing.
description:
Raselbot is an all-in-one application that helps you enhance your customers' experience and increase your sales through professional marketing and communication tools for WhatsApp and social media platforms, along with innovative features that streamline your store's management effectively.

**Features and Services Provided by Raselbot**

* Abandoned Cart Reminders: Recover lost sales through automated messages that remind your customers to complete their purchases effortlessly.
* WhatsApp Marketing Campaigns: Launch effective marketing campaigns that directly reach your customers via WhatsApp, ensuring high engagement and tangible results.
* Order Reminders and Updates: Automatically remind customers of any updates to their orders with notifications carrying your store’s logo, keeping them informed about their order status.
* Order Reviews: Send automated review requests to customers after order completion to improve service quality and boost trust in your store.
* Direct Communication and Chat: A central platform with live chat capabilities for seamless communication with customers, enhancing their experience and loyalty.
* Store Chat Widget: Add a live chat tool to your online store to facilitate communication and encourage customers to complete purchases.
* Chatbot: Automate responses with a smart bot that quickly and efficiently handles customer inquiries without human intervention.
* AI-powered Virtual Assistant: Utilize AI-driven assistants to answer customer inquiries and help them make purchasing decisions.
* Automated Reply Management: Send instant, automated replies to customer inquiries, saving time and improving communication efficiency.
* Chat Flow: Organize conversation workflows between your team and customers to ensure effective management and increased productivity.
* Facebook Integration (Official Partner): As an official Facebook partner, we ensure reliable services for seamlessly linking your store to WhatsApp and Facebook.
* Social Media Platform Management: Easily manage your store’s social media accounts to boost engagement and build stronger relationships with your audience.

**Benefits of Raselbot for Your Zid Store**
* Increase Sales: Through abandoned cart reminders and marketing campaigns.
* Enhance Customer Experience: With order updates and reminder notifications.
* Boost Security and Credibility: By sending secure OTP verification codes.
* Improve Engagement: With automated review requests.
* Save Time: By using automated replies and a smart chatbot.
* Facilitate Communication: With instant live chat features for customers.
* Professional Support: From a specialized team to ensure optimal results.
* Start Now with Raselbot and leverage modern marketing tools to improve your customers' experience and increase your sales!

**Steps for app integration

1. Install the application.
2. You will receive integration notifications to the registered email address containing your email and password.
3. Log in to the application using your email and password.
4. After logging in to the application, you will receive a WhatsApp message containing your login details for the application's control panel, as well as contact information for the technical support team.
