name: Smart Stories Videos
short_description: Your all-in-one stories app. Video stories, shoppable video stories, web stories, product stories.
description:
Publish Instagram like video stories in minutes and add them anywhere on your shop easily using the app's settings. Upload videos to your story like you would do on Instagram or Snapchat. Allow your customers to copy a coupon code while playing the video story. Shoppable video stories help increase number of products viewed, conversion rate and sales.

### App Services

**Video Story Publishing:** Upload, edit, and publish Instagram-style video stories directly to your store.
**Shoppable Stories:** Enable widgets directly in your stories to boost sales and engagement.
**Analytics & Insights:** Track how your customers interact with your stories and measure their impact on sales.
**Customization Options:** Adjust the appearance and behavior of stories to align with your brand identity.

### App Features

**Easy Uploads:** Upload video stories effortlessly, just like on Instagram or Snapchat.
**Product Highlighting:** Make your videos shoppable by linking products featured in the stories.
**Customizable Design:** Tailor the story widget's look, feel, and animations to match your brand's identity.
**Responsive Design:** Stories look perfect on desktop, tablet, and mobile.
**Engagement Boost:** Stories encourage interaction, increasing time spent on your store and driving more conversions.

### Integration Steps

**Subscribe to a Plan:** Choose the plan that best suits your needs and install the app.
**Create Your Account:** Sign up to access your dashboard and manage your stories.
**Create Your Story:** Upload videos or images to start crafting your story.
**Customize Your Story:** Adjust colors, widgets, and other design elements to match your brand.
**Choose a Template:** Select from a variety of professionally designed templates to make your story stand out.
**Publish Your Story:** Click on "Publish" to apply your changes and make your story live on your store.

4. Customer information: 
The Reachware platform automates and links customer create and update from the Zid system to Foodics

Integration steps:
 
1. Subscribe to the appropriate package for your business.
2. Agree to the permissions and install the application.
3. Reachware team will contact you to activate your account.
4. The integration will be done directly.

name: Store Tools Daily Report
short_description: The Daily Report in Store Tools tool provides you with a daily summary of orders in your store.
description:
The **Daily Report** in Store Tools tool provides you with a daily summary of all orders placed in your online store. A comprehensive report is sent to your email at exactly 12 midnight, and it includes:
* Total sales from all orders placed throughout the day.
* Order statuses (completed, in delivery, returned, etc.).
* Total number of orders for each status.

This report allows you to easily track your store’s activity and monitor the status of all daily orders without the need to manually check the store.

**Installation Steps:**
1- Subscribe to the plan
2- Accept the permissions and install the application
3- The application will be installed, and you will be redirected to the website and receive a welcome email
4- You will receive an email containing the website password, which you can change from within the site
5- You will receive an email with an initial report as a sample, and then you will receive a daily email at midnight

**Stay Tuned!** New Tools will come overtime.

description:
**Printitle** - Print On Demand is your complete solution for selling customized products without the hassle of inventory or shipping.

Our app integrates seamlessly with your online store, allowing you to offer a wide range of customizable products like wall art, posters, notebooks, and tote bags. With our intuitive mock-up generator, you can easily design products that match your brand, and we handle everything from production to delivery. Whether you’re a small business or a large retailer, Printitle helps you expand your product offerings, enhance customer satisfaction, and grow your sales without additional overhead.

name: AlFinder
short_description: Transform shopping with AlFinder the smart tool that boosts customer satisfaction and sales easilyds
description:
##### Application Overview:
AlFinder is search and discovery solution designed to enhance the online shopping experience and increase sales. As the First Arabic centric all-in-one suite tailored for e-commerce merchants, AlFinder empowers you to deliver a personalized experience for every customer through AI-powered tools. It improves customer engagement, boosts conversion rates, and simplifies the shopping journey. AlFinder ensures a unique shopping experience that keeps your customers satisfied and loyal.

### Simplify the shopping experience and increase your sales.

##### Our Services:
*  Smart Search delivers fast, accurate results even with typos or incomplete queries. Using advanced Natural Language Processing (NLP), it understands the search context while personalizing the experience.
*  Personalized Recommendations Offers tailored product suggestions based on customer behaviour and interests, increasing average order value (AOV) and encouraging repeat purchases.
*  Advanced Analytics Provides comprehensive reports to analyze customer behavior, optimize marketing strategies, and boost sales with data-driven insights.
*  Smart Merchandising enhances product visibility using dynamic promotional tools that meet customer needs and deliver a personalized shopping experience. (Coming Soon)
*  Seamless Zid Integration by quick and easy setup ensures you fully leverage the application’s features to enhance your customer experience.

##### Features of AlFinder’s Services
Advanced Search & discovery
* Full support for Arabic language and dialects to provide accurate and relevant results.
* Automatic correction for typos and incomplete keywords.
* Fully personalized search experience for your customers to ensure maximum conversion rates.

Personalized Product Recommendations
* Tailored suggestions based on data analysis and purchase behavior.
* Maximizes cross-sell and upsell opportunities to achieve the highest possible sales.

Advanced Performance Analytics
* Interactive dashboards providing reports on search performance and product engagement.
* Detailed insights into customer behavior and store performance.
* Supports strategic decision-making with accurate, data-driven insights.

Seamless Integration with Zid
* Direct, hassle-free activation with no technical expertise required.

##### Benefits of AlFinder
* Personalized recommendations and smart search can increase conversion rates by up to 30% (Source: McKinsey).
* Accurate and seamless search results reduce customer frustration and improve satisfaction by 40% (Source: Gartner).
* Smart recommendations can boost basket value by up to 35% (Source: SellerApp).
* Accurate suggestions minimize mismatched purchases, reducing return rates by 15% (Source: Industry AI Insights).
* Full Arabic language support and cultural adaptation ensure the application’s effectiveness for local merchants.

##### Integration Steps with AlFinder
1. Choose the Right Plan that best fits your needs from the Zid App Store.
2. Activate AlFinder by Clicking on the "Activate App" button and complete the required steps.
3. Set Permissions by Approving the necessary permissions to sync data securely.
4. Configure Settings by Customizing search and recommendation settings to align with your store’s goals.
5. Launch and Monitor by activating AlFinder and start monitoring performance through the integrated dashboard.
6. Continuous Improvement by Using advanced analytics to optimize results and enhance store performance continuously.

##### Need Help?
If you have any questions or need assistance, our team is[ here to help](https://outlook.office.com/bookwithme/user/6f6bcb1c32994a4885c252ec9d985ab0@alfinder.net/meetingtype/KnJvzemXbki5Ys2NIDQLew2?anonymous&ep=mcard)!

[Contact us](https://wa.me/966501145541) today to learn how AlFinder can transform your store and elevate your sales.

name: Naeem
short_description:
Explain what problem your application will solve,
Explain what problem your application will solve,
description:
* About the App

Simplify your operations and enhance your customer experience with Naeem’s seamless integration. Designed specifically to meet the needs of salons and beauty centers, this comprehensive solution offers advanced tools for booking management, staff scheduling, reporting, sales, and service management — all while ensuring a smooth and modern payment experience for your customers.

**Features**

**Easy Online Bookings**

* Allow your customers to book appointments anytime, from anywhere.
* Display real-time availability of services and staff.
* Automatically confirm bookings and send reminders to reduce no-shows.
* 
**Advanced Payment Solutions**

* Accept payments through Naeem Pay with flexible options including card payments, Apple Pay, and installment plans via Tabby.
* Manage upfront or partial payments to ensure better commitment to appointments.

**Comprehensive Staff Management**

* Organize staff schedules based on assigned tasks and services.
* Track individual employee performance and sales.
* Manage break times and schedules with ease.

**Service and Inventory Management**
* Track product usage and available inventory to avoid shortages.
* Easily add new services, set service durations, and pricing.

**Comprehensive and Customizable Reports**
* Access detailed reports on bookings, sales, and customer reviews.
* Export data for in-depth analysis.
* Instantly view daily, weekly, and monthly financial performance.

**Enhanced Customer Engagement**
* Send welcome messages, automated reminders, and post-service surveys.
* Create special offers to build customer loyalty.

**Flexible Operational Management**

* Manage multiple branches with the ability to control each branch independently.
* Customize pricing, promotions, and service offerings for each branch.

**Benefits**
* Save Time: Automate daily tasks to reduce workload.
* Boost Revenue: Increase bookings and minimize no-shows.
* Improve Customer Satisfaction: Provide a seamless experience from booking to payment.
* Instant Insights: Access comprehensive reports for data-driven decision-making.

**Requirements for Connecting Zid with Naeem**

* An active Zid account
* An active Naeem account (If you don’t have an account with Naeem, you can contact us https://naeem.com.sa/Zid/.)
*** Connection Process:**

* Select the appropriate package and install the Naeem App from the Zid App Store.
* Go to the Integration page in the Naeem app and enter your Store ID.
* Return to your Zid store and click Activate App.
* After activation, click Open App to access your Naeem dashboard.
* Start mapping your services and customize the settings as needed.

name: Store Tools AI Describer
short_description: Store Tools is your Smart Tool for AI Product Descriptions, Marketing, and Pricing. Single or Bulk
description:
**🚀 Store Tools – Your Smart Tool for Product Descriptions, Marketing, and Pricing!**

🔹 A comprehensive tool for managing product descriptions, smart marketing, and efficient pricing—helping you enhance your store and boost sales effortlessly!

✍️ **Intelligent Product Description Editing**
✔️ Generate professional product descriptions using AI.
✔️ Create a complete SEO-friendly description (title + short description + URL + keywords).
✔️ Edit and review descriptions manually before saving.
✔️ Easily review and restore previous descriptions.

📢 **Automated Marketing & Publishing**
🚀 Write and schedule tweets for automatic posting on Twitter.
📹 Write and schedule TikTok/Instagram posts (images & videos) for auto-publishing.
📣 Generate AI-powered ad content ready for social media.
🔜 More social media platform support coming soon!

💰 **Pricing Management & Bulk Edits**
🔹 Adjust product prices in bulk.
🔹 Apply group discounts easily.
🔹 Flexible control over pricing modifications.

🛍 **Seamless Integration with Your Store**
✅ Save descriptions and edits directly to your store.
✅ Modify multiple products in a single operation.
✅ Quickly search by product name, SKU, or advanced filters.

**🚀 We continuously develop new features based on your suggestions!**

**Subscription Renewal Benefits:**

name: Raqamee
short_description: Discover the power of our integrated tools to boost your sales and enhance customer experience
description:
🚀 **Enhance Your Store's Performance with RAQAMEE – The Ultimate Solution for a Seamless Shopping Experience on Zid**  
===============  

**Looking to improve user experience in your Zid store and boost your sales? Look no further!**  

**Raqamee** is not just an app—it’s the result of years of hands-on experience in e-commerce marketing and sales! Founded by an expert in e-store management after working with **11+ stores** on the Zid platform, it offers the perfect solution to optimize your store's performance.  
It brings together **powerful and innovative tools** specifically designed to help merchants **enhance user experience and increase sales with ease!**  

**🎯 Why Does Your Store Need Raqamee?**  
With our app, you can **improve store functionality, attract customers, and increase conversions—all with minimal effort!**  

### Key Features of Raqami:  
---------------  

**🔹 Quick View – Instantly Engage Customers**  
Make browsing faster and smoother!  

Your customers can **view product details without leaving the page**. This seamless experience keeps products just one click away, increasing buying chances and reducing page abandonment.  

***  

**📢 Scrolling Announcement Bar – Keep Customers Updated**  
Highlight your offers in a dynamic and eye-catching way!  

The announcement bar allows you to **add promotional messages** to your store—whether it’s special deals, new arrivals, or important news. You can customize the **text, speed, color, and animation effects** to capture customer attention effortlessly.  

***  

**🛒 Sliding Cart – Simplify Checkout Process**  
No more page reloads!  

Instead of forcing customers to reload the page every time they add a product, the **Sliding Cart** lets them **review and edit cart items without leaving the current page**—enhancing the shopping experience and reducing cart abandonment.  

***  

**⏳ Smart Cart – Create Urgency & Boost Conversions**  
Increase sales by adding a sense of urgency!  

This feature includes a **countdown timer** that **encourages faster purchase decisions** when limited-time offers are active. Additionally, the **sticky "Add to Cart" button** ensures the buying option is always within reach.  

***  

**💰 Upsell Offers – Boost Revenue with Ease**  
Increase the average order value effortlessly!  

When a product is added to the cart, **Raqamee suggests complementary products** (which you can set up), encouraging customers to **buy more** in a **non-intrusive** way.  

***  

💡 **Why Choose Our App?**  
----  
✔ **Easy Setup** – No coding experience required  
✔ **Customizable Features** – Personalize colors, texts, and designs to match your brand  
✔ **Increase Sales** – Powerful tools like **Quick View, Smart Cart, and Upsell Offers** help drive more conversions  
✔ **Mobile-Friendly** – Ensures a smooth experience across all devices  
✔ **Better User Experience** – Intuitive features and smooth animations make shopping more engaging  

**Note: Our app supports the following themes**  
- **Soft Theme** (Fully supported)  
- **Ideal Theme** (Fully supported)  
- **Royal Theme** (Coming soon)  

**Want support for your custom theme? Contact us [here](https://wa.me/212639963563) (Requests take 5-20 days to complete).**  

***

**App activation steps:**
1. Click the "Subscribe to the app" button.
2. Choose the package that suits you.
3. Agree to the required permissions.
4. You will receive login informations via the email address registered with ZD.

***

📌 **Don’t Miss Out – Install the App Today and Watch Your Store Grow!**  
----  

**🚀 Get Started Now! Install Raqamee today and start increasing your profits!**

name: Revio
short_description: REVIO is an app that allows Zid merchants using Small Details themes to display reviews manually.
description:
**REVIO** is an app designed for Small Details themes users on Zid. that allows adding shopper reviews manually while maintaining reliability and seamless integration. The added reviews appear in the exact format of the store’s theme and in the designated review section, ensuring visual consistency and a cohesive user experience. The app also automatically merges these manual reviews with genuine store-generated reviews in an organized manner, without any conflicts or duplication, preserving a unified display that enhances customer trust and increases the store’s credibility and value.

**Features** 
* Designed for SmallDetails themes users on Zid.
* Allows adding shopper reviews manually.
* Ensures reliable and seamless integration with the store’s theme.
* Displays added reviews in the same format and section as theme-generated reviews.
* Merges manual reviews with real store reviews automatically.
* Prevents conflicts or duplication between reviews.
* Maintains visual consistency and cohesive user experience.
* Enhances customer trust and increases store credibility and value.

**Integration steps**
1. Choose the plan that best suits your needs.
2. Activate the application.
3. You will get the account details on your registed email in Zid
4. The integration will be complete, and you can start using the app.

description:
**Venofy** is an innovative platform designed to enhance the user experience in e-commerce stores. The platform offers store owners over 30 tools to improve visitor engagement, increase sales, and collect customer data.

**Venofy** combines interactive tools such as Spin the wheel and personalized notifications with marketing features to encourage purchases, creating a seamless and tailored experience for customers. The platform supports full customization and easily integrates with e-commerce systems, making it the ideal choice for store owners looking to enhance efficiency and drive rapid growth.

** How to Install Venofy**

1. **Pick a Plan & Subscribe** – Choose the best Venofy plan for your business.

![](https://venofy.com/uploads/zid/plan_en.png)

2. **Activate the Application** – Click the “Activate Application” button after subscribing. A popup will appear—click “Activate Application” again to confirm.

![](https://venofy.com/uploads/zid/activate_application_en.png)

3. **Authorize the App** – You’ll be redirected to a page where you need to authorize Venofy to access your store. Click “Authorize App”.

![](https://venofy.com/uploads/zid/authorize_app.png)

4. **Check Your Email (optional)**– You will receive an email containing your Venofy login credentials.
5. **Access the App** – You can now click “Open Application” from your Zid dashboard, or log in using the credentials from the email.

![](https://venofy.com/uploads/zid/open_app_en.jpeg)

For detailed setup instructions, visit:
🔗 [Venofy Blog](https://venofy.com/blog)
plan_offer: Subscribe for one year and get one year for free

name: Tlaaq
short_description: Tlaaq.com automates order syncing from Zid to Zoho Inventory, streamlining inventory tasks.
description:
**Tlaaq.com** simplifies order management by automating the transfer of orders from Zid to Zoho Inventory. This integration reduces manual effort, keeps inventory synchronized, and enhances overall efficiency.

**Steps to Integrate**

1. **Install and Activate**  
   Search for the "Tlaaq" app in the Zid app store, install it, and click on the **Activate** button. Zid will redirect you to Tlaaq.com.

2. **Login/Register**  
   Log in or register on Tlaaq, then confirm the linking between your Zid store and Tlaaq.

3. **Setup Store**  
   Add your store name and click **Save**. The system will automatically start pulling new orders.

4. **Sync Past Orders**  
   To retrieve past orders (up to 14 days), create a cron job with the type **Get Zid Orders** and run it. You can then view your orders on the **Orders** page.

5. **Sync with Zoho Inventory**  
   - Go to the **Inventory** page on Tlaaq and add a new inventory.  
   - Tlaaq will redirect you to Zoho for account linking confirmation.  
   - Once linked, create a cron job with the type **Zoho Sale Order**, adding store and Zoho metadata.

6. **Monitor and Manage**  
   View and manage your orders seamlessly through the Tlaaq platform.

name: INFN Analytics.
short_description: INFN delivers comprehensive analytics and insights for Zid stores to maximize sales growth
description:
**The Problem:**
Running a successful Zid store means juggling multiple challenges - tracking sales performance, understanding customer behavior, managing inventory, recovering abandoned carts, and making data-driven decisions. Most merchants struggle with:

- **Scattered Data:** Sales, customers, and product data spread across different reports
- **Manual Analysis:** Spending hours creating reports instead of growing the business
- **Lost Revenue:** Missing abandoned cart recovery and customer retention opportunities
- **Poor Visibility:** Not knowing which products perform best or which customers are most valuable
- **Reactive Management:** Making business decisions based on gut feeling rather than data

 **How INFN Helps:**

- **Unified Analytics Dashboard:** All your Zid store data in one comprehensive platform - sales, customers, products, and performance metrics at a glance.

- **AI-Powered Insights:** Get intelligent recommendations for pricing, inventory, marketing campaigns, and customer retention automatically.

- **Revenue Recovery:** Automated abandoned cart recovery with personalized messages to convert lost sales into revenue.

- **Customer Intelligence:** Understand customer lifetime value, purchase behavior, and segmentation for targeted marketing.

- **Real-Time Monitoring:** Live dashboard updates with instant notifications for important business events.

- **Business Growth:** Make data-driven decisions that increase sales, reduce costs, and improve customer satisfaction.

**Result:** Transform your Zid store from reactive management to proactive growth with actionable insights that drive real business results.

**Integration Steps:**
1. Choose the plan that best suits your needs.
2. Activate the application.
3. The integration will be complete, and you can start using the app.

name: WebEngage
short_description:
WebEngage marketing automation helps you boost retention, recover carts,and drive 
repeat purchases
description:
**WebEngage** helps eCommerce brands turn shoppers into loyal customers with data-
driven engagement. Our platform unifies customer data, enabling brands to send 
personalized marketing communications across 12+ channels, including email, on-
site notification, sms, WhatsApp, and more. From recovering abandoned carts to 
boosting repeat purchases, WebEngage helps online retailers increase revenue, 
improve retention, and create seamless shopping journeys that keep customers 
coming back.
The **WebEngage** & Zid integration can help eCommerce brands solve key challenges and 
improve customer engagement.
**Personalized Welcome Journeys**
Automatically engage new Zid store visitors with personalized emails, WhatsApp messages,
or SMS, offering exclusive discounts or product recommendations based on their browsing 
behavior.
**Abandoned Cart Recovery**
Trigger automated reminders via WhatsApp, email, or SMS to bring customers back to 
complete their purchases, increasing Zid merchants’ conversion rates.
**Personalized Product Recommendations**
Use WebEngage’s AI-driven segmentation to suggest relevant products based on past 
purchases and browsing history, increasing Zid merchants’ average order value (AOV).
**Win-Back Campaigns for Dormant Customers**
Re-engage Zid store customers who haven't purchased in a while with exclusive discounts, 
personalized offers, or reminders of previously viewed items.
**Post-Purchase Upselling & Cross-Selling**
After a customer makes a purchase, suggest complementary products or upgrades via 
email, WhatsApp, or push notifications to increase repeat transactions.
**Feedback & Review Collection**
Automatically request reviews or feedback after a purchase, helping Zid merchants improve
product quality, customer service, and social proof.
**Festival & Seasonal Campaigns**
Leverage WebEngage’s automation to run time-sensitive campaigns during Ramadan, 
Black Friday, or other key sales periods, ensuring Zid merchants maximize engagement 
and sales.
**Behavioral Segmentation for Targeted Campaigns**
Segment customers based on their browsing history, purchase frequency, cart activity, and 
engagement levels to deliver hyper-personalized offers.
**Product & Revenue Analytics**: Unlock powerful customer insights and analytics with WebEngage’s analytics dashboard.
**The Integration and App Activation steps :**
1. Choose the suited plan for your needs.
2. Click on the application activation button.
3. Agree to the permissions and install the application.
4. Login information will be sent to the primary email address of the store.
5. Log in to the WebEngage platform. You will receive a 14-day trial version of the 
application.
6. Activation will be done directly.
7. Historical user and order data start appearing directly in the dashboard.
8. You will be contacted by the WebEngage team to receive the requirements to start
campaigns and create user engagement journeys on the platform.
9. After the 14 day trial period is over, you will be required to make payment for the chosen
plan to continue the services.
10. WebEngage team will support and advise on 3rd party channel activation requirements.
11. Upon subscribing to this product, you must acknowledge and agree to the terms and
conditions outlined in the **[Online subscription agreement]**(https://webengage.com/zid-agreement/).
**Important note:**
- The subscription does not include additional channels like Email, SMS and Whatsapp.
These are charged for seperately . Only the integration of these channels will be included in
the monthly plan.
- The merchant is obligated to disclose the correct number of orders at the time of
subscription going live. At the end of the billing period, if the number of orders exceeds the
plan limit, the merchant will be moved to the next available plan.
plan_offer: Subscribe for one year and get one year for free

name: Omolaat
short_description: Boost sales with affiliate marketing! Easy setup, real results, and pay only for performance.
description:
**Omolaat – Affiliate Marketing for Zid Stores**

**Omolaat** helps you grow your Zid store sales easily through **affiliate marketing**, by connecting your store with a network of high-quality affiliate marketers who promote your products and earn commissions on actual sales.

Registration starts first on the Omolaat platform. After your store is reviewed based on our criteria, **our team will contact you** to complete the next steps and launch your affiliate program.

**Key Features:**
- Increase your store sales through affiliate marketers
- Simple and smooth integration with Zid
- Clear reports to track affiliate performance and commissions
- Commissions are paid **only when sales are completed**

**How to Get Started:**
1. **Review the [Acceptance Criteria](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1cBdJAdEQTYXpdVcRy5qfupLHEge0XMfm/view?usp=drive_link)** and ensure your store is eligible.
2. **Register your store** via this [link](https://my.omolaat.com/?type=store).
3. Your store will be **reviewed by the Omolaat team** based on the criteria.
4. Once approved, **our team will contact you** to complete the setup.
5. After confirmation, you can **install the Omolaat app from Zid** and finalize the integration.

**Start today and let Omolaat become your partner in growing your store sales through affiliate marketing.**

name: Tafadi Security
short_description: They request COD and do not receive it, causing you to pay shipping losses. Try Tafadi for Free now
description:
Tafadi protects your store from clients who orders COD but don't receive them, costing you shipping fees! also safeguards against fraudsters who forge receipts to steal from you. Try it for free!

**Our Services (Tafadi):**

**How We Detect Suspicious Customers**
We analyze order count, return rate, and fraud attempts like repeated cancellations or fake receipts. If the conditions are met, the customer is automatically flagged as suspicious — based on their behavior with similar stores and with your own store.

**Order Analysis & Non-serious Customer Detection**
Tafadi analyzes Cash-on-Delivery orders and detects customers who frequently cancel or don't receive their orders, helping reduce shipping losses.

**Automated Blacklist Management**
Automatically tracks and adds suspicious or unreliable customers to a blacklist in your store, restricting their ability to pay with COD.

**Fraudulent Receipt Detection**
Tafadi identifies customers who upload fake bank payment receipts and automatically flags or blocks them.

**Weekly & Monthly Reports**
Get clear, data-driven reports about return orders, repeat offenders, and estimated losses so you can make informed business decisions.

**Fully Automated Operation**
No manual work needed. Once subscribed, Tafadi runs automatically—analyzing, flagging, reporting, and syncing with your store.


**Our Features**
Detection of non-serious customers

Automated blacklist management

Fake bank receipt detection

Detailed periodic reports

Direct integration with ئهي platform

Continuous order & customer updates

Advanced fraud protection

Fully automated operation

Free trial with no commitment


**Integration Steps**
1. Choose the plan that suits you
2. Activate the app from the Zid App Store
3. The integration will be completed instantly
plan_offer: Subscribe for one year and get one year for free

name: NeraPOS
short_description: NeraPOS: A powerful, seamless Accounting and POS app for efficient retail and smart integration.
description:
Welcome to **NeraPOS** – Your cutting-edge **point-of-sale solution** designed to empower retailers with simplicity and efficiency. Now fully integrated with the **Zid platform**, **NeraPOS** transforms the way you manage sales, inventory, and customer experiences.

**Why Choose NeraPOS?**  
- **Seamless Integration:** Easily connect with **Zid** to streamline your business operations and synchronize your store effortlessly.
- **Enhanced Efficiency:** Our platform automates key processes so you can focus on growing your business.
- **User-Friendly Interface:** **Intuitive dashboards** and straightforward controls make transaction management a breeze.
- **Real-Time Analytics:** Access detailed reports and analytics that provide insights to drive smarter business decisions.
- **Reliability & Support:** Trust in a proven POS system backed by a dedicated support team ready to help whenever you need it.

**Key Features:**  
- **Inventory Management:** Track stock levels in real time, manage orders, and optimize reordering to meet demand.
- **Sales Optimization:** Process sales quickly and accurately, reducing wait times and boosting customer satisfaction.
- **Customer Engagement:** Build loyalty with data-driven insights and personalized service offerings.
- **Secure Transactions:** Enjoy secure payment processing and data protection that meets the highest industry standards.
- **Customizable Reports:** Generate detailed, customizable reports that help you understand every aspect of your store’s performance.

Integrating **NeraPOS** with **Zid** brings you a unified solution that reduces manual work, minimizes errors, and increases operational transparency. Whether you’re a small boutique or a large retail chain, our flexible platform scales with your business, ensuring that every transaction is smooth and every customer leaves satisfied.
**Integration Steps:**
1. Choose the plan that best suits your needs.
2. Activate the application.
3. The integration will be complete, and you can start using the app.

Join the growing community of successful retailers who trust **NeraPOS** to deliver exceptional in-store experiences. Embrace the future of retail management with a solution that not only meets modern demands but also anticipates tomorrow’s challenges. Get started today and transform your business operations with a tool designed for success and simplicity.

Elevate your business with **NeraPOS** – where **innovation** meets **practicality** in every sale.

name: Subsbase Lite
short_description: Simplify subscriptions with Subsbase Lite! Manage and grow your recurring revenue effortlessly.
description:
The **Subsbase Lite App** is a lightweight, embedded version of Subsbase’s comprehensive subscription management platform. Designed to integrate seamlessly with Zid merchants, the app empowers e-commerce businesses to effortlessly create and manage subscription packages, automate recurring orders, and provide a streamlined subscription experience for customers.

While the Subsbase Lite App is a simplified version made for the Zid platform, businesses can unlock the full suite of Subsbase's powerful tools by exploring the complete software solution available on the [Subsbase website](https://subsbase.com/platform-page).

### With Subsbase Lite, Zid merchants can:

- **Create and Customize Subscription Packages**: Tailor subscription products that fit your products and customer needs, whether you're selling consumables, personal care items, or niche products.
- **Automate Recurring Orders**: Streamline fulfillment by setting automated delivery schedules, lead times, and cut-off dates, reducing manual tasks and ensuring a consistent customer experience.
- **Track and Manage Subscriptions**: Access a simple yet powerful dashboard to monitor performance, manage subscribers, and track orders—all in real time.
- **Seamless Checkout Integration**: The app embeds directly into Zid’s checkout flow, ensuring a smooth experience for customers as they subscribe to your products.

### Why Choose Subsbase Lite?

- **Simplified Subscription & Recurring Order Management**: Whether you're new to subscriptions or looking for an easy way to manage recurring services, Subsbase Lite has everything you need to get started.
- **Customer Retention & Revenue Growth**: Subscriptions are proven to improve customer retention while providing predictable, recurring revenue for your business.
- **A Great Deal Across the Board**: Perfect for food delivery, wellness, beauty, personal care, retail, and more.

### Try the Subsbase Lite Demo Store  
Want to see Subsbase Lite in action before integrating it into your Zid store? Explore our **live demo store** to experience how subscriptions work firsthand.  

**Demo Store Credentials:**  
- **Username**: komvwi9ng1@zam-partner.email
- **Password**: 123456

### Get Started with Subsbase Lite for Zid:

1. Select the plan that best fits your needs.
2. Activate the app via the Zid App Market.
3. Enjoy seamless and automatic integration.
4. Start creating subscription packages.
5. Onboard subscribers.

Make your Zid store stand out by offering convenience, flexibility, and a seamless subscription experience with Subsbase Lite today.

### Enjoying Subsbase Lite? Migrate to Full-Featured Subsbase!

Start with Subsbase Lite to offer subscription services effortlessly, and as your business grows, explore our full-featured Subsbase platform for advanced capabilities like analytics, billing automation, and integrations with other tools.
For more details, visit [Subsbase website](https://subsbase.com/platform-page).

### Need More Help?  
For detailed instructions on how to use the Subsbase Lite App, check out our comprehensive [Merchant's Guide to Subsbase Lite App](https://docs.subsbase.com/rom-guide/subsbase-lite-english).

name: Phenix Integration
short_description: Connect your Zid webstore to the Phenix system with this integration application.
description:
Integrate your Zid webstore with the Phenix system using this application, which allows you to synchronize items, customers, and orders.

**Activation Steps:**
1- Log in to the Z Store, then go to the "App Market" tab.
2- From the "Apps for Your Store" section, select the Phenix app, then click "App Details", followed by "Activate App",  a page will appear asking you to enter an ID, this ID is obtained from Phenix support team.
3- After entering this ID, click the "Proceed" button, then the "Install App" button, a message will appear indicating that the process was successful..

name: DSFulfill
short_description: DSFulfill is a SAAS tool for Dropshipping
description:
**DSFulfill** is a cloud-based ERP system designed for dropshipping suppliers, agents and cross-border distributors. It solves core pain points such as procurement, order management, and logistics tracking through one-stop automation tools, helping companies to efficiently operate global dropshipping businesses.

​​**Core Services**​​
​​**Omnichannel Order Integration**​​
Seamlessly connect to 20+ e-commerce platforms such as Zid, ​​Shopify, WooCommerce, TikTok Shop​​, synchronize orders in real time, and support unified management of multiple stores/multiple brands.

Automated procurement: After the customer places an order, the system automatically triggers 1688/Ali Express procurement to reduce manual operations.

​​**Intelligent supply chain management**​​
​​Cross-border distribution inventory​​: Upload exclusive product libraries, support differentiated pricing by customer/country (markup mode), and flexibly adapt to wholesale and retail scenarios.

​​**Logistics Automation**​​
Integrate ​​10+ cross-border logistics APIs such as Yuntu, Yanwen, and 4PX​​ to automatically generate waybills, print labels, and return logistics tracking numbers to customer orders.

Automatically calculate freight, support customs declaration templates, and reduce compliance risks.
​**​Customer Portal System**​​
Provide a branded customized domain portal, where customers can query quotes, submit purchase requirements, track order status, and improve service experience.
Multi-language support (Chinese/English/Spanish/Portuguese/Saudi), suitable for global customers.

**Data-driven decision-making**​​
Real-time reports analyze sales, profits, logistics timeliness and other data to optimize product selection and operation strategies.

**How to use DSFulfill:**
I. **Installation and authorization**
1. Click "Install" to enter, select "Register", fill in the information, and accept the email verification code to complete the registration.
2. Click "Install" again to enter the authorization page, click "OK" to complete the authorization.
II. **Publish products to the store**
1. In the "Winning Products" menu, select the product and click "Import List".
2. In the "Import List" menu, click "Review and Publish", select your store, and click "OK" to put it on the shelf.
III. **Order Quotation and Fulfillment**
1. In the "Order" menu, click "Synchronize Order" to obtain your store order, click "Request Quote", and we will quote within 2 working days.
2. When you accept the quotation and click "Pay", the order will start to be fulfilled. For the first time, please find the "Finance" menu in the upper right corner and recharge.
3. Once we complete the shipment, the logistics waybill number will be automatically synchronized to the store. When the buyer signs for it, the order is fulfilled.

name: mulsaq
short_description: Mulsaq is a tool for online store owners to design professional labels and badges for their products
description:
**Application Features:**
1. Add Stickers and Annotations to Images: Give your product images a unique touch that highlights key details.
2. Distinctive Badges for Product Description: Add explanatory badges above and below the product name and price.
3. Direct Sticker Design on Product Images: Design stickers directly on your product images to ensure accuracy and clarity before finalizing. The app allows real-time preview of edits.
4. Library of Professional Ready-Made Stickers: Browse our diverse collection of stickers suitable for all promotions and occasions.
5. Create Custom Text Stickers: Design your own stickers to add a personal touch that reflects your brand identity.
6. Upload Images from Your Device: Easily upload and customize your images to align with your vision.


**Customization and Editing**
1. Edit and Customize Image Stickers/Badges:
- Position: Place the sticker over the product image or within its description, depending on the design.
- Size: Adjust sticker dimensions to match the image size and highlight key elements.
- Rotation: Rotate the sticker to achieve the perfect angle.
- Transparency: Adjust transparency levels for the desired visual effect.
- Distance from Edges: Set the spacing between the sticker and image borders for a balanced design.
- Animation: Add animated effects to stickers, with options to choose animation type and adjust speed for dynamic appeal.

2. Edit and Customize Text Stickers/Badges:
- Position: Choose to place the badge over the image or in the description.
- Text Input: Add custom text to reflect product details or promotional messages.
- Icon Addition/Selection: Add icons and adjust their position within the badge.
- Background Shape: Customize the badge’s background shape, color, and edge sharpness.
- Font: Choose font type, color, size, boldness, and shadow effects for clarity and visual appeal.
- Dimensions: Adjust the badge’s length and width to fit the product design.
- Rotation: Rotate the badge for optimal placement.
- Transparency: Modify transparency for a balanced visual effect.
- Distance from Edges: Set spacing from badge edges for element alignment.
- Animation: Apply animated effects to badges, with control over animation type and speed.

**Targeting Options:**
1. Select all products.
2. Select by specific product.
3. Select all except specific products.
4. Select by category.
5. Select all except specific categories.

**Integration Steps:**
1. Choose the plan that best suits your needs.
2. Activate the application.
3. You will receive an email with your password—use it to log in to the app.
4. The integration will be complete, and you can start using the app.

name: Zoho From Fai
short_description: Link your store with the most accounting system through FaiSync and enjoy automating all your data!
description:
**Link your store with Zoho:**
Activate linking your online store with Zoho using the Fai Sync tool. 
With us you can automate data collection and automatically sync sales and inventory. By using Fai Sync, which specializes in connectivity, you will be able to facilitate and automate processes, eliminate manual errors, and save time and effort in processing and relaying processes so that you can focus on increasing your sales.

If you are subject to Phase 2 of electronic invoicing, feel free to contact us anytime for assistance in smoothly transitioning to this phase and fully leveraging the capabilities of the "Fai" system to support and ensure your compliance with regulations and requirements.


**What are the advantages link Your online store?**
* Migration: Requests are automatically migrated, with the ability to specify the periods to be migrated.
* Request Status: Ability to specify the status of the request to be migrated.
* Inventory: Quantities are migrated from your store to your accounting system.
* Integration: FaiSync allows you to link multiple stores to a single accounting system.
* Ease of Use: Easy-to-use interface for accountants to follow up on operations and reconcile accounts.
* 24/7 Support: Technical support available 24/7.

**What do you need to get started?**
* An active account on the Zid platform
*  An active account on the Fai system
* An active account in the Zoho system
The activation process is easy and will not take you more than a few minutes, and if you need help with this step, we are fully prepared to provide full support.

**Linkage mechanism:** 

1. Choose the package that suits you and install the app.
2. Log in to your Zoho account.
3. Activate the Fai Sync app from your Zid store and log in to the app.
4. You can then customize automation settings and integration.
* It will be linked directly!

name: Loops App
short_description: Loops unifies order management across all sales channels for e-commerce sellers.
description:
Loops is a powerful platform that connects your Zid store with multiple e-commerce and fulfillment channels.

With Loops, you can:
*   Automatically sync products and inventory
*   Manage orders from multiple marketplaces in one place
*   Generate shipping labels and track deliveries centrally
*   Monitor sales performance with unified analytics

**Integration steps**

*Pre-Requisite*
You mush have an accout into Loops and it should be active. You create an account via this [link](https://sellerhub.staging.loops.sa/sign-up).

After that you can integrate your zid store with Loops in 2 ways.

***Way 1***

**1.** Login to the Loops from this page: [Link](https://sellerhub.loops.sa/sign-in)

**2.** Go to Add Credentials page from Side Menu and Select Zid Credntials Tab, or follow this [link](https://sellerhub.staging.loops.sa/callback-zid)

**3.** Click on the button with Text **Login with Zid** and it will take you to Zid Application on Zid portal and open Loops App.

**4.** You will see the permission Loops need. Install the application by clicking Button **Install the App**. 

**5.** It will take you back to Loops and there you will you Zid Merchant accoutn Attached into Loops.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

***Way 2***

**1.** Search Loops app on Zid Market or open it directly via this [Link](https://web.zid.sa/market/app/4685)

**2.** Activate the app By clicking the Button Activate the App.

**3.** It will redirect you to page where you see the permission Loops need.
Install the app by clicking **Install the App** button.

**4.** You will be redirected to Loops where you will see your store connected.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
**Note**: Watch a short video([Link](https://www.youtube.com/embed/pj6CboBPO4k)) for integration flow. 

Loops helps growing businesses simplify daily operations, reduce manual work, and scale faster by turning complex integrations into a plug-and-play experience.

name: AliExpress - Auto Drop
short_description: Auto Drop simplifies importing AliExpress products, automating orders, and tracking
description:
**Auto Drop** dropshipping application, your first step to success in e-commerce.

Our app **Auto Drop** works to provide an easy and smooth tool through which you can obtain thousands of distinctive products from dropshipping sites such as AliExpress platform and upload them to your store, while providing the ability to complete orders and track their status automatically without any fatigue or effort.

**With us from now**:

1. You do not need a huge financial budget or capital to start.
2. Have wide range of products.
3. Scalability of your business.
4. Not incurring storage and distribution costs.


With **Auto Drop** dropshipping has become easier. Now enjoy a new and distinctive experience.

###### **Integration Steps**:

**1. Connecting ZID Store with AutoDrop
**

name: Social Lab WA updates
short_description: Enable managing messages quickly and smoothly on the WhatsApp platform to improve communication.
description:
Social Lab is the result of our extensive marketing experience in managing e-commerce stores.

**Engage with Your Customers and Boost Your Sales:  **

With the absence of human interaction in an e-commerce store, automated messages provide an effective communication channel with customers. Greet them, send discount codes, and share special offers to encourage purchases.


**Smart Interaction with Abandoned Carts:  **

Our app offers effective options to interact with abandoned carts, helping improve the efficiency of advertising campaigns. By reaching out to customers who have left their carts, you can motivate them to complete their purchase, increasing the chances of making the final buying decision.

**Launch Your Marketing Campaigns with One Click:  **

Celebrate special occasions with your customers, such as holidays. This feature helps you engage with your customers and boost sales during shopping seasons.


**Stay Updated on All Order Changes:  **

Our app keeps you informed about all updates related to new orders in your store, sending order status updates directly to your phone, not just to customers. Stay connected quickly and instantly with every new update in your store!

**Easily Connect Your Number via QR or API with Advanced Features:**

Our app lets you easily connect your number via a direct QR code or through official API integration. Enjoy advanced features such as a smart messaging platform, high file storage, and a WhatsApp bot response tree, which helps improve the efficiency of your customer support team.

**Automate All the Order Notifications You Need:  **

* Automated messages for abandoned carts  

* Automated messages with discount codes  

* Welcome messages for new customers  

* Automated messages upon order reception  

* Automated updates on order details  

* Automated notifications for shipping status updates at all stages  

* Automated post-order evaluation messages  

* Customizable additional notifications based on your needs



**Regular Reports and Ongoing Technical Support for Your Store's Success:  **

Our app provides detailed, periodic reports on sent messages and their engagement, alongside continuous technical support and a stable system to ensure a seamless and exceptional experience.


**How to Use Social Lab**

1.  Install and Activate the Social Lab app from your Zid store.

2. Receive Your Login Credentials, you will automatically receive your credentials via email, WhatsApp, and SMS along with login instructions.

3. Log In to Social Lab using your username (email or mobile) and password to log in at sociallab.sa or getsociallab.com .

4. Link Your WhatsApp Number, go to "Settings".

5. Link your WhatsApp number using your preferred method: QR code or API.

6. From the side menu, go to "Zid".

7. Under the "Select" option, choose the WhatsApp number you want to use for sending notifications and promotions.

8. Configure and Manage Notifications: inside the Zid section, you will find two tabs:

* Settings: Customize your automated messages for customers. Don’t forget to activate targeted notifications.

* Notifications: View all sent notifications along with their delivery status. You can also resend failed notifications from here.

9. Need Help? If you experience any issues or have questions, please do not hesitate to contact us anytime.
plan_offer: Subscribe for one year and get one year for free

name: Zid Sheets Integration
short_description: Sync Zid store data to Google Sheets orders, products, stock and more. No coding needed
description:
**Zid Sheets Integration – Sync Your Store with Google Sheets in Seconds**
Tired of manual exports, missed orders, or digging through your dashboard? Zid Sheets Integration is a simple yet powerful app that automatically connects your Zid store with Google Sheets, giving you real-time access to your data — all in one organized place.

 **What This App Does**
This integration syncs your key store data directly into a spreadsheet, including:
* Orders
* Products (Coming soon)
* Customers (Coming soon)
* Abandoned carts

All updates are automatic, cleanly structured, and ready for analysis, reporting, or archiving.

 **Integration Steps**
 **Connect Your Zid Account**
1. Choose the plan that best suits your needs
2. Activate application
3. The app is ready to use now.

 **Example Usage for live data export**
 **Authorize Google Sheets**
Choose the spreadsheet you want to use — your data goes straight there.

 **Choose What to Sync**
Select one or more categories: orders, products, customers, and more.

 **Enjoy Auto Updates**
The app checks your store regularly and registers only new or updated data in the next empty row — without touching previous data.

 **Stay Organized**
Each record is clearly tagged and easy to filter or search. You can build dashboards, export reports, or even connect to tools like Data Studio.

***Why Use Zid Sheets Integration?***
* No code or setup headache 
* Cleaner, more accessible reports
* Works with your existing Sheets workflows
* Ideal for accountants, marketers, analysts, and business owners
* Cheaper and faster than using Zapier or building custom solutions

***Real-World Examples***
View all new orders with full customer and product details — instantly.

Monitor stock changes daily without logging in to the Zid dashboard.

Analyze cart abandonment trends and build retargeting lists.

Export your data anytime, anywhere, without a single export button.

Start syncing your Zid store to Google Sheets — automatically, securely, and hassle-free.

name: 3D AR Scanner
short_description: Scan products into 3D and AR models and publish automatically in your Zid store within 10 minutes.
description:
**What is the 3D AR Scanner App?**

The **3D AR Scanner App** helps you transform your products into 3D models and display them using Augmented Reality inside your Zid store — easily and without any technical expertise.

**Benefits for Merchants:**
* **Increase sales:** Customers can view products in realistic 3D before purchasing, which boosts their confidence.
* **Reduce returns:** Customers can verify the size, shape, and fit with AR before completing the order.
* **Advanced shopping experience:** Products appear in an interactive and attractive way, making your store stand out from competitors.
* **Save time and cost:** No need for professional equipment or complex technical knowledge, everything works directly from your phone.

**Core Functions:**
* Connect the store and automatically sync products.
* Scan a product and convert it into a 3D model, then publish it automatically in the store within 5 to 10 minutes.
* Display products in Augmented Reality (AR) directly inside the product page.
* Display products in a 3D Viewer with interactive controls (zoom, rotate, scale).

**Important Notes:**
* The app works only on **iOS devices (iPhone and iPad)**.
* Best scanning results are achieved with **stable, non-reflective products under good lighting**.

**Activation Steps:**

1- From **Zid App Market**, install the **3D AR Scanner App**.

2- You will be directed to the activation page: click **Download the App** to get it from the Apple Store.

3- After downloading, return to the activation page and log in either by:
* Scan the QR code with your camera, or
* Enter your email to receive the login link, or
* Getting a **Pairing Code** by clicking the link at the bottom of the page, then copy the code and paste it inside the app..

After logging in, your store will automatically sync and all your products will appear inside the app.

inside the app, select the product you want to scan, then click **Capture Model** to perform the scan, and afterwards click **Upload** to automatically publish the 3D & AR model to your store

name: QmQm
short_description: Use interactive product videos instead of images for a more engaging shopping experience.
description:
**QmQm** offers an advanced solution for creating interactive marketing videos for products within online stores. Its main goal is to enhance the visitor experience and increase the effectiveness of visual content compared to traditional images or static videos.

✅ **Key Features**:

	•	Easy Integration of Existing Videos

Videos can be imported effortlessly from YouTube or uploaded directly from a personal device.

	•	Extensive Support for Interactive Elements

**Including**:

	•	Text overlays

	•	Images

	•	Interactive hotspots

	•	Buttons and multiple-choice options

	•	And a variety of other tools that enrich the viewing experience

	•	Improved Shopping Experience

By transforming the conventional product showcase into an interactive journey, **QmQm** helps customers better understand products and make more informed decisions.

	•	**Built-in AI Interaction**

Visitors can ask questions during the video, and QmQm’s AI will respond instantly within the same video—eliminating the need to leave the store or wait for input from other users.

🛠️ **How to Install QmQm on Zid Stores**

To start using **QmQm** and unlock its full capabilities, follow these steps:

1.	Open the Zid App Store

Search for the “QmQm” app and open its dedicated page.

	2.	Click “Install”

Grant the required permissions to enable QmQm to function properly within your store.

	3.	Verify Activation

Go to your store’s control panel and make sure QmQm appears as an active application.

	4.	Account Creation

A QmQm account is created automatically, and login details are sent to your email.

	5.	Create Interactive Videos on QmQm

After logging in, you can start creating the interactive videos you want.

	6.	Enable Integration

Return to the QmQm app page in your Zid store and activate the integration.

	7.	Add the Video ID

	•	Select the relevant product or category

	•	Enter the video’s unique ID in the designated field

	Note:

The video ID can be found by going to the project page in QmQm Studio and clicking the “Share” button at the top left of the screen. The ID will be displayed alongside other sharing options.

	8.	Preview and Confirm

Open the product or category page where the video was added and ensure it appears correctly in the intended location.
public_description:
**QmQm** offers an advanced solution for creating interactive marketing videos for products within online stores. Its main goal is to enhance the visitor experience and increase the effectiveness of visual content compared to traditional images or static videos.

✅ **Key Features**:

	•	Easy Integration of Existing Videos

Videos can be imported effortlessly from YouTube or uploaded directly from a personal device.

	•	Extensive Support for Interactive Elements

**Including**:

	•	Text overlays

	•	Images

	•	Interactive hotspots

	•	Buttons and multiple-choice options

	•	And a variety of other tools that enrich the viewing experience

	•	Improved Shopping Experience

By transforming the conventional product showcase into an interactive journey, **QmQm** helps customers better understand products and make more informed decisions.

	•	**Built-in AI Interaction**

Visitors can ask questions during the video, and QmQm’s AI will respond instantly within the same video—eliminating the need to leave the store or wait for input from other users.

🛠️ **How to Install QmQm on Zid Stores**

To start using **QmQm** and unlock its full capabilities, follow these steps:

1.	Open the Zid App Store

Search for the “QmQm” app and open its dedicated page.

	2.	Click “Install”

Grant the required permissions to enable QmQm to function properly within your store.

	3.	Verify Activation

Go to your store’s control panel and make sure QmQm appears as an active application.

	4.	Account Creation

A QmQm account is created automatically, and login details are sent to your email.

	5.	Create Interactive Videos on QmQm

After logging in, you can start creating the interactive videos you want.

	6.	Enable Integration

Return to the QmQm app page in your Zid store and activate the integration.

	7.	Add the Video ID

	•	Select the relevant product or category

	•	Enter the video’s unique ID in the designated field

	Note:

The video ID can be found by going to the project page in QmQm Studio and clicking the “Share” button at the top left of the screen. The ID will be displayed alongside other sharing options.

	8.	Preview and Confirm

Open the product or category page where the video was added and ensure it appears correctly in the intended location.

name: Give A Gift
short_description: Digital store allowing customers to send Gift cards to their  loved ones
description:
What is **GIVE A GIFT**?

**GIVE A GIFT** is an innovative digital platform specializing in electronic gift cards. It allows customers to send customized gift cards to their friends and loved ones in a modern and convenient way through WhatsApp.

It also enables merchants to connect their stores with our platform, making their brand available as one of the options customers can choose when purchasing a gift card. This helps expand your brand’s reach and increase your sales through a seamless digital gifting experience.

**Why join us as a merchant?**

We offer a unique opportunity to increase your sales and reach new customers who are looking for a flexible, digital, and fast gifting experience.
When you subscribe with us, your store becomes an available option in our app, allowing customers to purchase a gift card and select your store with ease.
We provide customers with a unique digital gift card code that can be redeemed in your store, deducting the gift card value directly from their shopping cart.
We then reimburse these amounts to you after deducting the agreed commission stated in the contract.
In addition, we continuously promote our app to attract more customers to your store.

**Key benefits for merchants**
	•	Reach new customers looking for stores that offer redeemable gift cards.
	•	Secure and guaranteed payments, with amounts transferred to you after the card is redeemed.
	•	Increase your brand visibility by being featured in the gift card options available in the app.
	•	Flexible payment process, as subscription fees are deducted automatically from your sales after the agreed commission.
	•	Simple and convenient for customers, who only need the recipient’s phone number to send the gift.

**Activation steps**
	1.	Install and activate the app from the Zid App Market.
	2.	The GIVE A GIFT marketing team will contact you via email to sign the contract, provide details of the sales commission, and activate your account.
	3.	Your account will be activated on GIVE A GIFT, and your store will be added to the list of available stores so customers can select it when purchasing gift cards.

**Supported countries**

The app is available for merchants in Saudi Arabia and GCC countries.

📩 For more information, contact us via [giveagift.sa@gmail.com]

In today’s market, ads alone are no longer enough.
Success in advertising isn’t just about budget—it’s about the power of your content and its actual impact.

name: Pointat - Loyalty System
short_description: A powerful loyalty system that boosts repeat sales and fosters customer engagement.
description:
Smart Loyalty System for Your Store — Earn Customer Loyalty & Boost Sales 🚀

👍 **Encourage Their Loyalty – Promote Repeat Purchases**
A streamlined points program allows your customers to collect points with every purchase, as well as by reviewing the store or creating account on your store.

🎁 **Customizable Rewards by You**
Redeemable points can be converted into coupons of fixed or percentage discount of order total, free product or free shipping, with full control over the required points and expiration terms.

📝**Why Choose Our System?**
* Multiple-reward points system encourages customers to buy more frequently
* Detailed reports & analytics help improve targeting and campaign effectiveness
* Automated operation & marketing intelligence boost engagement with minimal manual effort
* Full integration with your sales channels ensures a seamless user experience

✅ **Proven Effectiveness**

*     Effective loyalty programs achieve a 15–25% annual increase in customer repeat rate and average spend
*     79% of online shoppers become more loyal when a simple points program is available

⚙️ **Get Started in Easy Steps:**
1.     Install the app on your store.
2.     Navigate to the app page in your store dashboard.
3.     Customize settings according to your store strategy.
4.     Monitor performance using interactive reports to refine the system and achieve your growth objectives.

By using an integrated loyalty system, you give your customers powerful reasons to return — making every purchase more valuable for both them and you.

name: Javna WhatsApp AI bot
short_description: Try for FREE, AI-Powered Chatbots, campaigns, Boost sales, recover lost carts for WhatsApp.
description:
Take your customer communication experience to a professional level with Javna’s all-in-one WhatsApp communication platform for Zid stores.

From abandoned cart recovery and order updates to marketing campaigns and smart chatbot building — Javna gives you complete control over the customer journey, with no coding required.

**Who is this app for?**
	•	Zid store managers
who want to increase sales and boost loyalty through smart, automated WhatsApp communication.
	•	Marketing teams
looking to launch personalized WhatsApp campaigns in minutes.
	•	Customer support teams
aiming to automate routine inquiries and improve response times.

**What does this app offer?**

Javna connects your Zid store with WhatsApp, enabling you to:
	•	Automate order and payment updates instantly.
	•	Recover lost sales from abandoned carts.
	•	Launch personalized marketing campaigns with automated flows.
	•	Build AI-powered smart chatbots without coding.
	•	Collect customer feedback to improve retention and loyalty.

**Features & Benefits**

**E-commerce Features:**
	•	Order notifications: Send instant alerts for order confirmations, shipping, delivery, and pickups.
	•	Abandoned cart recovery: Automatically remind customers to complete purchases with personalized, urgent messages and smart follow-ups.
	•	Payment & refund messages: Notify customers about pending payments, confirmations, and refunds.

**Marketing Campaigns & WhatsApp Broadcasting:**
	•	Launch custom WhatsApp campaigns with just a few clicks.
	•	Personalize and schedule campaigns by customer segments or order events.

**AI & Automation Package:**
	•	No-code chatbot builder: Create intelligent, multilingual bots to assist customers and boost sales — no coding required.
	•	Flow creation & automation: Build visual message flows triggered by store events like “order delivered” or “cart abandoned.”
	•	WhatsApp template management: Organize, preview, and easily use all approved WhatsApp templates.
	•	Dynamic variable mapping: Automatically insert order or customer information into sent messages.
	•	Sender ID management: Select the right business WhatsApp number for each message or campaign — perfect for multiple brands or numbers.

**Customer Experience Tools:**
	•	Feedback & reviews collection: Automatically request reviews from customers after delivery to strengthen trust and loyalty.
	•	Automated follow-ups: Increase repeat purchases and strengthen customer relationships with smart follow-up messages.

Boost your sales on Zid with the latest WhatsApp communication solutions.

Connect WhatsApp. Build flows. Grow sales.

**By installing Javna’s “all-in-one WhatsApp customer engagement platform.”**

No coding. No limits. Just unmatched communication.

**Integration Steps:**

1. Choose the plan that best suits your needs.
2. Activate the application.
3. Sign up on Javna Cpaas platform "https://console.javna.com"
4. The integration will be complete, and you can start using the app.

name: Rjeha
short_description: One Stop Solution to Manage the Return and Exchange
description:
Transform your returns process from your biggest operational challenge into your strongest competitive advantage with Rjeha. In the fast-paced world of e-commerce, returns management is no longer just a reverse process; it has become an integral part of the customer experience and a genuine opportunity to foster loyalty and increase sales. At Rjeha, we fully understand the significant financial costs and operational effort that Zid merchants face, which is why we have built an integrated solution specifically designed to meet the needs of the Saudi market.

**Why Choose Rjeha for Your Zid Store?**
Rjeha offers a comprehensive solution that goes far beyond simple reverse logistics. We provide a smart technological and logistical ecosystem aimed at achieving three main objectives for your store:

**1. Radically Reduce Operational Costs:** Say goodbye to the high and unpredictable costs of traditional shipping companies. With Rjeha, you benefit from a fixed and transparent pricing model. Our platform automates the manual processes that consume your team's time, from creating a return request and tracking it, to inspecting products and restocking them. This means less time spent on managing returns and lower direct costs, which positively impacts your profit margin.

**2. Build an Exceptional Customer Experience That Increases Loyalty:** Over 70% of shoppers decide to buy again from a store based on the ease of its return process. With Rjeha, you offer your customers a simple and convenient return experience that rivals the purchasing experience itself. Your customer can initiate a return in just a few clicks, receive an instant QR code, and drop off the shipment at any of our "Rjeha Points" located in nearby neighborhoods and shopping centers, without needing to print labels or wait for a courier. This simplicity builds customer trust and keeps them coming back to your store again and again.

**3. Turn Returns into Growth Opportunities Through Data:** Instead of being a black box, Rjeha transforms returns into a rich source of valuable data. Through our analytics dashboard, you can accurately identify the reasons for returns, pinpoint the most frequently returned products, and gain a deeper understanding of your customers' behavior. These insights enable you to improve product descriptions, adjust sizing, and make strategic decisions that reduce future return rates and enhance your store's overall performance.

**4. Seamless and Direct Integration with Your Zid Store:** Our application is designed to integrate perfectly with your Zid store. Once activated, orders are automatically synced, and you can manage everything from a single dashboard, providing you with a comprehensive and unified view of all your operations.

**The Integration and App Activation Steps for Rjeha:**

**1. Subscribe to a Suitable Package:**
Choose and subscribe to the package that best fits your business needs and volume of orders.

**2. Activate the Application:**
After subscription, click on the "Activate Application" button within your dashboard to initiate the setup process.

**3. Grant Permissions and Install:**
Review and agree to the necessary permissions required by Rjeha to access your store data. Once agreed, proceed to install the application.

**4. Receive Login Credentials:**
Upon successful installation, login information and activation instructions will be sent to the primary email address associated with your store account.

**5. Access the Web Engage Platform:**
Use the provided credentials to log in to the Rjeha web engage platform. You will be granted a 14-day free trial to explore and utilize the application features.

**6. Sync Delivered Orders and Manage Returns:**
Connect your store’s delivered orders with Rjeha. This synchronization enables you to efficiently manage the return process, track return requests, and streamline customer service through the platform.

name: e-FATOORA
developer_name: Business Elite LLC and DataValue KSA
short_description:
eFATOORA
Seamless Zid to ZATCA integration for auto-generating compliant electronic invoices phase2
description:
**eFATOORA**
Electronic Invoice App: The Easiest Way to Comply with ZATCA

**The Bottom Line:** This app allows your Zid store to send your invoices **automatically and directly** to the Zakat, Tax and Customs Authority (ZATCA).

**Currently Available for: Simplified Tax Invoices (B2C customer invoices)**

***

**3 Main Reasons eFATOORA is a Must for Your Store:**

1. **Peace of Mind and Time Saving:**
* **No More Complexity:** You don't need to understand the "codes" or "technology" required by ZATCA. The app handles everything for you.
* **One-Step Integration:** It saves you the work of a complete technical team. Install it and forget it.

2. **Protection Against Fines:**
* The app ensures **full compliance** with all Phase Two requirements, from **Digital Signatures** to the **QR Code**.
* This protects you from any issues or fines ZATCA might impose due to delays or errors.

3. **Easy Management and Clear Tracking:**
* You don't need external accounting software. Everything is done within your Zid dashboard.
* You clearly know the status of every invoice: **Accepted**, **Rejected (for resending)**, or **Warning**.

***

**Who is this App for?**
Every Zid store owner who issues customer sales invoices (**B2C**) and wants **automatic, hassle-free compliance** without any technical effort.

**Now you can make your store ZATCA-compliant... with just one click.**

[📞 Contact Us: 0567044363](tel:+966567044363)

[📅 Book an Appointment](https://calendar.app.google/9KgzAAbUPnD82mMp7)

***

**Detailed Setup and Connection Guide**

**Step 1: Prepare Your Zid Store (One Time)**
* Ensure your store details in Zid are 100% complete and correct (Email, National Address, Commercial Name, Commercial Registration number, and Tax number).
* **Important Note on Shipping:** Based on your current store settings, the app will **add VAT to shipping fees**.

**Step 2: Get the Verification Code from the ZATCA Website**

* **Go to the Fatoora platform** via this link: https://fatoora.zatca.gov.sa
* **Log in** using the taxpayer's credentials (the establishment).
* After logging in, click on the option **"Setup a New Unit/Device"** (تهيئة وحدة / جهاز جديد).
* The platform will issue a **Verification Code (One-Time Password)**. This code is only valid for **one hour**.

**Step 3: Activate the App and Connect**

1. Subscribe to the appropriate plan and install the app on your Zid store.
2. Open the app from the Zid dashboard and enter your **Tax Number**.
3. Paste the **Verification Code (OTP)** you obtained from the ZATCA website into the dedicated field in the app.
4. Click **"Connect"**.

**Done! Your invoices are now automatically sent to ZATCA.**

[For More Details on Activation Steps](https://efatoora.app/activation-steps)

name: FitYou
short_description: Smart size guide offering personalized clothing and footwear recommendations by body measurements.
description:
**Project Title: FitYou – Smart Clothing & Footwear Recommendations**

**Overview**

**FitYou** is an intelligent, user-centric recommendation platform that helps individuals find the best-fitting clothing and footwear based on their unique body measurements. Whether shopping anonymously or through a registered profile, FitYou ensures that users receive accurate, personalized suggestions without the guesswork—improving confidence in purchases and reducing returns.

**Core Purpose**

The problem FitYou solves is simple but critical: **finding clothes and shoes that fit just right.** By allowing users to enter key measurements, FitYou delivers data-driven recommendations that match their body profile. Returning users benefit from saved profiles, while new or privacy-focused users can still enjoy tailored results anonymously.

**Key Features**

1. **Measurement-Based Fit Engine**

* Users input key body measurements such as:

  * Height
  * Weight
  * Age
  * Chest / Bust
  * Waist
  * Hips
  * Inseam
  * Thigh
  * Neck
  * Foot size
  *
* FitYou analyzes these inputs using fit-matching algorithms to recommend size that align best with the user’s physical profile.

2. **Anonymous Recommendations**

* Users can access the platform without creating an account.
* They input their measurements and receive instant clothing and footwear recommendations.
* An optional unique session/profile code is generated, enabling them to revisit their recommendations later or leave reviews.

3. **Registered Profiles with Persistent Fit History**

* Users can register or sign in via email.
* Measurements and preferences are stored securely in their profile.
* Upon sign-in, users instantly receive updated recommendations without re-entering measurements.
* Users can manage multiple profiles (e.g., for children or family members).

**Review and Feedback System**

* Users can rate and review the recommended items, helping improve suggestions for themselves and others.
* Reviews can be anonymous or linked to their profile.
* Feedback is used to continuously improve fit accuracy over time.

5. **Profile Reuse and Easy Updates**

* Once signed in, users can:

  * Update measurements
  * Modify preferences (e.g., style, brand, fit type)
  * Track previous recommendations
* This makes FitYou ideal for seasonal shopping, fitness journeys, or changing sizes.

**User Experience Flows**

**Anonymous User Journey**

1. Open the FitYou app or website.
2. Choose “Continue Anonymously”
3. Input basic measurements.
4. Receive personalized product recommendations.
5. Leave a review (optional).
6. Save or copy a profile code to return later.

**Registered User Journey**

1. Sign in or register with an account.
2. Existing measurements and preferences are auto-loaded.
3. Instantly get updated recommendations.
4. Review, update profile, or shop with confidence.
5. Save favorites or track past purchases.

**Use Cases**

* Online clothing or shoe shoppers who are unsure of sizing across brands.
* Fitness enthusiasts tracking changes in fit due to body transformation.
* Parents managing sizing for kids.
* Shoppers looking for a consistent fit experience across multiple retailers.

**Benefits**

* Reduces product return rates due to size/fit issues.
* Increases user satisfaction and confidence in online shopping.
* Offers both privacy and personalization.
* Encourages loyalty through persistent profiles and history tracking.

**Conclusion**

**FitYou** is redefining the online fashion shopping experience by focusing on what truly matters—**fit**. Whether you're browsing for a new pair of shoes or a perfect-fit jacket, FitYou ensures that your body measurements guide you to the right choices. No more guessing, no more unnecessary returns—just confident shopping, every time.
