name: Shaa | Customer wallet
short_description: Turn your clients into marketers. Each invites friends, gets a commission, and they get a discount
description:
#### Specialized Referral System  
**What does it mean?**  
It turns your customers into salespeople for you. They get a special discount code to share with their friends.  
**You win.. your customer wins.. everyone wins.**

----

**How Sha'a works**  
1. Your customer makes a purchase at your store.  
2. The referral code is shown to them.  
3. They share the referral with their friends.  
4. Their friends buy with a discount.  
5. Your customer earns a commission in their store wallet.  
6. The customer can convert their commissions into discount coupons and shop at your store.  

**Sha'a Features**  
- Easy-to-use dashboard  
- Data analysis  
- Customer wallet creation in the store  
- Wallet funding  
- Customer segmentation  
- Customer management  

**Activating the app**  
1. Choose the package that suits you.  
2. Click the activate app button.  
3. Log into your account.  
4. Set up referral settings.  
5. The referral will appear immediately for new users.

name: ClickRank - SEO Tool
short_description: ClickRank boosts Zid store SEO with AI titles, meta descriptions, and product content from GSC data.
description:
**ClickRank** is not just a content generator — it’s a complete SEO optimization tool for Zid stores. By connecting with Google Search Console (GSC), ClickRank analyzes your store’s real search performance, then uses AI to rewrite product titles, meta descriptions, and product details in a way that directly improves visibility and ranking.

How it improves SEO:

**Title Rewriting:** ClickRank takes underperforming product titles and rewrites them using real search queries from GSC, making them more relevant and keyword-rich.

**Meta Description Optimization:** Automatically generates attractive meta descriptions that improve click-through rates in Google results.

**Product Description Enhancement:** Uses AI to rewrite and enrich product descriptions with customer-driven keywords, helping your products rank for more search terms.

**Data-Driven Content:** Every optimization is guided by actual search impressions and clicks from GSC, so your store targets what people are really searching for.

**Ongoing Improvement:** With regular updates, ClickRank continues to refine your content as new data flows in, keeping your Zid store competitive.

**Integration Steps:**

1. Choose the plan that best suits your needs.
2. Activate the application.
3. The integration will be complete, and you can start using the app.

**In short, ClickRank saves you time, boosts your store’s SEO, and drives more organic traffic — turning search visibility into real sales.**

name: Momaken
short_description: Complex analysis tasks can be completed for you in moments, giving analyzes ready to make decisions
description:
**Momaken** offer Business Intelligence designed specifically for online stores, a service that allows store owners to access comprehensive and accurate analytics about the performance of their stores within a few seconds, without having to waste time searching manually between reports and data. Through this service, the merchant can track the sales movement on a daily or monthly basis, and know the Most popular products, the most interactive customers, and the times when the store is witnessing remarkable activity. The service also helps him evaluate the performance of shipping companies, identify delivery delays, and return rates, which enables him to make quick decisions to improve the customer experience, which supports smart management and avoid losses. The service displays data through an easy-to-use control panel, and displays all indicators in interactive visual forms that help to understand the data immediately without any technical complexity. It is an integrated service that supports the trader in making strategic decisions based on realistic data, which enhances growth opportunities and increases profits, and gives him a competitive advantage in the e-commerce market.

**Integration Steps:**

2. Activate the application.

name: Zoho Books Accounting
short_description: Automate your invoicing, inventory, and orders with real time VAT compliant reports
description:
Full automation of invoicing, inventory, and orders with accurate tax reports — no manual entry required, so you can focus on growing your sales.  
Connect your **Zid store** with **Zoho Books** through **Apps Bunches**, the official Zoho partner in Saudi Arabia.

**What is Zoho Books?**  
Zoho Books is a cloud-based accounting system from Zoho Corporation, a global leader with over 25 years of experience and trusted by more than 100 million users worldwide.  
It provides you with a complete set of accounting tools to manage invoices, payments, inventory, and financial reports — fully compliant with international standards and Saudi VAT regulations.

**Who is Apps Bunches?**  
Apps Bunches is a Saudi national company, established in 2012 in Riyadh, and an official Zoho partner for the full Zoho suite.  
With proven expertise in building digital systems and integrating them with e-commerce platforms, we are also a certified technology partner for Zid.  
This makes us the trusted choice for connecting your Zid store with Zoho Books — ensuring professional, fast, and reliable integration.

**Try Zoho Books for Free**  
Start your journey with Zoho Books today and take advantage of the free trial to explore the system before making a decision.  

[ Register and start your free trial ](https://store.zoho.com/ResellerCustomerSignUp.do?id=3ab4ed9997425209e469c1067beef173)

**Why Zoho Books with Apps Bunches?**  
- 🚀 Full automation of financial operations: every order instantly becomes an invoice.  
- 🔄 Real-time synchronization: continuous updates between your store and accounting system.  
- ✅ Higher accuracy with fewer errors: no duplicate or missing entries.  
- 📊 Instant financial reports: income statements, balance sheets, cash flow, and more.  
- 🧾 Full compliance with Saudi VAT & e-invoicing (ZATCA).  
- 💡 Simplified accounting: all your data organized and ready for review anytime.  


### **Key Features of Zoho Books for Your Store**  


**E-Invoicing (ZATCA)**  
Be fully prepared for Phase 2 of Saudi e-invoicing compliance with Zoho Books via Apps Bunches:  
- Certified digital signatures on e-invoices.  
- Embedded QR codes as mandated by ZATCA.  
- Direct integration with ZATCA APIs for invoice submission and approval.  


**Inventory & Sales Management**  
- Automatic stock updates with every sale or purchase.  
- Smart low-stock alerts for timely restocking.  
- Accurate tracking of product movements.  


**Advanced Financial Reporting**  
- Comprehensive reports including income statements and balance sheets.  
- Customizable, exportable financial reports.  
- KPIs and insights to track profits, losses, and growth.  

**Security & Compliance**  
- User access control and permissions.  
- Audit trail to track changes and transactions.  
- Strict compliance with global data privacy and security standards.  


**Activation Steps**  
1. Subscribe to Zoho Books [Zoho Books](https://store.zoho.com/ResellerCustomerSignUp.do?id=3ab4ed9997425209e469c1067beef173) on the Premium plan.
2. Complete the required setup by following the onboarding guide we shared after your Apps Bunches subscription.
3. Activate the Apps Bunches app to connect your store with Zoho Books, and follow the steps mentioned in the guide.
4. Run your store with confidence—while Apps Bunches Application for Zoho Books takes care of everything end-to-end.


**Get Started Today!**  
Stop wasting time on manual work and focus on scaling your business.  
With **Zoho Books powered by Apps Bunches**, your accounting is automated and accurate from day one.

name: Zoho Bookings
short_description: Let Your Customers Book Your Services While You Sleep!
description:
**Let Your Customers Book Your Services While You Sleep!**

How many bookings have you missed just because of delayed responses?
How many potential clients left your store because they couldn't find an easy way to book?

With the Zoho Bookings integration into Zid stores via Apps Bunches, you can now offer a fully automated booking system directly on your products. Your customers can choose a time, book, and pay — while you relax.

**What Does the App Do?**
It connects your products in Zid directly to your Zoho Bookings services and replaces the “Add to Cart” button with “Book Now.”
It displays a smart, real-time calendar with your available slots.

**Your customer:**
Views available time slots
Selects a suitable time
Books and pays through your store’s payment gateway
Receives reminders before the appointment (via email – based on your settings)

**And you:**
No more manual follow-ups
Your calendar is auto-managed
Better service = higher reviews & more bookings
App Features:
Automated linking between your Zid products and Zoho services
Real-time booking calendar displayed in your store
Direct online payment through your store’s existing gateway
Automatic reminders (free email or paid SMS)
Fully compatible with Zid web themes (Asayel & Farah) and Apps Bunches mobile app

**Zoho Bookings Official App for Booking Management**
Not only can customers book effortlessly, you as a merchant can manage it all from your phone.
The Zoho Bookings mobile app (iOS / Android) gives you:
Instant notifications for every new booking
A full daily and weekly calendar view
The ability to confirm, reschedule, or cancel any booking
Easy communication with customers

[🔗 Download the app and manage bookings straight from your phone.](https://apps.apple.com/sa/app/zoho-bookings/id1444416745)

**How to Activate:**
Subscribe to Zoho Bookings
Activate the app from Zid App Store
Inside Zoho Bookings, add your services and set up availability, duration, pricing, and providers
In the Apps Bunches dashboard, link each product in your store to the appropriate Zoho service
That’s it! You now have a professional booking system inside your store — with zero coding needed.

**Perfect For:**
Clinics, beauty salons, workshops, private sessions, courses, consultants... any service-based business!

**ℹ️ Important Notes:**
Zoho Bookings × Zid integration requires a Premium plan from Zoho Bookings
One license = one service provider (resource). If you have multiple providers, you need additional licenses
The Premium plan includes key features like email/SMS reminders and full customization
All services and schedules are set up from within your Zoho Bookings dashboard
Online payment is processed through your store’s payment setup
Theme compatibility applies to supported Zid themes. If you're using a custom theme, minor tweaks might be needed.

🟢 Don't lose bookings due to complicated steps.
Let your customers book, schedule, and pay — while you focus on what matters.
Activate the integration now and feel the difference.

name: Zid AI
short_description: Zid AI: Professional product photos and SEO descriptions to grow your store in one click.
description:
#### Zid AI: Smarter Commerce, Faster Growth
#### 

In the competitive world of e-commerce, the difference between a window shopper and a loyal customer often lies in two things: **visual appeal** and **persuasive storytelling.** For many merchants, the "content bottleneck"—the endless cycle of taking photos, editing backgrounds, and writing descriptions—is the biggest barrier to scaling. **Zid AI** was designed to shatter that barrier. We’ve trained our models on over **2 million products** to ensure that every output isn't just "content," but a high-converting asset designed to fuel your growth.

### **The Problem: The Content Struggle**

Running a store is hard enough without having to be a professional photographer and a marketing expert at the same time. Most merchants face:

*   **High Production Costs:** Professional shoots and copywriters are expensive.
    
*   **The "Blank Page" Syndrome:** Struggling to write SEO descriptions that actually rank on Google.
    
*   **Inconsistent Branding:** Amateur photos with cluttered backgrounds that make a store look untrustworthy.
    
*   **Time Loss:** Spending hours on a single product listing instead of focusing on sales.
    

### **The Solution: Your All-in-One AI Creative Suite**

**Zid AI** transforms your workflow from a manual grind into a 4-step automated breeze:

1.  **Choose Your Tool** → 2. **Select Your Product** → 3. **Let the AI Work** → 4. **Sync Results Instantly**.
    

### **How Zid AI Empowers Your Business**

#### **1\. AI Product Writer (Words that Sell & Rank)**

Stop guessing what works. Our AI crafts smart, conversion-focused descriptions tailored to your brand.

*   **SEO-Optimized:** Automatically generates titles and tags that help you top search results.
    
*   **Smart Copywriting:** Uses data-driven language to highlight benefits, not just features.
    
*   **Instant Scaling:** Write descriptions for your entire inventory in a fraction of the time.
    

#### **2\. Background Editor (Studio Quality, Zero Effort)**

Clean, professional imagery is the backbone of trust.

*   **Precision Removal:** Effortlessly isolate your product from messy backgrounds with surgical accuracy.
    
*   **Vibrant Aesthetics:** Replace dull backgrounds with professional colors or designs that make your product "pop" off the screen.
    

#### **3\. AI Product Photographer (Professional Shots in One Click)**

You don’t need an expensive studio to get world-class marketing assets.

*   **Lifestyle Transformation:** Turn a basic smartphone photo into a high-end lifestyle shot.
    
*   **Realistic Environments:** Automatically place your products in stunning, realistic settings that help customers visualize them in their own lives.
    

### **The Merchant Advantage**

> **"Zid AI isn't just a tool; it's a team of photographers and writers available 24/7."**

By integrating Zid AI, you are choosing:

*   **Better Conversion Rates:** High-quality visuals and copy lead to higher customer confidence.
    
*   **Lower Overheads:** Save thousands on external agencies and software subscriptions.
    
*   **Market Agility:** Go from a new shipment to a live, optimized listing in minutes, not days.
    

**Ready to let the AI do the heavy lifting?** Explore your new dashboard and see how **Zid AI** makes commerce easier.

name: FinanciaOZ
short_description: Connect Zid store to Odoo for simple accounting, automation, and real-time financial insights.
description:
The Odoo Connector for Zid Store is a powerful tool that seamlessly integrates the Odoo platform with the Zid platform, specifically designed to enhance the accounting module. This connector simplifies data management by creating a direct communication channel between the two systems, ensuring your accounting data is always synchronized and accurate.

Key Features of the Odoo Connector for Zid Store Accounting:

**Data Synchronization:** Automatically sync critical data such as customer information, vendor details, product listings, invoices, and payment records between Odoo and Zid. This ensures that both platforms are up-to-date with the latest information.

**Real-Time Updates:** Any changes made in either Odoo or Zid are instantly reflected across both platforms, providing users with real-time updates for smooth and efficient accounting operations.

**Easy Installation and Setup:** The connector is designed for quick and easy installation, requiring minimal technical expertise. Users can effortlessly integrate Odoo and Zid without needing extensive IT support.

Benefits of Using the Odoo Connector:

**Streamlined Accounting Processes:**  The seamless integration reduces manual data entry, eliminates errors, and saves time by automating your accounting workflow.
Real-Time Data Accuracy: Keep your accounting records up-to-date with instant data exchange between Zid Store and Odoo.

**Increased Efficiency:**  Automate repetitive accounting tasks and focus on growing your business instead of managing data across platforms.

How to Install the Odoo Connector for Zid Store
Install the Module: Install the Odoo connector module from the Odoo apps section.

**Activate on Zid:** Go to the Zid platform and activate the application.

**Input Credentials:** Copy the store ID, manager token, app ID, and secret token from Zid and enter them into Odoo.

**Fetch Token:** In Odoo, go to the company settings (in the settings module) and click on "Get Token" to fetch the required key.

**Sync Data:** Open the Zid module in Odoo to fetch products, contacts, categories, and orders automatically.

name: Ashbk
short_description: Our application serves as a seamless link between Zid merchant and ZATCA,
description:
**Problem Statement:**
Merchants often grapple with the complex and time-consuming task of integrating their sales and order data with the systems of regulatory authorities like the Zakat, Tax, and Customs Authority. This process demands manual data entry, increasing the risk of errors, consuming valuable time, and potentially leading to non-compliance issues that result in fines and legal repercussions.

**Solution:**
Our application provides a comprehensive solution to this challenge by offering a seamless integration platform that connects merchants' order data from their business operations, specifically from the Zid app, to the Zakat, Tax, and Customs Authority systems. This integration not only streamlines operations but also ensures accurate and timely compliance with taxation and customs requirements.

**How the Application Benefits Merchants:**

**-** **Effortless Data Sync:** 
Merchants can bid farewell to manual data entry. The application automates the synchronization of order details, eliminating errors and freeing up valuable time that can be redirected towards business growth.

**-** **Real-time Compliance:**
The application ensures that merchants' sales records are consistently and promptly reported to the regulatory authority. This real-time compliance minimizes the risk of penalties, fines, and legal actions that result from delayed or inaccurate reporting.

**-** **Reduced Administrative Load:**
With automated data integration, merchants can wave goodbye to the administrative burden of compiling and submitting sales records separately. This empowers businesses to redirect their efforts towards strategic planning and customer satisfaction.

**-** **Enhanced Accuracy:**
By eliminating manual data entry, the application significantly reduces the likelihood of human errors. This accurate reporting not only prevents costly mistakes but also enhances merchants' reputation for reliability.

**-** **Data Insights:**
The application provides merchants with clear insights into their tax obligations, enabling them to make informed financial decisions. This transparency promotes better financial management and strategic planning.

**-** **Secure Data Handling:**
The application prioritizes data security, utilizing encryption and secure authentication mechanisms to safeguard sensitive financial information. Merchants can trust that their data is protected at every step.

In conclusion, our application directly addresses the pain points experienced by merchants when it comes to integrating orders with the Zakat, Tax, and Customs Authority. By automating data synchronization, ensuring compliance, and providing real-time insights, the application empowers merchants to operate efficiently, reduce errors, and confidently navigate the regulatory landscape.

**Steps to activate the Ashbk application through Zid:**

**1.** Choose the right Plan for you

**2.** Activation through the Ashbk page on the Zid website

**3.** Ashbak account will be created automatically using the same data as the Zid account

**4.** You will receive a message on your email from Ashbk containing the password for your new account


We can serve you better by contacting us on WhatsApp: -
+966534764143

name: Tnbihaty- WhatsApp Bot
short_description: Boost sales with Tnbihaty : Send WhatsApp notifications for effective customer communication.
description:
### **Key Services Offered:**  
- **Send reminders for abandoned carts via WhatsApp** with automatic discount coupons.  
- **Order status updates** (e.g., order confirmation, shipping, delivery) via WhatsApp.  
- **Instant delivery of digital products/files** via WhatsApp.  
- **Create bulk promotional campaigns** with customer imports from your store or Excel files.  
- **Smart automated response bot** to handle customer inquiries instantly.  
- **Send thank-you messages and reward coupons** based on customer ratings (by star count).  
- **Directly link your store’s WhatsApp account** without approval delays.  
- **Import contacts, chats, and groups** from WhatsApp.  
- **Customizable message templates** with variables like {Customer Name}, {Order Number}, {Tracking Link}, etc.  
- **Automatic notifications** (e.g., order status changes, store rating requests).  
- **User-friendly interface** focused on seamless user experience.  
- **Detailed reports** to track message delivery and read status.  
- **API integration** for external service compatibility.  

---

### **Supported Message Templates:**  
- Abandoned Cart Message  
- New Customer Welcome Message  
- New Order Notification  
- Cash-on-Delivery Confirmation  
- Rating Request  
- Verification Code Message  
- Order Processing/Review/Shipping/Cancellation/Return Notifications  
- Shipping/Delivery Alerts  
- And more...  

---

### **Template Variables:**  
- `{Customer Name}`  
- `{Cart Total}`  
- `{Tracking Link}`  
- `{Order Number}`  
- `{Checkout Link}`  
- And others...  

---

### **Additional Features:**  
- Send **images, videos, and PDFs** with messages.  
- Import **abandoned cart lists and customer data** automatically or manually.  
- **Message logs** to monitor usage and delivery status.  

---

### **Activation Steps:**  
1. After installing the app on your store:  
   - A new account is **automatically created**, and login details are sent to your store’s WhatsApp.  
   - Or, create an account **manually** via the platform.  
2. After logging in:  
   - **Enable/edit message templates** in the app settings.  
   - **Import data** (abandoned carts, store customers).  
   - **Link WhatsApp account** (watch tutorial video or read the guide for instructions).  

---

### **Notes:**  
- The platform is designed to be **intuitive and easy** for beginners.  
- Full flexibility to customize every detail to match **your store’s brand identity**.

name: Jahez x Mazeed
short_description: Jahez x Mazeed
description:
نظرة عامة
ابدأ بيع منتجاتك بسهولة مع مزيد عبر جاهز شوب!
تطبيق جاهز هو أحد اكبر تطبيقات التسوق في السعوديه  ، يتيح لك عرض منتجاتك بكل سهولة لملايين العملاء وبشحن سريع من خلال لوحة تحكم متجرك استفد من فرص بيع إضافية برسوم أقل مقدّمة من مزيد، ووسّع نطاق وصولك لعملاء جدد بطريقة ذكية وفعّالة.

وش يميز جاهز شوب؟
شحن سريع خلال ساعة لطلباتك عبر جاهز.
تفعيل فوري.
نسبة منخفضة "مزيد يغطي جزء من التكلفة عنك".
مزامنة تلقائية لمنتجاتك بين متجرك وتطبيق جاهز.
إدارة الطلبات والمخزون بمتجرك.
وصول أسرع وأوسع لقاعدة عملاء جديدة.

الشروط والأحكام
تطبق شروط وأحكام مزيد على استخدام تطبيق جاهز.


ماهي شروط الانضمام لـ جاهز؟
وجود سجل تجاري.
أن يكون المتجر مفعل على منصة مزيد.
أن يتم توصيل الطلبات خلال وقت قصير خلال 48 ساعة.
أن يكون موقع المتجر أو المخزون في أحد مدن المملكة.
تحديد أوقات عمل للمتجر.
وجود مسؤول مخصص للعمليات وإدارة الطلبات ومتابعتها.


آلية التفعيل
اضغط على زر تفعيل التطبيق.
وافق على الصلاحيات وثبت التطبيق.
حدد أوقات العمل والمخزون ورقم الهاتف.

سيتم التفعيل خلال 24 ساعة عمل.

name: Masfufat
short_description: Masfufat that works with the (drop-shopping) system in the electronics and communications sector.
description:
We provide online store owners specializing in electronics and communications with wholesale-priced products without the need to purchase, store, or bear the risks associated with selling these products. We also handle all logistics for merchants, eliminating the need for warehouse rentals or hiring staff for parcel preparation and shipping. Additionally, Masfufat offers a product solution with image content integration. Its features and benefits allow you to simply select products and synchronize them with your store in just one click.


##### Our Features

**Maximize Profits with Minimal Costs**
You don’t need capital to supply and purchase products. With Masfufat, you can start your business with minimal expenses, enabling you to achieve significant profits without the need for large investments in inventory.

**Automated Linking and Synchronization**
Masfufat enables seamless integration of e-commerce stores with popular platforms like Sella and Zid. You can also synchronize products with your store in one click, simplifying product management and ensuring continuous updates without hassle.

**High-Quality Product Offering**
We offer a growing and consistent range of products that meet the highest quality standards at the lowest costs. Our meticulous product selection ensures that we deliver the best to our clients, helping you provide your customers with a diverse and unique range of products.

**Efficient Logistics Management**
We handle all logistical operations for merchants, meaning you won’t need to rent warehouses or hire staff for order preparation and shipping. We take care of all these tasks on your behalf, allowing you to focus on growing your business and increasing your sales without logistical complexities.


##### Integration Steps
1. Select the plan that suits your needs.
2. Activate the application from the Zid App Store.
3. You will be redirected to the Masfufat platform to create an account or log in to complete the integration.
4. The integration will be completed automatically.

name: Juthor Platform
short_description: Juthor: Manage sales, inventory, reports easily without accounting skills.
description:
**Juthor** : Your Essential Partner for Effortless Brand Management
 **About Juthor**
Juthor is a platform designed to simulate the needs of local brands, enabling you to measure your project's performance with minimal input and no accounting expertise required. Whether you're managing a small or growing business, Juthor provides comprehensive solutions to streamline your operations and drive success.

---
 **Sales Administration: Unifying All Sales Channels**
No matter which platforms you use to sell your products (website, exhibitions, concept stores, social media, WhatsApp), Juthor seamlessly reads and consolidates your sales data into one centralized location. Say goodbye to scattered information—Juthor keeps everything organized and accessible.

---
 **Inventory Management: Precision and Organization**
Juthor’s inventory management starts from recording raw materials and packaging, all the way through to the final product. The system calculates production costs and automatically updates stock quantities across all sales points, ensuring you always have an accurate overview of your inventory levels while minimizing waste.

---
 **Expense Management: Clear Categorization**
Easily input and categorize your expenses into clear sections such as raw materials, labor, rent, and advertising. This structured approach allows you to track spending efficiently and identify areas where resources are being utilized most heavily, helping you optimize cost management.

---
 **Profitability and Pricing: Striking the Right Balance**

After entering product details, Juthor automatically calculates profit margins, empowering you to set competitive prices that maximize profitability without compromising quality or alienating customers.

---
 **Payment Processing: Unlimited Flexibility**

Juthor supports a wide range of payment methods, allowing you to activate options that simulate all your sales channels. Whether it’s credit cards, bank transfers, or digital wallets, the system ensures seamless transactions tailored to meet your customers' preferences.

---
 **Reports and Performance Measurement: Data-Driven Decisions**

Juthor generates simple yet detailed reports that provide deep insights into your business performance. These reports serve as powerful tools for building strategic decisions, enhancing efficiency, and driving sustainable growth.

---
 **Why Choose Juthor?**

- **User-Friendly:** No accounting experience necessary.
- **Comprehensive:** Covers every aspect of business management.
- **Flexible:** Supports all modern and traditional sales platforms.
- **Accurate:** Relies on advanced technology for precise data analysis.
- **Sustainable:** Helps you achieve financial goals while ensuring long-term success.

---
 **How to Integrate Juthor with Your Zid Store**

1. **Install Juthor** : Start by installing the Juthor application on your store .
2. **Automatic Integration for Existing Stores** :  
    If the store's phone number is already registered on the Juthor platform, the system will automatically integrate with your Zid store, and no further action is required.
3. **Setup for New Stores** :
    - For new stores not yet registered, Juthor will create a new account using the store's phone number.
    - A temporary password (1–8 characters) will be generated exclusively for these new accounts.
    - An SMS will be sent to the phone number registered on the Zid store, containing a link that allows the user to securely reset their password and complete account setup.
